Authorities say the gang has infiltrated immigrant communities and taken over properties in Aurora, exploiting undocumented residents’ fear of law enforcement to avoid detection. Local officials blame the surge on Denver’s migrant-friendly policies, while law enforcement scrambles to rebuild community trust and confront what they call a deeply misunderstood threat. | Colorado Rep. Ken DeGraaf was told to cover a Second Amendment sticker on his laptop—reading “Shall not be infringed – 2A”—after Democrats deemed it “offensive” during a gun control debate. The incident occurred amid heated discussion over , a sweeping bill that would ban certain semiautomatic firearms. DeGraaf criticized the move as an attack on the Constitution, highlighting concerns about political censorship within the state legislature. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ JEN SCHUMANN| STATE | MARCH 24 If Senate Bill 25-071 fails, Julie Lonborg says her neighbor could end up driving from Lone Tree to Thornton just to pick up a single prescription. That’s not some theoretical what-if. BY REV. ROBERT BABCOX | COMMENTARY | MARCH 24 I have been asked: should Christians be involved in politics? Short answer — yes! Oh some may blurt out 2 Corinthians 6:16 in response: “What agreement is there between the temple of God and idols? For we are the temple of the living God. As God has said: ‘I will live with them and walk among them, and I will be their God and they will be my people.’ Therefore, come out from them and be separate, says the Lord. Touch no unclean thing, and I will receive you.” BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | MARCH 23 The Helmet of Salvation, an essential part of the spiritual armor described in Ephesians 6:10-18, is not merely an image to visualize. It symbolizes the protection and assurance we gain when we respond to God’s call for a new life—or a rebirth of reality—a new existence where we shed the old self and embrace a new reality that transforms our religious experiences into a deeper and more profound humanity in every aspect of life. The question is: will you answer the call? Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? The Constitution contains several grammar errors , including a notable misspelling of “Pennsylvania” as “Pensylvania” above the signers’ names—a mistake made by Alexander Hamilton when listing each state next to its delegate, including Benjamin Franklin for Pennsylvania. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Try to be a rainbow in someone else's cloud." — Maya Angelou | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

body:
We are now witnessing the radical Left's THIRD coup attempt against President Donald J. Trump.

| | |

We are now witnessing the radical Left's THIRD coup attempt against President Donald J. Trump. ▶︎ First, it was the **Russia Hoax** following his victory in 2016. ▶︎ Then, it was the **Scamdemic** before the 2020 election. ▶︎ And now the Left is using **Judicial Lawfare** to tank his agenda following a resounding victory in the 2024 election. Make no mistake. **This is a Judicial Coup.** _**And every American should recognize that all three coup attempts against President Trump were conducted by UNELECTED agents.**_ First, it was Deep State intelligence officers. _None were elected._ Then, it was the public health establishment. _None were elected._ And now it's Democrat-appointed judges. _Not one was ever elected._ **The U.S. Senate is the key to stopping this judicial tyranny.** ▶︎ Confirming good judges requires _51 Senate votes_. ▶︎ Restricting national injunctions requires _60 Senate votes_.

▶︎ Impeaching bad judges requires _67 Senate votes_. Thankfully, we have 53 Republicans in the Senate now, so confirming good judges is our immediate weapon in this fight. **But 60 votes is within reach if we focus our political efforts in the next few years. And that starts RIGHT NOW.** **[Please contribute to our supported Senate candidates.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z573j6e7a775qj0hbkcm6eavvpnisq844c830n6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g62o76c1h2bs)** These candidates are proven conservatives that we can count on to fight for our principles and values. ▶︎ Sen. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I want to tell you personally:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Yes – the rumors are true. I’ve got some major news for you!

Yes – the rumors are true. I’ve got some major news for you!
Yes - the rumors are true. I've got some major news for you!
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy.
---
**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._ZJA "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._Bw)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-xCg)
---
The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. [As Governor, I'd be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._-YRtxpUV73-Q4w "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.")
---
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-gsrHLEGqzcKEEKoog)
---
** WHY GOVERNOR? **
---
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.
---
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._2Z1LNQ0voOzHhw)
---
We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything.
---
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. [I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._ljXwFg9tPg "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.")

So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor.

**[It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I've officially launched my campaign. I'm humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._SjRqV-9o-f2TA "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size.")**

---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._yfCYwR0zmFbg)
---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---

Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time.

God bless you and God bless America,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

And heck, he even won the popular vote. | It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally. | Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely. This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America! But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW! WHY OHIO? This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno. | The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for." | WHY GOVERNOR? Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. | We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything. | That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country." So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor. "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size." | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time. God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201 | To unsubscribe from this mailing list

| Gloucester Candidate Training: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
---
---
| Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. This SATURDAY, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold a training session for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond. We will be in Gloucester this Saturday!
Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed.
Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in.
Here are the details for our upcoming session:
Gloucester 🗓️ March 29, 2025 ⏰ 11:00 AM 📍 27 Webster St, Gloucester, MA 01930
Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts!

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: (1) new message for you From Sarah Huckabee Sanders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Hobbs and the LEFT have DESTROYED this state–We must SAVE it

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcdc6s54d23arehi3qvrlhqq02rv9s5idghovkr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g66pj1cph2bs "Karrin for Arizona")

****
**Sarah Huckabee Sanders** here.

I need to talk to you about an important race--[because ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqfae4vb0tqu2ptsle5eo5hcff1ph30d74a69mb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g66pj1cph2bs)**[the future of our country depends on it.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcaec6bq43bpm7gues8suq0u7p59r3jhpu23oi9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g66pj1cph2bs)

**
Arizona is **hanging by a thread.

**
Katie Hobbs and her **RADICAL leftist allies** have turned this great state into **California 2.0.

**
🚨 **WIDE OPEN** border--cartels and criminals pouring in.

🚨 The economy is **TANKING** --inflation, crime, and job losses are skyrocketing.

🚨 Election integrity? **Hobbs vetoed a bill** to secure SAME-DAY election results!

Arizona was once **a stronghold for conservative values.** But under Hobbs, it's become a testing ground for the Left's **most RADICAL and DANGEROUS ideas.

**
We CANNOT afford to lose Arizona. And that's why I need you to meet my friend, **Karrin Taylor Robson.

**
### **Karrin is a PROVEN America First Fighter.

**
🔴 **A business leader** --she **built jobs** instead of killing them like Biden and Hobbs.

🔴 **A relentless border hawk** --she will **shut down the chaos** and STOP the invasion.

🔴 **The ONLY Trump-Endorsed Candidate** --because President Trump trusts her to GET THE JOB DONE.

[She is **the ONLY candidate** in this race who can](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhk7jioobp9k5jdu0vh8p1637bmiav3hohvcc7ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g66pj1cph2bs)**[WIN BIG and FLIP Arizona RED.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z98a79uv2jm1sc4u7t4elv02rtai2d0kplmte30o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g66pj1cph2bs)

**
Right now, the **Radical Left** is **pumping MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep their **socialist grip** on this key swing state.

They know if they **lose Arizona,** their **America-Last agenda falls apart.

**

name: Team Freedom Va
subject: Governor Youngkin Chooses Profit Over People
body:
On Monday, Governor Youngkin handed down several vetoes that will hurt hardworking Virginians who are already struggling with a high cost of living.
| | | | |
---
| Governor Youngkin Chooses Profit Over People
---
| On Monday, Governor Youngkin handed down several vetoes that will hurt hardworking Virginians who are already struggling with a high cost of living.
---
|
---
| [Read the Full Article Here](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016jyC3IFia93vxuQaTfJ8RWew_DiRt2NiGYJmi2Dlq96ZeP9gZq__BisKJXrRZdYTVrcKHGZ6S1tndskiFBVHY0pzoZHdxTmmf0d5igI9Y3ONzLMuk8XVKzoPYjxen6u_Z9_qouxs5aZjT06dYKlh4JAjAjg2v_WRYlLpb7P-_Qy6jOQky5Yp9WnTa16Uc67zI_SOPfJTrLJ1VY_ZRI8WkmK6EtzMta3RFMV-dUmiDIc6Cwiwl7tr5jqLSrUSoHge1R7qdmJu7rgU-kvuFZVGz-lmEDiatMx5ifHMrtZSn4ZI-sgv1t5Ws6HX0oKsTFbCwIpVGKcZcLIC61dXnqzOdprs_K31vNdAFm6jmw1jg2-TBf0CSb25SV2xGyW0Zs_qeQ7Bfdxk_cOuvVXP_vR1MDRk81Trd5Ip&c=_4pnKh6LGsl3johqwonlxoajBTCFETxkbDt63bjqjW4hxiVHfDkYfw==&ch=1VW6HcHW964SuAwx_h4J-JLhCH9EgEwh7q03x59oXqeuzG1vYOdnCw==)
---
The Governor vetoed the Prescription Drug Affordability Board, Paid Family & Medical Leave, and a higher Minimum Wage, all measures that would have helped Virginians in the face of rising inflation and federal job cuts. He also made amendments to the bills that would ban hidden fees, allowing loopholes for food delivery services and gyms, two of the main perpetrators of hidden fees. Once again, Governor Youngkin has chosen corporations and Big Pharma over the livelihoods of hardworking Virginians.

name: Kenzie Shelstad
subject: A backslide… in ‘25
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
But our mothers and grandmothers have vivid memories of... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104524699/535652173/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250326WHM_N_KS_90DO_14_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYjVhNTQxLTQyMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZWq7tQMF7U3u4HvKZghtL9yPJ617F6YHAspBvROQEU=)
---
Hi Peter,

March is _Women’s History Month_ , which is a great time to reflect on:

\- How far we’ve come in the fight for equal rights
\- How much we still have yet to gain
and, most importantly...
\- How much we have to lose

Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember living in a time when women couldn't open their own credit cards (1974) or apply for high-paying jobs. It’s only been about 100 years since women were granted the right to vote.

We have watched in horror as misogynists and convicted sexual predators work to dismantle our government in Washington, and, in many ways, **we’re already seeing a backslide for women’s progress in America.**

We are writing today because we have a plan for ensuring pro-women legislation prevails.

**But here’s the thing: passing pro-women legislation is dependent on women being REPRESENTED in the rooms where decisions about our lives and our bodies are being made.**

Over the past few decades, women have become more represented at almost every level of government – and our laws have reflected that increase in representation. For example, when Nevada became the first state to achieve gender parity in their state legislature in 2019, we saw **29** (!!!!) new pieces of legislation expanding women’s rights and safety within the first three legislative cycles alone!

But in recent years, we have started to see a disturbing trend:

In 2024, the Center for American Women and Politics (CAWP) released a stunning report stating that far fewer women ran for Congress in 2024 than in previous election cycles.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104524721/535652222/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250326WHM_N_KS_90DO_14_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYjVhNTQxLTQyMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZWq7tQMF7U3u4HvKZghtL9yPJ617F6YHAspBvROQEU=)
---
Since 2022, the number of women candidates running for federal office is **down by 25%**. Executive offices at the state level: **down by 73%**. The number of women running for State legislature is **down by 55.4%** – and the numbers are even worse when you break it down by race...

**This is a horrible time for women to _lose_ representation in government as dangerous laws about women’s bodies and well-being are being crafted by rooms full of men. We desperately need more women in those rooms.**

It’s critical that we reverse this trend immediately. **That’s why Her Bold Move is providing pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates with the wide range of support they need to run for office and WIN their elections.**

[**We are working to ensure that women’s hard-fought progress doesn’t slip away. In honor of _Women’s History Month_ , join us to elect as many pro-choice, pro-women women as possible throughout the Trump administration by donating $20.25 or more today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104524723/535652225/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250326WHM_N_KS_90DO_14_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjYjVhNTQxLTQyMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZWq7tQMF7U3u4HvKZghtL9yPJ617F6YHAspBvROQEU=)

Happy Women’s History Month,

Kenzie Shelstad
Fellowship Director
Her Bold Move

**Sarah Huckabee Sanders** here.

**
Arizona is **hanging by a thread.

**
Katie Hobbs and her **RADICAL leftist allies** have turned this great state into **California 2.0.

**
🚨 **WIDE OPEN** border--cartels and criminals pouring in.

🚨 The economy is **TANKING** --inflation, crime, and job losses are skyrocketing.

🚨 Election integrity? **Hobbs vetoed a bill** to secure SAME-DAY election results!

Arizona was once **a stronghold for conservative values.** But under Hobbs, it's become a testing ground for the Left's **most RADICAL and DANGEROUS ideas.

**
We CANNOT afford to lose Arizona. And that's why I need you to meet my friend, **Karrin Taylor Robson.

**
### **Karrin is a PROVEN America First Fighter.

**
🔴 **A business leader** --she **built jobs** instead of killing them like Biden and Hobbs.

🔴 **A relentless border hawk** --she will **shut down the chaos** and STOP the invasion.

🔴 **The ONLY Trump-Endorsed Candidate** --because President Trump trusts her to GET THE JOB DONE.

**
Right now, the **Radical Left** is **pumping MILLIONS** into Arizona to keep their **socialist grip** on this key swing state.

They know if they **lose Arizona,** their **America-Last agenda falls apart.

**
That's why we **MUST fight back.

**
If we fail to act, **Arizona will be lost.** The border will stay **open.** The economy will **collapse.** And the **America First movement will suffer.

**
[We **NEED** strong Republican governors to **back President Trump** and](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zscpubuo6q5rqb2dktguc9aeseuqfq1csvdlgabo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g61ob6chh2bs)**[fight the Radical Left head-on.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5gvl0icbibclko05v3e0t455bm2mcdqvk50t0kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g61ob6chh2bs)

**
I'm personally asking you--will you **stand with Karrin and help us flip Arizona RED?

**
[YES! I'M IN FOR KARRIN ->](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zm136urmqr3svugd59h4rfm8nugamrcapphq7290_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g61ob6chh2bs)

Thank you for everything you do for our movement. This fight is too important to sit out.

**Sarah Huckabee Sanders**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I refuse to let it all be for nothing
body:
April 1 could change everything...

| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1g9i12ksvisv8frjsfue3puplqli59frn2re1rg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1g61ob6cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from patriots like _YOU_ went into securing our Party’s historic victory this past November.
---
I even transferred $2,500,000 from my _own_ 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest.
---
_But now, our new majority is facing its biggest test yet...._
---
**On April 1, immediately following our _FIRST_ FEC-mandated deadline of 2025, TWO must-win special elections are being held in Florida.**
---
And here’s the real kicker, the Democrats see this as their opening to finally shut down President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)!
---
They’ve relentlessly attacked DOGE, even having a Biden-appointed judge issue a _“Temporary Restraining Order”_ against the department.
---
**_But legal warfare isn’t the Left’s only tactic to shut down DOGE... They’re raising a massive warchest to _FLIP_ these two House seats in the April 1 special elections._**
---
I’m not one to raise the alarm without reason, so please, trust me when I say __everything__ is now the line.
---
After having transferred the **$2.5 MILLION** from my own campaign last year, I REFUSE to let all our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
_That’s why I’m calling on**2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my commitment before the 3/31 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline with a contribution of any amount to help DEFEND our majority ahead of the April 1 special elections just DAYS from now._

I even transferred $2,500,000 from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest. But now, our new majority is facing its biggest test yet.... On April 1, immediately following our FIRST FEC-mandated deadline of 2025, TWO must-win special elections are being held in Florida. And here’s the real kicker, the Democrats see this as their opening to finally shut down President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)! They’ve relentlessly attacked DOGE, even having a Biden-appointed judge issue a “Temporary Restraining Order” against the department. But legal warfare isn’t the Left’s only tactic to shut down DOGE... They’re raising a massive warchest to FLIP these two House seats in the April 1 special elections. I’m not one to raise the alarm without reason, so please, trust me when I say everything is now the line. After having transferred the $2.5 MILLION from my own campaign last year, I REFUSE to let all our hard work be for nothing. That’s why I’m calling on2.5 million PATRIOTS to match my commitment before the 3/31 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline with a contribution of any amount to help DEFEND our majority ahead of the April 1 special elections just DAYS from now. ---

GOP Rep. and veteran Brian Mast **[shut down CNN reporter Brianna Keilar,](https://substack.com/redirect/3adf6b6f-bcab-42a6-80f2-4bdd18bf2eae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who thought she was going to have an easy slam dunk interview on a Republican after the Trump administration's military leak of missile strikes in Yemen.
She was very wrong...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3adf6b6f-bcab-42a6-80f2-4bdd18bf2eae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3adf6b6f-bcab-42a6-80f2-4bdd18bf2eae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Would you use Signal for classified information?" Keilar asked Mast of the encrypted messaging app used for the communication between personal that was then leaked to The Atlantic.
"I would not use Signal for classified information," Mast answered, further explaining his own military experience and protocol communicating sensitive information.
"Would you talk about upcoming military operations, weapons that will be used," Keilar started to ask.
"I may!" Mast inserted, before being snapped at for interrupting. "I don't really use Signal myself. Going back in time to planning operations as if I was part of the military, yes, there is a very specific difference between is it classified or is it sensitive and if I need to speak to somebody in a different environment where they are not co-located with me and I want to have a conversation, I might be using Signal, why, because it's authorized end-to-end encryption communication for secure communications.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dcdae1d3-1d77-49e8-ab08-0ab750ed87c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Keilar again asked, "It's not a classified platform, right?"
"I think I've said that about half a dozen times in this conversation," Mast reminded her. "If this would have resulted in anything other than a ruthless strike with no American KIA, then it would have been a very different conversation. But the way that it resulted was a very ruthless strike with no American KIA."
Keilar tries one more thing before ending the interview: comparing the missile strike leak to the mishandling of classified info by Hillary Clinton which Mast has previously condemned. Mast's response is savage...
"I give you my word as chairman of the Foreign Affairs committee, if at any point Sec. Rubio or Sec Hegseth go out there and keep a server in their basement, delete 30,000 emails off of it, then go on the internet and try to figure out how to wipe the server entirely clean while they are under investigation, if they do that I will call for an investigation," Mast said tongue-in-cheek.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3adf6b6f-bcab-42a6-80f2-4bdd18bf2eae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By Priority Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/c4e27f91-478d-44af-b0a6-b705bdb9a51a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4e27f91-478d-44af-b0a6-b705bdb9a51a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While everyone is focused on tariffs and inflation, the Federal Reserve is quietly rolling out a new program that could give them unprecedented control over your bank account.
They're already working with over 100 banks to:
* **Track every transaction** you make.
* **Freeze your account** at any time.
* **Block your ability** to send or receive money.

This isn't a rumor--it's all laid out in **[Federal Reserve Docket No. OP-1670](https://substack.com/redirect/c4e27f91-478d-44af-b0a6-b705bdb9a51a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a 93-page document that reveals their plan to monitor and control your finances to shield yourself.

# Greg Abbot FIRES BACK at far-left congresswoman for mocking his wheelchair
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/267980c5-c611-4fb3-96a0-9ee94a01ebf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Texas Governor Greg Abbott fired back at Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett after she mocked his use of a wheelchair during a Saturday Human Rights Campaign Dinner in Los Angeles.
Crockett referred to the disabled Abbott as "Governor Hot Wheels" during the dinner.
The Texas governor has used a wheelchair since 1984 when he was injured in a freak accident by a falling tree. He had the chance **[to respond to Crocketts comment](https://substack.com/redirect/267980c5-c611-4fb3-96a0-9ee94a01ebf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an appearance on Sean Hannity's show on Fox News, Tuesday.
"It's another day and another disaster by the Democrats," Abbott said. "The reality is they have no vision, no policy. They have nothing to sell but hate, and Americans are not buying it,... It's one reason why Texas is going to remain red."
**[Watch the full interview here:](https://substack.com/redirect/267980c5-c611-4fb3-96a0-9ee94a01ebf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

clean_body: She regrets inviting him on CNN after this... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? She regrets inviting him on CNN after this... Mar 26 | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. and veteran Brian Mast who thought she was going to have an easy slam dunk interview on a Republican after the Trump administration's military leak of missile strikes in Yemen. She was very wrong... "Would you use Signal for classified information?" Keilar asked Mast of the encrypted messaging app used for the communication between personal that was then leaked to The Atlantic. "I would not use Signal for classified information," Mast answered, further explaining his own military experience and protocol communicating sensitive information. "Would you talk about upcoming military operations, weapons that will be used," Keilar started to ask. "I may!" Mast inserted, before being snapped at for interrupting. "I don't really use Signal myself. Going back in time to planning operations as if I was part of the military, yes, there is a very specific difference between is it classified or is it sensitive and if I need to speak to somebody in a different environment where they are not co-located with me and I want to have a conversation, I might be using Signal, why, because it's authorized end-to-end encryption communication for secure communications. | | ---|---|--- Keilar again asked, "It's not a classified platform, right?" "I think I've said that about half a dozen times in this conversation," Mast reminded her. "If this would have resulted in anything other than a ruthless strike with no American KIA, then it would have been a very different conversation. But the way that it resulted was a very ruthless strike with no American KIA." Keilar tries one more thing before ending the interview: comparing the missile strike leak to the mishandling of classified info by Hillary Clinton which Mast has previously condemned. Mast's response is savage... "I give you my word as chairman of the Foreign Affairs committee, if at any point Sec. Rubio or Sec Hegseth go out there and keep a server in their basement, delete 30,000 emails off of it, then go on the internet and try to figure out how to wipe the server entirely clean while they are under investigation, if they do that I will call for an investigation," Mast said tongue-in-cheek. The Fed 's Plan to Control Your Money Is Live! | | ---|---|--- While everyone is focused on tariffs and inflation, the Federal Reserve is quietly rolling out a new program that could give them unprecedented control over your bank account. They're already working with over 100 banks to: Track every transaction you make. Freeze your account at any time. Block your ability to send or receive money. This isn't a rumor--it's all laid out in , a 93-page document that reveals their plan to monitor and control your finances to shield yourself. In this , we'll show you 3 simple steps to shield your money from the Fed's overreach and keep your savings safe. Greg Abbot FIRES BACK at far-left congresswoman for mocking his wheelchair | | ---|---|--- Texas Governor Greg Abbott fired back at Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett after she mocked his use of a wheelchair during a Saturday Human Rights Campaign Dinner in Los Angeles. Crockett referred to the disabled Abbott as "Governor Hot Wheels" during the dinner. The Texas governor has used a wheelchair since 1984 when he was injured in a freak accident by a falling tree. He had the chance during an appearance on Sean Hannity's show on Fox News, Tuesday. "It's another day and another disaster by the Democrats," Abbott said. "The reality is they have no vision, no policy. They have nothing to sell but hate, and Americans are not buying it,... It's one reason why Texas is going to remain red." | | POLL Is the Yemen strike leak a big deal to you? | ? ? ? ? PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. name: Amanda Chase
subject: Less Than One Week to Go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025
body:
Here's how to sign my petition
| | |
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
|

---
| Let's Get Amanda Chase's name on the ballot for Virginia Governor
---
|
# ONE WEEK FROM TODAY
# UNTIL THE DEADLINE
---
|
# HAMPTON GUN SHOW THIS WEEKEND
---
|
# NASCAR THIS SUNDAY
---
|
# VOLUNTEERS NEEDED THIS WEEKEND
---
| | [CLICK HERE AND PRINT OFF THE PETITON ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GyTp8RellljGDiHOrgi8LzZiBRbq0rxvKJc1LCrcUiK9HdVri21f2dQknnubazfwy5g1V4Bl7BmJUILkRQF2DXWyvN73oA35t_KiE5XPrcF5zX6l4JUx0uJv9idNTo31fv-j3GepVlSeVNOXFdsZdY_B2TEU3QHS&c=EQ4fU66Lek5YET20tupnJBO8xpefLMo7LmTQHBseTIPrWSLGXOrtUw==&ch=8rckBSvodO7iO__193K63xtQ_K80VXytIq_hJzaBcKSoLVKcNy1lVg==)
---
|
Dear Hello One week from today, we must have your petitions in hand for it to count. Next Thursday, April 3 by 5pm we must turn in our signatures to the Virginia State Board of Elections.
AND WE STILL NEED THOUSANDS OF SIGNATURES
We are looking for volunteers to collect signatures at the Hampton Gun Show and just off the NASCAR property this weekend.
* Please call 804 370 8727 or
* email amanda@chaseforva.com if you can volunteer.

Many of you want to help, but you just can't. Life happens. Anyone can get members of their household to sign a petition, get it notarized and Fed Ex it to our Appomattox campaign office. Just remember. You can't sign your own petition. Also, the petition must be notarized before you mail it in.
We ALSO need committed volunteers going to busy shopping centers, church parking lots and anywhere there are many people gathered in line and waiting.
Please do your part to ensure we collect enough signatures to make sure we cross the finish line when we hand in our petitions next Thursday, April 3 before 5pm.
Please stop by the following locations to sign Amanda's petition:
Thursday, March 27 Henrico GOP meeting 6:30-8:00 pm, Board of Supervisors Building, 4301 East Parham Road, Richmond, VA 23228, First Floor.
Friday, March 28 Augusta County 8:00am-9:30am, City Elders Meeting, Common Ground, 15 Angela Court, Fishersville, VA 22939
THIS WEEKEND Please stop by the Hampton Gun Show this weekend to sign the petition to get my name on the ballot or drop off your notarized petitions.
We will have a booth, so please drop by and pick up a free sweatshirt or t-shirt while supplies last. I plan to be there on Saturday from 9am to 3pm but we will have volunteers there the entire time. If you would like to volunteer, please give us call at 804 370-8727 or email amanda@chaseforva.com.
Saturday, March 29-Sunday, March 30 Hampton Gun Show Hampton Roads Convention Center 1610 Coliseum Drive Hampton, VA 23666
Saturday 9-5pm Sunday 10-4pm
If there are other large gatherings of 100 or more people, where we could collect signatures, please email us at amanda@chaseforva.com or call 804 370 8727.
Sunday, March 30 Martinsville 3pm NASCAR Race, 340 Speedway Road, Ridgeway, VA 24148
* We need volunteers from 11am through 5pm.

Monday, March 31 Fredericksburg Gourmeltz,10013 Patriot Hwy, Fredericksburg, VA 22407
Tuesday, April 1 Fauquier County 7pm-8:30pm, Fauquier County GOP, American Legion Post 72, 345 Legion Drive, Warrenton, VA
Unable to attend? If you would like to sign my petition, but you are unable to attend one of these events, you can simply print off the petition, and get your family members to sign.
Please print off the petition at[ www.chaseforgovernor.com ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GyTp8RellljGDiHOrgi8LzZiBRbq0rxvKJc1LCrcUiK9HdVri21f2ZXGxvP0y7bd_BbweGWS7gWVPxF4CcH0es6ZCO5hRZxjfmSkBlCrN3UCg0Oq1ry65T6fBwxNZ5VnqIAwmR5ELiCyiNLsRm72HPADbeQ67KjW&c=EQ4fU66Lek5YET20tupnJBO8xpefLMo7LmTQHBseTIPrWSLGXOrtUw==&ch=8rckBSvodO7iO__193K63xtQ_K80VXytIq_hJzaBcKSoLVKcNy1lVg==)so that it is double sided and then collect signatures, but you can't sign your own petition, witness each signature, get it notarized and Fed Ex it to our Appomattox campaign office to:
Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522
We still need all hands on deck. We still need to collect 400 in each Congressional District. So no matter where you live in the state, we need your help collecting signatures.
Give us a call at 804 370 8727 and we will walk you through what to do, or you can read instructions below.
Many of you are still collecting. Please go ahead and Fed Ex to us the ones that you have already signed in front of a notary, so our team can verify the signatures. It takes about 20 minutes to verify each petition.
Then, please continue collecting.
We must collect 10,000 valid signatures, 400 in each Congressional District, and as a campaign, turn the signatures into the State Board of Elections before Thursday, April 3 at 5pm.
We would like to receive all forms before Monday, March 31, so that we can properly organize and vet the signatures before turning them in to the Virginia State Board of Elections.
Currently, our campaign is 100 percent run by volunteers in each locality. We have no paid staff. The amazing organization you've seen from my campaign is all run by volunteers who want an American First Governor, who can beat Abigail Spanberger in November.
In order for you to vote for me on June 17, please print off the attached petition and collect the signatures of your family, friends and neighbors, so that I can get on the ballot.
WE CANNOT COLLECT SIGNATURES ONLINE.
Signatures must be witnessed in person by signing an old fashioned paper petition ballot.
Are you ready to say yes? Here's what you need to do:

1. Print off the attached form on one sheet of paper, front and back. Double sided only.
2. YOU cannot sign your own petition. Please sign someone else's petition.
3. Witness your friends, family and neighbors sign the petition form.
4. Please make sure they actually sign the form.
5. Please also make sure their writing is legible so that signatures can be verified.
6. You must also witness every signature and visit your local bank to have a notary sign off on your petition form before mailing.
7. Keep in mind that you can't sign your own petition form.
8. Please collect signatures by[ Congressional District.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GyTp8RellljGDiHOrgi8LzZiBRbq0rxvKJc1LCrcUiK9HdVri21f2VoeU6A_QvjAKaHYRVYPLKn09px203pD-Cu8nEx50OVIhSlWU2iaRhwn0OboBt_11MZcU8Cvz3Gb5v5di8alQ74TQF-2D1XU-RTx_tYEMGhKupvMakUMqYsFmR_zuyVBteTNsFaX70_Q4dGEqiWpDOE=&c=EQ4fU66Lek5YET20tupnJBO8xpefLMo7LmTQHBseTIPrWSLGXOrtUw==&ch=8rckBSvodO7iO__193K63xtQ_K80VXytIq_hJzaBcKSoLVKcNy1lVg==) One Congressional District per form. You can write the Congressional District in the upper right hand corner.
9. Get the petition notarized at your local bank for free.
10. Please send us the original, not a photocopy.
11. Drop the petition off in person to: 2023 Church Street, Appomattox, VA 24522
12. Or Fed Ex the petition to:

Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522
Please call us at 804 370 8727 or email me at amanda@chaseforva.com if you have any questions.
---
| Please click the button below to print your petitions today and start collecting signatures as you run your errands throughout your day.
---
| | [CHASE PETITION FORMS CLICK HERE](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GyTp8RellljGDiHOrgi8LzZiBRbq0rxvKJc1LCrcUiK9HdVri21f2ZNnCqngpA_S9OK_eeM3DjTJoTH2SViB3DwdT_rxTvj2iCJdRC04bHiOdxjjrCiZfcBnTG2lN_UfncSZ0bSArpCtonRwKfIZFddtQ-nE5lWR&c=EQ4fU66Lek5YET20tupnJBO8xpefLMo7LmTQHBseTIPrWSLGXOrtUw==&ch=8rckBSvodO7iO__193K63xtQ_K80VXytIq_hJzaBcKSoLVKcNy1lVg==)

| | [CLICK HERE TO FIND YOUR CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GyTp8RellljGDiHOrgi8LzZiBRbq0rxvKJc1LCrcUiK9HdVri21f2U7e9y67Nz5wKUO8G06nKGyMucEhZgr0CxDXI-OpKTZZD0TKrhvec0-GU1MFdJXZ9DfwiKZKQhyEW4yVH6zzww1p9PB1geABCPm-radrG9HU4j7gmbvEW853u3nSzHidKRYOqN_3fzGfrJLvVW9Zedc=&c=EQ4fU66Lek5YET20tupnJBO8xpefLMo7LmTQHBseTIPrWSLGXOrtUw==&ch=8rckBSvodO7iO__193K63xtQ_K80VXytIq_hJzaBcKSoLVKcNy1lVg==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# MAP OF CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS
---
| Adopt a Congressional District. We need 400 signatures in each of the 11 Congressional Districts. Please text or call 804 370 8727 and let us know where you are collecting signatures so I know where I need to focus our efforts.
Please be sure to collect signatures by Congressional District. If you aren't sure which Congressional District you live in, you can check the map below.
---
| |
---
| | [Click here to view the Congressional Map](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GyTp8RellljGDiHOrgi8LzZiBRbq0rxvKJc1LCrcUiK9HdVri21f2U3Mxodf6XPjAf6-l0k0Gpn4YopVibKbMYrqD0fuD4zcQNbRNCHUBiKg_VqQRInQoeAf54Zd3n94ggSNgqPFcPVK_k9aW4CDPVkIxaUWgbszevZRSCJs1WVihBD3-GcudvSn0KlKARzDtii6-64T_edokjoFurDWtjAJutC5GNOu25v4EoOSag4J2V4U2PFnphl0mn9Mn8wvsKYoOEHUfJJs5z2klB5rmIUGDDmdK9Az4vPpeLMyJCYMZL_Uv2PZcV-YJvEjXGXACcsCF-zzPGti5X3Z-GsMJIoMVBiB9QzvdsHPotd3yj8ACL333LiSPQ==&c=EQ4fU66Lek5YET20tupnJBO8xpefLMo7LmTQHBseTIPrWSLGXOrtUw==&ch=8rckBSvodO7iO__193K63xtQ_K80VXytIq_hJzaBcKSoLVKcNy1lVg==)
---
|
# IMPORTANT DATES
---
|
Petition Signatures due to State Board of Elections: Thursday, April 3, 2025, at 5pm (please get your forms to us ASAP)
Primary Date: Tuesday, June 17, 2025 General Election Date: Tuesday, November 4, 2025

---
|
# PLEASE GIVE GENEROUSLY
---
| Abigail Spanberger has raised over $15 million dollars for her campaign for governor, but the people are not with her. She's out of touch with most Virginians. And I'm not intimidated by her. Once people realize where she gets her money her campaign is going to implode.
Please give your best donation to help pay for gas to travel the state. Thankfully, many across the state already know me. So we don't have to spend as much as our opponents who have no statewide name ID.
Our campaign is run by volunteers not paid campaign staff and operatives. But we do have to pay event fees for gun shows, entrance to events and office supplies. Any contribution you can make is greatly appreciated.

Next Thursday, April 3 by 5pm we must turn in our signatures to the Virginia State Board of Elections. AND WE STILL NEED THOUSANDS OF SIGNATURES We are looking for volunteers to collect signatures at the Hampton Gun Show and just off the NASCAR property this weekend. Please call 804 370 8727 or email amanda@chaseforva.com if you can volunteer. Many of you want to help, but you just can't. Life happens. Anyone can get members of their household to sign a petition, get it notarized and Fed Ex it to our Appomattox campaign office. Just remember. You can't sign your own petition. Also, the petition must be notarized before you mail it in. We ALSO need committed volunteers going to busy shopping centers, church parking lots and anywhere there are many people gathered in line and waiting. Please do your part to ensure we collect enough signatures to make sure we cross the finish line when we hand in our petitions next Thursday, April 3 before 5pm. Please stop by the following locations to sign Amanda's petition: Thursday, March 27 Henrico GOP meeting 6:30-8:00 pm, Board of Supervisors Building, 4301 East Parham Road, Richmond, VA 23228, First Floor. Friday, March 28 Augusta County 8:00am-9:30am, City Elders Meeting, Common Ground, 15 Angela Court, Fishersville, VA 22939 THIS WEEKEND Please stop by the Hampton Gun Show this weekend to sign the petition to get my name on the ballot or drop off your notarized petitions. We will have a booth, so please drop by and pick up a free sweatshirt or t-shirt while supplies last. I plan to be there on Saturday from 9am to 3pm but we will have volunteers there the entire time. If you would like to volunteer, please give us call at 804 370-8727 or email amanda@chaseforva.com. Saturday, March 29-Sunday, March 30 Hampton Gun Show Hampton Roads Convention Center 1610 Coliseum Drive Hampton, VA 23666 Saturday 9-5pm Sunday 10-4pm If there are other large gatherings of 100 or more people, where we could collect signatures, please email us at amanda@chaseforva.com or call 804 370 8727. Sunday, March 30 Martinsville 3pm NASCAR Race, 340 Speedway Road, Ridgeway, VA 24148 * We need volunteers from 11am through 5pm. Monday, March 31 Fredericksburg Gourmeltz,10013 Patriot Hwy, Fredericksburg, VA 22407 Tuesday, April 1 Fauquier County 7pm-8:30pm, Fauquier County GOP, American Legion Post 72, 345 Legion Drive, Warrenton, VA Unable to attend? If you would like to sign my petition, but you are unable to attend one of these events, you can simply print off the petition, and get your family members to sign. Please print off the petition at that it is double sided and then collect signatures, but you can't sign your own petition, witness each signature, get it notarized and Fed Ex it to our Appomattox campaign office to: Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522 We still need all hands on deck. We still need to collect 400 in each Congressional District. So no matter where you live in the state, we need your help collecting signatures. Give us a call at 804 370 8727 and we will walk you through what to do, or you can read instructions below. Many of you are still collecting. Please go ahead and Fed Ex to us the ones that you have already signed in front of a notary, so our team can verify the signatures. It takes about 20 minutes to verify each petition. Then, please continue collecting. We must collect 10,000 valid signatures, 400 in each Congressional District, and as a campaign, turn the signatures into the State Board of Elections before Thursday, April 3 at 5pm. We would like to receive all forms before Monday, March 31, so that we can properly organize and vet the signatures before turning them in to the Virginia State Board of Elections. Currently, our campaign is 100 percent run by volunteers in each locality. We have no paid staff. The amazing organization you've seen from my campaign is all run by volunteers who want an American First Governor, who can beat Abigail Spanberger in November. In order for you to vote for me on June 17, please print off the attached petition and collect the signatures of your family, friends and neighbors, so that I can get on the ballot. WE CANNOT COLLECT SIGNATURES ONLINE. Signatures must be witnessed in person by signing an old fashioned paper petition ballot. Are you ready to say yes? Here's what you need to do: 1. Print off the attached form on one sheet of paper, front and back. Double sided only. 2. YOU cannot sign your own petition. Please sign someone else's petition. 3. Witness your friends, family and neighbors sign the petition form. 4. Please make sure they actually sign the form. 5. Please also make sure their writing is legible so that signatures can be verified. 6. You must also witness every signature and visit your local bank to have a notary sign off on your petition form before mailing. 7. Keep in mind that you can't sign your own petition form. 8. Please collect signatures by== One Congressional District per form. You can write the Congressional District in the upper right hand corner. 9. Get the petition notarized at your local bank for free. 10. Please send us the original, not a photocopy. 11. Drop the petition off in person to: 2023 Church Street, Appomattox, VA 24522 12. Or Fed Ex the petition to: Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522 Please call us at 804 370 8727 or email me at amanda@chaseforva.com if you have any questions. | Please click the button below to print your petitions today and start collecting signatures as you run your errands throughout your day. | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | MAP OF CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS | Adopt a Congressional District. We need 400 signatures in each of the 11 Congressional Districts. Please text or call 804 370 8727 and let us know where you are collecting signatures so I know where I need to focus our efforts. Please be sure to collect signatures by Congressional District. If you aren't sure which Congressional District you live in, you can check the map below. | | | | == | IMPORTANT DATES | Petition Signatures due to State Board of Elections: Thursday, April 3, 2025, at 5pm (please get your forms to us ASAP) Primary Date: Tuesday, June 17, 2025 General Election Date: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | PLEASE GIVE GENEROUSLY | Abigail Spanberger has raised over $15 million dollars for her campaign for governor, but the people are not with her. She's out of touch with most Virginians. And I'm not intimidated by her. Once people realize where she gets her money her campaign is going to implode. Please give your best donation to help pay for gas to travel the state. Thankfully, many across the state already know me. So we don't have to spend as much as our opponents who have no statewide name ID. Our campaign is run by volunteers not paid campaign staff and operatives. But we do have to pay event fees for gun shows, entrance to events and office supplies. Any contribution you can make is greatly appreciated. | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025 | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I refuse to let it all be for nothing
body:
April 1 could change everything...

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbj7r2gbdmjto7dso1mhfetbi86m0lpbtn2s0kpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1i60oj2cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from patriots like _YOU_ went into securing our Party’s historic victory this past November.
---
I even transferred $2,500,000 from my _own_ 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest.
---
_But now, our new majority is facing its biggest test yet...._
---
**On April 1, immediately following our _FIRST_ FEC-mandated deadline of 2025, TWO must-win special elections are being held in Florida.**
---
And here’s the real kicker, the Democrats see this as their opening to finally shut down President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)!
---
They’ve relentlessly attacked DOGE, even having a Biden-appointed judge issue a _“Temporary Restraining Order”_ against the department.
---
**_But legal warfare isn’t the Left’s only tactic to shut down DOGE... They’re raising a massive warchest to _FLIP_ these two House seats in the April 1 special elections._**
---
I’m not one to raise the alarm without reason, so please, trust me when I say __everything__ is now the line.
---
After having transferred the **$2.5 MILLION** from my own campaign last year, I REFUSE to let all our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
_That’s why I’m calling on**2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my commitment before the 3/31 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline with a contribution of any amount to help DEFEND our majority ahead of the April 1 special elections just DAYS from now._
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution before the end-of-quarter deadline to MATCH my commitment to DEFEND our new House majority that could soon fall to a mere TOSS-UP._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zma3oqge083ngt8pfh3ujmbj7sgtjfm1f4g1b6e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6c1i60oj2cdh2bs)

clean_body: April 1 could change everything... | Friend, Believe me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from patriots like YOU went into securing our Party’s historic victory this past November. I even transferred $2,500,000 from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest. But now, our new majority is facing its biggest test yet.... On April 1, immediately following our FIRST FEC-mandated deadline of 2025, TWO must-win special elections are being held in Florida. And here’s the real kicker, the Democrats see this as their opening to finally shut down President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)! They’ve relentlessly attacked DOGE, even having a Biden-appointed judge issue a “Temporary Restraining Order” against the department. But legal warfare isn’t the Left’s only tactic to shut down DOGE... They’re raising a massive warchest to FLIP these two House seats in the April 1 special elections. I’m not one to raise the alarm without reason, so please, trust me when I say everything is now the line. After having transferred the $2.5 MILLION from my own campaign last year, I REFUSE to let all our hard work be for nothing. That’s why I’m calling on2.5 million PATRIOTS to match my commitment before the 3/31 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline with a contribution of any amount to help DEFEND our majority ahead of the April 1 special elections just DAYS from now. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Elon Musk’s dirty trick - buy votes to sway FL-06 Special
body:
We’re hearing reports that Musk’s PAC is paying voters $100 to show up and vote Republican, the same dirty trick he pulled in the 2024 presidential race that gave Trump a critical boost.

Team,
Elon Musk is rushing to shore up our MAGA opponent in the FL06 special election -- committing millions to unplanned last-minute MASSIVE ad buys to rescue his floundering campaign after Steve Bannon warned they are losing.
But Musk isn't stopping there. We're hearing reports that Musk's PAC is paying voters $100 to show up and vote Republican, the same dirty trick he pulled in the 2024 presidential race that gave Trump a critical boost in the final month of the election.
And where Musk and Bannon lead, the rest of MAGA follows.

With only two states with Governors races in 2025, all eyes are on Jersey to see if we’ll stand up for Jersey Values, or let the far-right agenda win again.

As the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor, I will fight tooth and nail to deliver results, solve problems, and get things done for the people of our state, all while always protecting our Jersey Values.

**[Click here to help us meet our end-of-quarter goal and show off our grassroots momentum!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104533444/535678831/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250326_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzZmN2Y1ZC00OTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ARtZNkbeo8OO0vfs2iiM_4L6sIvGOxXeyR-NIjrjSeE=&emci=e0c903c9-8409-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5c6f7f5d-490a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246)**

Josh
|
* * *
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: BREAKING: In Major Upset, Democrat James Malone Wins Pennsylvania Senate Special Election in An R+23 District
body:
| | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=be96d821e3&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | **BREAKING: In Major Upset, Democrat James Malone Wins Pennsylvania Senate Special Election in An R+23 District**
---
| | | _Following Senator-elect James Malone’s shocking upset victory in the special election for Pennsylvania’s 36th Senate District,**DNC Chair Ken Martin released the following statement:**_
_“Congratulations to Senator-elect James Malone on his shocking, historic special election victory in Senate District 36. In a district that went to Trump by 15 in 2024 and has a 23-point Republican voter registration advantage, Malone’s victory is a loud and clear rebuke to Republicans’ threats to the programs Pennsylvania families rely on – from Social Security and Medicaid to our public schools. To protect working Americans, Democrats like Senator-elect Malone are competing everywhere, and in special elections throughout the country, we continue to overperform as voters join us in fighting back against the Trump-Musk agenda. This is a shockwave to the system and the way Republicans have run our government. Republicans everywhere should be afraid.”_
Democrats continue to win elections and overperform Republicans in 2025. Before tonight, in 11 of the 12 special elections this year, Democrats have overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket. Earlier this year, Democrats maintained control of the Virginia House of Delegates and Virginia Senate. In Iowa, Democrat Mike Zimmer flipped a district Trump won by 21 points, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 14 points while Democrat Nannette Griffin overperformed by 24 points. In March, Minnesota Dems held the Minnesota Senate and won a House seat.

The best barometer we have of voters’ feelings of the Trump-Musk administration is how they actually vote. Special elections so far in 2025 indicate that voters are fed up and already looking for change.

The next critical elections are in Wisconsin and Florida next week and the DNC is all hands on deck to build infrastructure everywhere we can.
---
| ###
---
|

**Trump 's righteous battle for healthcare pricing transparency** [](http://e.americanxt.com/c/eJyEksly4jwURp9G7P6UdDVZCy9MXEBIIIQhwL-hZA1gsMHYchrz9F1Jd6eqV70-39nce2zMFEglei4mkoFSUhDRO8SRNN6aiBFPmdBCOeMEB5y5iFhFhevlMWDgmIIgDGPCHxwRSjHlsFTKWqkQw7p0dW70-RYezKXsFfEhhArRBMEAwaDIz6fm4e8NgkGLYGCK3JwQHewComnEMkmoo4ITwzLstRfSgOUCe-BeawRiVyKaOg-GR1FkMs6ZJUJ7Dzbj0jmGhZb8c-cQTdV8Pk5Gj-1-nKwhomr6OLlks-RyY9zOFq_viyRcq_8Wb5tiI_A063y9dZN3I1OY9j_0cDUmULRQ3JN153bZsOva8eC6M-c6LLP8Pb1tz74LF0PTcraejGxij5G-665tlocuI_Q8o8fTEg9v5AXja0jJfWVEvlRktJlf63wnxXA-PWWJXxyXF3EZnV6Wu11_Gc7NW7Nd1WK0YtlmdbvPssV8dq9PUz-c-_7-Oa_49uVpjv8_nIrymTR4FMj1uf_arqlqx4FMJiO3qYrJple6oK0OOkayjwBK1zR6754sAvh6Dvz7koDgEQEEV1aFDt_uZwISs9-0qi9HZ8IfCEIq_osYXVY635-_PVARw0wimfbq2FY_8qLIGyERw_tS58VXPh8x_AwAAP__F5PQeQ "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi")Bobby Jindal and Charlie Katebi
---
During his first term, President Donald Trump made groundbreaking, bipartisan reforms to require hospitals to disclose their prices to the public. Unfortunately, most hospitals continue to withhold vital pricing information from patients. Now Trump is ordering federal agencies to strengthen these reforms. For decades, most hospitals hid the price of their healthcare services from patients looking for care. Without this information, patients had no idea how much their healthcare would cost until they received it. This lack of transparency foisted large and unexpected hospital bills on patients and often saddled them with crippling medical debt. In 2019, however, Trump decided to end this uncertainty and give patients control over their healthcare. That year, his administration implemented a policy that requires hospitals to publicly disclose the prices of 300 common, nonemergency services on their websites. These reforms promised to empower patients to comparison-shop for the best healthcare services at the most affordable price. Transparency revealed that some hospitals charge substantially higher prices than others in the same metropolitan area. Families can review the prices of multiple hospitals and choose the more affordable option. Health plans could also use publicly available prices to negotiate lower reimbursements on behalf of their members. ********[********Finish reading on WashintonExaminer.com********](http://e.americanxt.com/c/eJyEkklz4jgARn-NuJHSLuvAwcYxyySkCUtILpQsS7bifQEDv36qe2a6ak59ft87fS-ZUYmF5BMzQ4JiKQVHfJLNPI6YiEWcyEQgy72YWCux4Ip7lAtJJ26GIWaQYI4ohIg9GcSlpNJAIWWSCAkoVKXpnFbVbXjSdTkpZtkwNID4AEcAR4Wr8v7p_xuAowvAkS6czgGJzgMgoUdjgYghnCFNY2iV5ULjhHFoMbNKAczPJSChsVgzz_N0zBhNEFfW4iRmwhgKuRLs584AEsr397W_nF_Stf-BPSI389c6XnFyWPuXog7Eg4_tsqs9Pugmt4PRm5pejlkZ7Zn7mrbo7bk9P46q2Hc5P7d8o84bNY6vb3Bn6y4fP41BpF7M4Vb_WIdwkWIf-yH5toVo6LIdPtYXv_6QHv8qlDn0jKjz-CO97Stz64_vMRTfQU-2DStXpHL249SO-0Ob5Y_y3E2Hi9mKefgG18it1NLeXzK3Qyd8esmckfVivrzvF_DzVF3Hcoqm3bVZr-7v93MAj73w41ruVsfKvp7Ic23dxQQ927b1807nu63cX4OQFWnb6uX9xT2S1BymY1BssuAqHAqd-rLt93538xeLlOsobNbs5blvDl0bDA9maOatdghe68O0l-010NX2L48tpieZr_poG1VBy4saf07JpDSDStSgZkAEAOPS9L1KzSoBGP-KA__5SQzwHGA8mLIp1PDb_ZmggPRf2nT1t9HDfxBzIdk_RKuyUS6tfntYehRSAUQ46WZJM7qicD0XgMK0VK74le91hv8OAAD__3_V-lM)********

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: Governor Braun Signs Freedom and Opportunity Legislation to Support Hoosier Farmers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** March 26, 2025

**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:greid@indiana.gop "greid@indiana.gop")**

**Governor Braun Signs Freedom and Opportunity Legislation to Support Hoosier Farmers** **INDIANAPOLIS** – Fulfilling a key promise from his _Freedom and Opportunity Agenda_ , Governor Mike Braun signed House Enrolled Act (HEA) 1149 into law, taking a significant step to strengthen Indiana’s agricultural industry. The legislation directs the Indiana State Department of Agriculture (ISDA) to develop a centralized online portal to serve as a one-stop resource for Hoosier farmers. This new portal will streamline access to critical resources, including funding opportunities, market data, technical support, and regulatory information. It will deliver on Governor Braun’s pledge to cut red tape and empower Indiana’s farming community.

**“Governor Mike Braun campaigned on a clear vision to support Hoosier farmers—and today, he’s delivering,”** said Indiana GOP Chairwoman Lana Keesling.**“With the signing of HEA 1149, Indiana’s farmers will now have easier access to the tools they need to grow and succeed. Our agriculture community knows Governor Braun has always had their back, and this is just the beginning of what he will accomplish for rural Indiana.”**

HEA 1149 represents a cornerstone of the [Governor’s ](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/9R62UfQSEp-ZEsoTksGehAxW6ILf1ROFvGvXwdsP6M4AYda7vsJu3XjhIhV6Z_cxpkT7QKJ5CkvZntBj2p4rDoQJEWTMNBwXvDnlNQKj2xeyqfu8SziBQWpr6CzZ708Y6CkyeWUZqMY5OGUYkUNqVx6M2AAjX59AzTC4o2k066j0cB_br_8mCs8lRrbELkNQzx4kmlOdLe-IUgDRyVn7egsfXOQ2Eq9zd0I1yuw-XhZojOd0t18Um54_32jlKwVHQZK0QXVemdTww_asSo09P9yCyBa9nJ9Wkdov6xBKTmF2HvLgwtPuDj2OwpzAd3EWymlwGx5v3kd22s2JFDbCW-HNoa38/C66xCLWbiGBktL3TQVv2tRHBpch-LKNM/7 "https://mikebraunforindiana.com/freedom-and-opportunity-agenda-agriculture-and-rural-plan/")_[Freedom and Opportunity Agenda for Agriculture and Rural Indiana](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/XVDUHPkYSCHjxFZc-1MHUT7WIfjxyv8WgH7dh9p_Z56J-pMH8UmeSVoiSsc0XBm17Xr7XarI1AFcTOJ3rL5UTVUMzOaSD6NcEVr8oVERsSxDxxSaDaHq6Z4Vu28kzTPRGtNackQdMsjAkYFTUjb-o6-VRjhwSZa6u6_yfbq1N7TYin7QTaMK99WECMiaSiplL0tBcJLN9VqCnX_5NH26JlM4aMvZZqjMPQn1QCJuPA84-UjH07lfW08rzhi4dxeGLIkBXApYeWSO02HhIKx8eN_hKx2IajGpzo1HJMtVIu47ZwFFOJloWHz6u1k16jL-_88-Jgu7EzyEyyXcrcYA6mGwOusn/QkjJ5c5t38dYgTeJ6BwuiaXvvNmouctj/7 "https://mikebraunforindiana.com/freedom-and-opportunity-agenda-agriculture-and-rural-plan/")_. ###

clean_body: | | | | | For Immediate Release: March 26, 2025 Contact: Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, mailto:greid@indiana.gop "greid@indiana.gop" Governor Braun Signs Freedom and Opportunity Legislation to Support Hoosier Farmers INDIANAPOLIS – Fulfilling a key promise from his Freedom and Opportunity Agenda , Governor Mike Braun signed House Enrolled Act (HEA) 1149 into law, taking a significant step to strengthen Indiana’s agricultural industry. The legislation directs the Indiana State Department of Agriculture (ISDA) to develop a centralized online portal to serve as a one-stop resource for Hoosier farmers. This new portal will streamline access to critical resources, including funding opportunities, market data, technical support, and regulatory information. It will deliver on Governor Braun’s pledge to cut red tape and empower Indiana’s farming community. “Governor Mike Braun campaigned on a clear vision to support Hoosier farmers—and today, he’s delivering,” said Indiana GOP Chairwoman Lana Keesling.“With the signing of HEA 1149, Indiana’s farmers will now have easier access to the tools they need to grow and succeed. Our agriculture community knows Governor Braun has always had their back, and this is just the beginning of what he will accomplish for rural Indiana.” HEA 1149 represents a cornerstone of the "" "". ### | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: The study of God
body:
What is our purpose?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=754cc60887a5465eaa377cd6d3585543&_e=ZY89hnq0Usuh1WcQZODRtRXMyPGaK-gUJ4eZ8_NF-4o1n6mWNN6zxTMA4pfMC2xMGZHAqgma5FkuFphH5UnTYhqbD1-7mbrZDIAQK2hrlALpfjbioh_d0cMvFK_rJegtMuLdy56kphlIKDdIJvfvOBfKM2cU1k0_5eHeBdgm89sGQKAl5zDr6E_1SRax5i4SFJ479HslKEP9ihln5kKxTSLa0U3cKPu2tg6yxRRXlsMsT-sk6D1hhTRAPL6mwL0wA8CUh83ePWiu_BfbWnTWdL2NW_U5g0uiDLEMydUMhRs2VZEjM8mYIImjJp-IlbUZncwhNAoqUy3gZKhml8Qlb7hmcEny5W1VX3wsZz7Iwt4Tb8D7IvXPd7ypZxZSJqHOg-fHPslYaJI2JhFYVgSVblM8Qp8aZmrU3Be-MTWUuQQvFnFaOXXPjnDMnFrwzGiNjgknpMollmLSH6mFUwV6PQ%3D%3D) Peter, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=754cc60887a5465eaa377cd6d3585543&_e=ZY89hnq0Usuh1WcQZODRtRXMyPGaK-gUJ4eZ8_NF-4o1n6mWNN6zxTMA4pfMC2xMGZHAqgma5FkuFphH5UnTYhqbD1-7mbrZDIAQK2hrlALpfjbioh_d0cMvFK_rJegtMuLdy56kphlIKDdIJvfvOBfKM2cU1k0_5eHeBdgm89sGQKAl5zDr6E_1SRax5i4SFJ479HslKEP9ihln5kKxTSLa0U3cKPu2tg6yxRRXlsMsT-sk6D1hhTRAPL6mwL0wA8CUh83ePWiu_BfbWnTWdL2NW_U5g0uiDLEMydUMhRsR5P3BcsYewWs2L-Pq_aYOI5PGg-JkLy1PnCpq-r8BrGUheAA32gUu9JiLPXpK6eurZ8qH1R0DAYDkcbXtUaNsVVzGYRUGmJjSKgd-p5qTyv_scimQyCHNbY9nvh86TZkA6Z9lpzG8csxcp4aVLQPwn1r1qzWkUourdbW3CIfyTg%3D%3D) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=754cc60887a5465eaa377cd6d3585543&_e=ZY89hnq0Usuh1WcQZODRtRXMyPGaK-gUJ4eZ8_NF-4o1n6mWNN6zxTMA4pfMC2xMGZHAqgma5FkuFphH5UnTYhqbD1-7mbrZDIAQK2hrlALpfjbioh_d0cMvFK_rJegtMuLdy56kphlIKDdIJvfvOBfKM2cU1k0_5eHeBdgm89sGQKAl5zDr6E_1SRax5i4SFJ479HslKEP9ihln5kKxTSLa0U3cKPu2tg6yxRRXlsMsT-sk6D1hhTRAPL6mwL0wA8CUh83ePWiu_BfbWnTWdL2NW_U5g0uiDLEMydUMhRtdVU1gXOpy6hAjqZAiol_r0fG70cdR-QVgbBGQCF4KGaDELh46JIJgLPXAQXKeOPrFVphAr_aiUHh_3LXHDwVNika_5nadOHuHNjXzHBU5Wos3jZ4IVfX0LVZL0KQttd4d9xhLT8QdbQ8D1nmJADOfI6K7ZHeiITIe38AYv2vtZw%3D%3D). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=754cc60887a5465eaa377cd6d3585543&_e=ZY89hnq0Usuh1WcQZODRtRXMyPGaK-gUJ4eZ8_NF-4o1n6mWNN6zxTMA4pfMC2xMGZHAqgma5FkuFphH5UnTYhqbD1-7mbrZDIAQK2hrlALpfjbioh_d0cMvFK_rJegtMuLdy56kphlIKDdIJvfvOBfKM2cU1k0_5eHeBdgm89sGQKAl5zDr6E_1SRax5i4SFJ479HslKEP9ihln5kKxTSLa0U3cKPu2tg6yxRRXlsMsT-sk6D1hhTRAPL6mwL0wA8CUh83ePWiu_BfbWnTWdL2NW_U5g0uiDLEMydUMhRuHuyQhxzqG5QIrsS8vhFDd5r2puoG-EZTIr8_5FmeI4ZagRNodZGzR4kqh7R-tqcIjIf7VCU2DSG2RZMv9SFTAPgF8B_5YdYUn3cx4YrdaHWZnT4r40hxvpLS961ziguYwQYbSERDIqEsj9uIO2yQ_Bpcr1ce_dgjJdtDh3o28yQ%3D%3D)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| **Fellow Concerned American:** Stocks are tanking. Layoffs are increasing.
# Don’t be like the Fed; avoid mistakes
President Trump warned Americans to prepare for the volatility of the market for the foreseeable future. He also told the Fed to lower rates, but they ignored them. **Don’t be like the Fed.** Many Americans are now suffering from market “uncertainty,” but there’s still time for you to avoid the same fate.
### [Now it’s your chance to own gold now... or chase it later at a higher cost to you.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ae6K/?__vbtrk=MjgyMDM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgyMDM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
On April 2nd, more tariffs will be enacted, and no one knows what we can expect, and you can’t afford to be a victim. Gold prices are already skyrocketing, and you should not wait any longer if you want to safeguard your investments and retirement portfolio Without gold in your portfolio, your wealth is at risk of being caught in any potential downturn and history has proven that it’s one of the best ways individuals and nations to protect themselves.
### In fact, President Trump said:
"“Bringing back the gold standard would be very hard to do, but boy, would it be wonderful. We’d have a standard on which to base our money.”" Gold has held its worth for centuries and the more our governments spends, the less valuable paper money is becoming, which is another reason you can’t wait.
### [Don’t ignore President Trump. Learn how to avoid the pitfalls TODAY!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ae6K/?__vbtrk=MjgyMDM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgyMDM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Reagan Gold Group is here to prevent you from being caught flat-footed by market volatility, provide guidance on how to protect your retirement and to secure your purchasing power. **No one can predict the future, but owning physical gold is a great way to safeguard your portfolio against war, inflation, the Fed and general market changes.** Even better, you don’t have to be Elon Musk to understand or benefit from it.
### [Get your custom consultation today at no-cost to you and kickstart your journey!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/ae6K/?__vbtrk=MjgyMDM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgyMDM4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

subject: Truth, safety, and doing what’s right

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104536819/535688726/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQwNzc3NC00YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWie8xD_FuMsgwhKE2BrFaZ7xFCE3uvoUwG30FDPb5k=)
Peter, folks love to ask me: _**“Eric, what was your inspiration for becoming a meteorologist?”**_ The truth is, I love chasing tornadoes and lightning now. But when I was younger, I was _terrified_ of storms. I remember being nine watching the Delta Air Lines Flight 191 plane crash on the news and feeling so unsettled. **But I had a saving grace: my local weatherman, “TV Eric.”** Yes, he also happened to be named Eric, and he explained what was happening and helped me feel safe during scary moments. I also remember Eric making it clear that our technology to detect these disasters was not up to standard. I became a meteorologist to help people feel safe. **I just never imagined that decades later we’d be dealing with the same issues with our detection capabilities not being up to snuff. But that’s exactly where things stand under this administration.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104536820/535688727/1514584251?refcode=em-3.25.25-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQwNzc3NC00YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWie8xD_FuMsgwhKE2BrFaZ7xFCE3uvoUwG30FDPb5k=) We need to be clear here: Trump’s cuts to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) are an attack on science, an attack on truth, and represent a silencing of voices dedicated to making us not just feel safe but actually _be_ safe. I can rage about how “young Eric” would’ve reacted to this news, but anger alone won’t solve this moment. We need to keep up the pressure and fight every day – in and outside of Congress -- for truth, safety, and what’s right. **And we absolutely have to flip the House, secure a majority, and protect our safety and act on climate.** [**With our end of quarter deadline less than a week away, we have the opportunity to publicly demonstrate our strength. Please contribute now. Every dollar helps build our storm larger.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104536821/535688728/1514584251?refcode=em-3.25.25-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQwNzc3NC00YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWie8xD_FuMsgwhKE2BrFaZ7xFCE3uvoUwG30FDPb5k=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104536822/535688729/1514584251?refcode=em-3.25.25-all-2-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQwNzc3NC00YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWie8xD_FuMsgwhKE2BrFaZ7xFCE3uvoUwG30FDPb5k=)
