Team — if we’re serious about taking back the Senate and holding Donald Trump and his extremist allies accountable, **_then we need to flip North Carolina blue._** **[Can you pitch in $10 to help us defeat Republicans like Thom Tillis and chip away at the GOP’s Senate majority? Our work to win big in the 2026 midterms starts right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104553330/535728241/-749840228?amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC30_20250326_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDMyMWYzMi02MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8gIYG6keRboARWJhIMDR2a_H4Zl1bzlWIRsweDhpzA=)** | [FLIP THE SENATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104553331/535728323/-714709553?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC30_20250326_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDMyMWYzMi02MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8gIYG6keRboARWJhIMDR2a_H4Zl1bzlWIRsweDhpzA=)

Republican Senator Thom Tillis won by less than 2 percentage points in the last election. That’s a razor-thin margin.
Now with him back on the ballot in 2026, this race is set to be one of the most competitive in the entire country.
But we can’t afford to wait. North Carolina is a battleground, and the GOP is already gearing up to defend Tillis’ seat. We need to build a strong grassroots-powered movement to reach voters across North Carolina, fend off Republican attacks, and make sure a Democrat can defeat Thom Tillis.

subject: Bernie's largest rally ever is about what we do next:

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&refcode=email-20250326_v&akid=7935%2E5885482%2EOwj39U ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — in the
last few days, Bernie and AOC blew expectations out of the water with
RECORD crowds in strategic swing districts. Bernie’s Fight Oligarchy tour
is channeling the rage against Trump-Musk AND the inaction of the
Democratic Party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23011?t=1060&akid=7935%2E5885482%2EOwj39U ][IMG]

One of the top priorities at Our Revolution, which Bernie founded back in
2016, is to elect progressive champions to every level of government. It’s
never been more clear that we need to build power from the bottom up. We
need city council members, state legislators, members of Congress and more
who will actually step up and fight back against Trump’s Oligarchy and
Musk’s destruction of the government.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250326nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7935%2E5885482%2EOwj39U ]Right now, we're fighting off Musk’s attempt to buy a seat on the
Wisconsin Supreme Court and turning the energy behind Bernie’s rallies
into electing progressives all across the country. Every dollar you donate
helps us make 3 calls and 3 texts to turn out progressive voters — can you
chip in today?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

“We need progressives to run for office at all levels,” Bernie said. Our
Revolution has helped elect over 1,000 progressives up and down the
ballot. And we’re ready to harness the growing energy behind AOC and
Bernie to elect more progressives — and quickly.

While we’re taking on Musk in Wisconsin, we’re also endorsing local
candidates across the Midwest and beyond. More endorsements are coming —
and laying the critical groundwork to elect progressives this year, in
2026, and beyond will take a tremendous amount of grassroots support.

dollar helps us mobilize our movement and contact more voters.

When we organize, we win.

Derek, Just this week, Glenn Youngkin vetoed a bipartisan bill that would have created an insurance fund to provide paid medical and family leave for _millions_ of Virginians. If that weren’t enough, **he also vetoed a bill to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour** — blocking a long-overdue raise for _over 365,000 workers._ **This is the MAGA playbook in action: protect wealthy donors, hurt working families, and sabotage common-sense progress at every turn.** This is what we’re up against in Virginia, and it’s exactly why we must win this November. [_**If you’re ready to kick special interests and far-right extremism out of the Governor’s Mansion, rush a donation to help us build a winning campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104554810/535733027/-633261813?&refcode=E12728-20250325-YoungkinVetoes-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUxZTRkOC02MzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iI5k11huDGMG1EBOYdOJAjW4q45jw91ZH4xpi5j-3c=) | **************[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104554813/535733030/-633261813?&refcode=E12728-20250325-YoungkinVetoes-SB-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUxZTRkOC02MzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iI5k11huDGMG1EBOYdOJAjW4q45jw91ZH4xpi5j-3c=)**************

clean_body: And one to raise wages. This is the MAGA agenda in action. | Derek, Just this week, Glenn Youngkin vetoed a bipartisan bill that would have created an insurance fund to provide paid medical and family leave for millions of Virginians. If that weren’t enough, he also vetoed a bill to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour — blocking a long-overdue raise for over 365,000 workers. This is the MAGA playbook in action: protect wealthy donors, hurt working families, and sabotage common-sense progress at every turn. This is what we’re up against in Virginia, and it’s exactly why we must win this November. = | ************=********** Youngkin is laying the groundwork for a far-right successor to take the Governorship. But if we organize, fundraise, and fight back, we can put a hard stop to those ambitions. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Incompetence? Arrogance? I say both.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8395%2E5257348%2EJHHyp2)
Top Trump officials exchanged sensitive national security information about a military operation _in an unsecured Signal message group chat_ _, Derek_ _. Where a reporter was mistakenly added to the thread._
Apparently, that’s where our country’s leaders and policy advisors are sharing sensitive information about ongoing military operations — on a commercially available app.
**As the former Chair of the Intelligence Committee, it is hard for me to describe what a colossal f*ck up this is, but the implications of this are deadly serious.**
This breach could have put our pilots at risk and could have cost lives, not to mention compromised the success of the mission — which involved going after Houthi targets in Yemen.
The willingness of top Trump officials to message about military operations demonstrates both a kind of dangerous incompetence and arrogance.
They think they’re above the law. They’ve done away with FBI background checks for top people and standard safety measures to keep our intel out of the wrong hands.
Conversations that should happen in the Situation Room shouldn’t be happening on an insecure group chat.
**We cannot let them get away with this.**
Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth should quit or be fired. And the same is true for Tulsi Gabbard and John Ratcliffe — top intelligence officials who participated in this fiasco and cannot be trusted to handle classified or sensitive national security information.
What’s more, Steve Witkoff, the President’s envoy to Russia, may have been texting while he was in Russia and could literally have been at the Kremlin at the time. He should be fired for his gross negligence. This is apparently what happens when you put a real estate developer in the role of envoy (or president for that matter).
[**If you support these dismissals and want to see accountability from the Trump administration, add your name alongside mine today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20250326-signal-hegseth-resign-petition/?t=4&akid=8395%2E5257348%2EJHHyp2)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20250326-signal-hegseth-resign-petition/?t=5&akid=8395%2E5257348%2EJHHyp2)
---
Derek, this level of incompetence is dangerous, and there must be consequences for this massive breach of security from the Trump administration.
More soon,
Adam

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: Trump will regret this, I’ll make sure of it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Shutting down the Department of Education is only Donald Trump’s latest attack on American families.
He’ll regret picking this fight.
We aren’t going to stand idly by as Trump guts public education.
Eliminating the Department of Education would mean larger class sizes, fewer special education programs, and a higher cost of college tuition. It would also mean less support for teachers and fewer opportunities for our kids. Working families would suffer while the billionaire class would opt to send their kids to private school.
And the reason the Trump administration is gutting these programs? They want to give billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy who fund GOP campaigns.
It doesn’t matter how much we set aside for children and schools—far-right Republicans will always think it is too much. Our families and communities will always come second to keeping their donors happy.
My colleagues and I have already put in motion legal proceedings to protect the Department of Education, but this won’t be a quick fight.
And while I’m confident we will win in court, we need to elect stronger voices in Congress to call out Trump.
Every dollar you contribute helps me fight back against Trump and grow our coalition. Can I count on your support before my campaign’s end-of-quarter deadline in 5 days? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q1?refcode=X_250326_EOQ1_act]

Peter, Elon Musk has been unlawfully handed sweeping authority over dozens of federal agencies – without even being elected by the American people.

And the consequences have been catastrophic:
* He is replacing public servants with loyalists who cater to him and this administration.

* He is planning to drastically cut Social Security and Medicare.

* And he’s trying to dismantle agencies that oppose his extreme agenda.

He has managed to wreak havoc on our government in just over two months.
**Musk has made it clear: He’s not just advising; he’s actively dismantling government institutions to consolidate power.**
Attorney General Letitia James has never backed down from holding billionaires accountable when they overstep the law – and as Musk continues to abuse his power, she's prepared to fight back.

**But she needs to know that you're standing with her in this fight. ****We're calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to weigh in on our urgent flash poll before midnight – including you, Peter. So tell us:**

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=446d7f98b0&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| We’re excited to invite you to the **Autism Health Summit** , hosted by Autism Health Inc., a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to improving the lives of individuals and families affected by autism. This transformative event will take place from **April 11-13, 2025, at the beautiful Town and Country Resort in sunny San Diego, CA.** Join us for an incredible weekend filled with knowledge, inspiration, and community. The Autism Health Summit will feature a lineup of renowned speakers who are leaders in autism health and wellness, including **Dr. Peter McCullough, Del Bigtree, Dr. Sabine Hazan, Dr. Brian Hooker, Dr. Dayan Goodenowe****, and enjoy special performances by DPAK and multi-platinum artist Geoff Sewell.** Whether you're a parent, practitioner, or advocate, this event offers something for everyone. We believe that access to valuable resources and education should be available to all. That’s why **Scholarships** are available for low-income families who wish to attend. If you or someone you know qualifies, just fill out the online application [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5b733ef230&e=3a42edfdc4). Take advantage of our special offer: **Save $50** on your ticket with promo code **AHS50** at checkout. Don’t wait... this exclusive discount won’t last long, and ticket prices will go up soon. This is your opportunity to gain valuable insights, connect with like-minded individuals, and leave feeling empowered and hopeful for the future. And with San Diego’s beautiful weather and the stunning Town and Country Resort as our host venue, you’ll enjoy not just the event, but also the vibrant surroundings. **Discounted Room Rate Ends This Friday. Click [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=c8df8880a5&e=3a42edfdc4) to book your room.** **Continuing Medical Education (CME)** are available! Just register under the Professional Track to receive 14 CME credits for medical professionals. Secure your spot today! Click [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6e18894785&e=3a42edfdc4) to buy your tickets now and join us for a weekend of learning, growth, and inspiration. We look forward to welcoming you this April! Warm regards,
The Autism Health Team
**Autism Health Inc.**
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=28ab507a4c&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")

---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---

name: Jay Jones HQ
subject: Running out of time
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]
We're running out of time, folks.
With our first end-of-quarter deadline less than a week away, we set up an ambitious $25,000 goal to defeat MAGA extremist Jason Miyares and elect Jay Jones as Attorney General of Virginia. Our team can't afford to lose momentum right now – especially not with MAGA extremists working overtime to overhaul our country.
If you have a moment, can you please contribute $25 to help us elect Jay Jones and meet this critical fundraising goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]
When Jay decided to run for Attorney General, he had one goal in mind: building a better future for Virginia families. This means he's fighting for:
🔵 Every community to feel safe by standing up for their rights
🔵 Every child to have the opportunity to thrive with better education and healthcare
🔵 Every Virginian to participate in our democracy by fighting for equal access to the ballot
This is why we need to support Jay Jones and flip this seat blue in November. It's critical that we reach voters across the commonwealth, but we can't make that happen if we fall behind on our first end-of-quarter deadline of 2025.
That's why we're asking for your help today, team. Can you please contribute $25 or more to help us have the resources to fight for Virginia's future? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: [URGENT] We’re losing momentum
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

President Trump and Republicans up and down the ballot delivered an embarrassing blow to the Left back in November.

But now that we are wrapping up the first quarter of 2025, Democrats aren’t licking their wounds any longer, they are motivated and fired up with recent polling showing them with a 1-point advantage in congressional polls.

Not only do they now lead in the polls, but Hakeem Jeffries and the DCCC just out-raised House Republicans and even both Senate committees!

Unfortunately this couldn’t have happened at a worse possible time, because with the first FEC-mandated End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline of 2025 just days away, I’m still significantly behind.

I need your help Peter if I’m going to catch up and hit my goal and stop the Left’s momentum before it's too late.

[Please make a contribution before the1st End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline of 2025 so that we can take back the momentum and finish the job we started.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE >> $25](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $50](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $75](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $100](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $250](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=other)

I’ve got to be honest Peter, Republicans have been working hard to deliver on President Trump’s promises, but it has just been getting Democrats more and more motivated.

Just weeks ago the Left seemed disoriented, rudderless, and lost. Now the DCCC is outraising all of the “big committees” on both sides of the isle. That is unheard of!

As a Navy SEAL I know what it is like to be outnumbered and outgunned by the opposition force.

We don’t have to match the Left dollar-for-dollar. We just have to stay close enough to be able to fight back and not let their lying attacks take hold.

To win this fight, we have to be able to defend ourselves, and that is where you come into play.

I can’t go it alone. I need conservative patriots like you fighting by my side. Can I count on you at such an all-important moment in time?

[Please make a contribution before the1st End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline of 2025 so that I can defend myself against the extremists on the Left and the coming endless barrage of attacks.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

In Service,

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/end-of-quarter-deadline-/?utm_campaign=20250326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

[Twitter](https://twitter.com/DanCrenshawTX)
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JQ9HXKTRVJN3F9XY1JCBBX3Q&r=01JQ9Q6E3P7BQ67H038RGVH54S).
Team Crenshaw 5900 Memorial Drive Suite 215 Houston, Texas 77007

name: Heather (VPP)
subject: Was this intentional?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We want to make sure that loyal Democrats like you haven’t thrown in the towel in the race to flip the House and end Trump’s MAGA trifecta...
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project.

I noticed that last month you started the process of confirming your 2025 Special Election Membership to take back the House and save our Democracy from MAGA extremism... __but you never finished.__

We want to make sure that loyal Democrats like you haven’t thrown in the towel in the race to flip the House and end Trump’s MAGA trifecta, _and we’re just 18 memberships short of our must-hit goal!_

**Special Election Memberships give us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with — it’s that simple.**

[**With Florida’s 2 Special Elections in just 6 days, we need all the help we can get. Will you finish the 2025 Special Election Membership you previously started so we can flip 3 seats, take back the House, and end Trump’s trifecta? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88347?t=6&akid=19362%2E878179%2EQphVYF) | [STOP TRUMP: RUSH $7 TO CONFIRM YOUR 2025 SPECIAL ELECTION MEMBERSHIP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88347?t=7&akid=19362%2E878179%2EQphVYF)

Thank you for doing your part!

– Heather
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19362%2E878179%2EQphVYF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19362%2E878179%2EQphVYF).**

### **BREAKING: Pete Hegseth: When You Accidentally Confess to a Crime on National TV & Are Exposes Lying About Texts**
In a plot twist no one asked for but everyone expected, Fox News' favorite glassy-eyed frat bro, **Pete Hegseth** , tried to _defend_ Donald Trump over the leaked Yemen war plans--_and in the process, basically confirmed the whole thing._ Moron.
In this latest episode of _" Fox & Friends & Felonies,"_ Pete Hegseth went on the tv machine at his old stomping grounds--by which I mean the place where he cheated on his wife to provide the gift of a baby to his producer, went live with a blood-alcohol level marked "Casamigos" (before deporting it) and bragged he washed his hands as often as Pinochet...who's been dead since 2006.
Yep, ole Petey boy defended Trump's merry band of national security clowns and ended up confirming what the rest of us already knew: **They 're as competent as toddlers with some blow and a blowtorch.**
Hegseth insisted that the leaked **Yemen attack plans** couldn't be real because, _and I swear I 'm not making this s*t up_, **" nobody was texting."** Unfortunately for Pete, those plans _were_ shared over **Signal** , the encrypted messaging app, and someone accidentally added a **reporter** to their little jingoistic circle jerk.
**And this morning, in response to Hegseth 's LIES about the contents of the texts, the reporter shared them. Here are the worst ones. Like where absolute, crackbrained dingbat, Hegseth, shares OPERATIONAL PLANS FOR AN ATTACK:**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c24ef37-24e0-4291-b61c-7234164c8457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yep, he dropped actual war plans into a chat thread like it was fantasy football trash talk. _Again, just the dumbest, stupidest f*king people in the world._ Pete Hegseth is such a cerebrally-clotted clodpole, he makes Lauren Boebert seem like Stephen Hawking.
But, wait, there's more. **See where JD Vance says it 's not worth attacking because Vance is a Putin suckle who doesn't want to help Europe--ya know, our allies--who'd benefit more from an attack (they use the canal we'd be protecting for trade more than we do).** This further exposes Vance as the amoral, soulless a*hole he is. A pile of yak dung that somehow developed the ability to speak (barely). Here you go:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f249d982-cdcc-4a79-bebf-81995ed70339?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With respect to Hegseth, it's not like fierce Democrat, Tammy Duckworth (who would be considered forthwith for Democratic leader in a sane world), didn't have this one figured out long ago. Watch her torching of Hegseth in his hearing, below:...

Can't you see this is a land of confusion? - Genesis | | | Mar 26| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | A DAVID SHUSTER VIDEO, EXCLUSIVELY FOR YOU! Hey Amplifyers! For those who haven't yet taken advantage of our discounted-paid subscription--only $1.25 per week /$50 per year--I want you to to get a taste of videos you'll get each week from hilarious, Emmy-Award-winner, David Shuster. So this is above the paywall, but will be back below next week. Please consider becoming a paid subscriber --for only $1.25 per week you'll help us fight for democracy while being entertained. With no further ado, David's video! | | ---|---|--- BREAKING: Pete Hegseth: When You Accidentally Confess to a Crime on National TV & Are Exposes Lying About Texts In a plot twist no one asked for but everyone expected, Fox News' favorite glassy-eyed frat bro, Pete Hegseth , tried to defend Donald Trump over the leaked Yemen war plans--and in the process, basically confirmed the whole thing. Moron. In this latest episode of " Fox & Friends & Felonies," Pete Hegseth went on the tv machine at his old stomping grounds--by which I mean the place where he cheated on his wife to provide the gift of a baby to his producer, went live with a blood-alcohol level marked "Casamigos" (before deporting it) and bragged he washed his hands as often as Pinochet...who's been dead since 2006. Yep, ole Petey boy defended Trump's merry band of national security clowns and ended up confirming what the rest of us already knew: They 're as competent as toddlers with some blow and a blowtorch. Hegseth insisted that the leaked Yemen attack plans couldn't be real because, and I swear I 'm not making this st up, " nobody was texting." Unfortunately for Pete, those plans were shared over Signal , the encrypted messaging app, and someone accidentally added a reporter to their little jingoistic circle jerk. And this morning, in response to Hegseth 's LIES about the contents of the texts, the reporter shared them. Here are the worst ones. Like where absolute, crackbrained dingbat, Hegseth, shares OPERATIONAL PLANS FOR AN ATTACK: | | ---|---|--- Yep, he dropped actual war plans into a chat thread like it was fantasy football trash talk. Again, just the dumbest, stupidest fking people in the world. Pete Hegseth is such a cerebrally-clotted clodpole, he makes Lauren Boebert seem like Stephen Hawking. But, wait, there's more. See where JD Vance says it 's not worth attacking because Vance is a Putin suckle who doesn't want to help Europe--ya know, our allies--who'd benefit more from an attack (they use the canal we'd be protecting for trade more than we do). This further exposes Vance as the amoral, soulless ahole he is. A pile of yak dung that somehow developed the ability to speak (barely). Here you go: | | ---|---|--- With respect to Hegseth, it's not like fierce Democrat, Tammy Duckworth (who would be considered forthwith for Democratic leader in a sane world), didn't have this one figured out long ago. We’re bumping Ami’s message back to the top of your inbox — because this story isn’t going away, and neither is the danger.

**A top Trump official accidentally texted classified U.S. war plans to a journalist.** And the Republican-led House? They’ve done absolutely nothing.

Speaker Mike Johnson called it an “inadvertent” mistake. No subpoenas. No investigation. No accountability.

**If Democrats held the majority, we’d already be holding hearings.** That’s why Ami is fighting every day to flip the House and restore real oversight.

But right now, we’re up against a critical **end-of-quarter fundraising deadline** — and we need your help to stay on track.

_**Begin Forwarded Message:**_
* * *
Peter,

As a doctor, I was trained to take every mistake seriously — because lives depend on it. That’s why what I’m about to share with you should alarm every American, regardless of party.

Senior Trump Administration officials **accidentally texted a journalist our war plans**. The quote from the journalist says it all:
_“I had very strong doubts that this text group was real, because I could not believe that the national-security leadership of the United States would communicate on Signal about imminent war plans.”_
This wasn’t just a slip-up. It was a staggering breach of classified information — sent through an unsecured Signal group chat that included an individual who never should have had access.

This is the kind of recklessness that puts American servicemembers at risk.

And yet — the Republican-controlled House refuses to investigate. Speaker Mike Johnson called it an “inadvertent” mistake, then said the Trump administration would “handle it internally.” That’s it.

**No subpoenas. No oversight. No accountability.**

Let me be clear: **if Democrats held the majority, we would already be investigating.** We would demand answers. And we would take action to prevent this from ever happening again. But we need your help to make that possible.

**[Can you chip in $15 or more today to help Democrats flip the House and hold those responsible for this breach accountable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104557437/535740389/1883708398?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250326_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FjN2FlZC02ODBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKrlIQMe4ssSo8LHWl8HkvfLqIdF-y_Lz8n8woaOj-Y=)**

Peter, Elon Musk, the richest man in the world, wants to eliminate Social Security and Medicare under the guise of government efficiency. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104557794/535741633/2092425769?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250326_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGNlNTk0YS02YTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNRlwCSvxrT1nztSpc8P5iyk7r7r5KJfTl7SlNJFyvs=&emci=0a2b5f44-6a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7dce594a-6a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=28008880) **No way.** Peter, elon Musk doesn’t care _one bit_ about making the government run more efficiently. **He just wants to pay for HIS tax cuts with YOUR Social Security and Medicare benefits.** Every day, millions of Americans pay into Social Security and Medicare with their hard-earned money — and they deserve to know that their benefits will be there for them without worrying that the wealthiest man in the world will steal what they’ve earned to make himself richer. As a member of Congress, protecting your hard-earned benefits was one of Wiley’s top priorities. clean_body: Do you agree that Americans should be able to keep their hard-earned Social Security and Medicare benefits? | = Peter, Elon Musk, the richest man in the world, wants to eliminate Social Security and Medicare under the guise of government efficiency. No way. Peter, elon Musk doesn’t care one bit about making the government run more efficiently. He just wants to pay for HIS tax cuts with YOUR Social Security and Medicare benefits. Every day, millions of Americans pay into Social Security and Medicare with their hard-earned money — and they deserve to know that their benefits will be there for them without worrying that the wealthiest man in the world will steal what they’ve earned to make himself richer. As a member of Congress, protecting your hard-earned benefits was one of Wiley’s top priorities. Now, he’s working to support Democrats across North Carolina who will stand up to Elon Musk and fight for Social Security and Medicare. | Thanks for standing with Wiley. Together, we will fight to protect the benefits that hardworking North Carolinians have earned. — Team Wiley North Carolina Democrats won multiple key statewide races in 2024, and in 2026, we can help stymie Trump’s agenda by taking back the Senate and House. If you’re looking for a way to make a difference right now, please consider chipping in to prepare for the fights ahead. = = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

name: USAF/ANG Combat Veteran Troy Downing
subject: I'm about to throw in the towel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m no stranger to pulling myself up by the bootstraps, but I need your help.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMyNl81OS1IRS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTg3NjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMjZfNTktSEUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE4NzY4LTI4OTkifQ/BLZmvSsMx09gbk9EtPK8fA)
---
Peter, I'm about to throw in the towel.

I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me. But the response has been deafening silence.

My name is Troy Downing, and I'm a combat veteran, a Christian, a husband, and a proud dad. I'm also a GOP freshman on a mission to put America First.

**As you know, House Republicans are clinging to a razor-thin majority - just a handful of seats stand between us and the radical Left taking control. And the Democrats will stop at nothing to flip it.**

I have to face the facts: My first major End-of-Quarter deadline is at the end of this month, and this may be our final shot to get back on track before our fundraising numbers go public.

I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. **[**I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to keep my campaign afloat.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMyNl81OS1IRS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTg3NjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMjZfNTktSEUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE4NzY4LTI4OTkifQ/p1Derjyqq8TjKuHsXC6gQw)**
---
[ **RUSH REINFORCEMENTS**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMyNl81OS1IRS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTg3NjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMjZfNTktSEUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE4NzY4LTI4OTkifQ/kU1C4MsHIXKPvHu8AJbn5Q)
---
Every little bit counts, and without it, I'm done.

If I can defend this critical House seat, it'll be a crushing defeat for the radical Left. But I need your help to make it happen.

name: Juanita, United We Dream Action
subject: Trump’s plan to expand deportations
body:
We won’t let our tax dollars fund this cruelty | | | Peter, **** Trump is gearing up to launch the **most extreme immigrant detention expansion in U.S. history.** His plan would more than triple the size of the detention system — tearing more families apart, funneling billions of dollars into private prisons, and using military bases like Guantánamo Bay to detain people. This isn’t just an attack on immigrants. Trump and his allies have made it clear:**They will use mass detention and deportation to target Black, brown, queer, and trans people — and U.S. citizens aren’t immune.** This is cruelty on an unimaginable scale, and it’s all being paid for with our tax dollars. We **refuse** to let Trump and his billionaire cronies turn our communities into profit for the private prison industry. Congress must reject funding for this cruel and unconstitutional plan, and we need your help to make sure they do.
**[We can’t win this fight alone — we need your support. Will you chip in to help United We Dream Action keep up the fight?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPE6qa3YaId9tjjmDchFFZ1W103eH9tBmk3_Z0bwyKutyKhgtGPaLnotPASpLvnbHfEyGoiBhyK4s4rJD3x3RVw-5oZgAN0htPF-9hRbiGlzlj3z-kSF8xTSuYck9sUlkzyWxedSfizwEB5pgaMT5ojVLvtlJlEDMeOQdWWTXmwYJoHSV3RossyMOUmrLryx2SG_tXF1fDPsUxL7jO53WPhAnho1sbx0nDoDvQOtwZ44gA-NjvbP-YbWdE-83pwHKKgLTS4NPuoV0UyuG7BUvZ8kEDGXIgGMg4QTmwmMtKZVS0NNX7q-wXOr0ZdPmZoRNKIgDOEQG7wuGM9hBwYpJRm30toROrbD0NOs-KDgSmgvd7vZmNAahoGbvOW2PT5GD-B8eE6JH7QJJ_OOVzAhjQzNTgSaabHcaZGljCxsNf_Y/4f4/xYeZC3u7TJ-Z2-5L5y5Chg/h0/h001.A8dvlZurFOTWsBNhiTQO1aNx0lfRfEUk3xQTlLJ6Txc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $20](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPE6qa3YaId9tjjmDchFFZ1W103eH9tBmk3_Z0bwyKutyKhgtGPaLnotPASpLvnbHfEyGoiBhyK4s4rJD3x3RV9IJc9xs-SZUVjOZ18Bfuc9s7h-_oCWzLVM4WaRraRUrwlxWssYYpuRQcLwNCRCGIwhX1Hoa216LtlgCKISaq--uSbPirrOuygNLtMBlrSkiBeE0zsTzHzB5hq3YCky-AmKuKBlGsZ9xXhMByDmUCBRQpnJkqituEvQ-hktO6_gHZtceTmsrDeJVT5zJG5Q4gNnbxYamBizF7kh_PXC_tqVTK7OIPjMCKQgFPngRTyhWgq2DTIOn5HqKm-phHeYBb9iH19IFYH1FZpXpKZiYf6KNj_6GrtI5dqwE4BKmX4IARXGrBR6PXXtgon6X5yhb7Yy91EsLztf1QkiRLSWvkmbfrqUK_tdC2w9tl2JmrmtbaqJjP_OWQ7VjYhM02vdF4Q/4f4/xYeZC3u7TJ-Z2-5L5y5Chg/h1/h001.JNr9LsP6hFUNgc4pyoEsSo9EwJtXThdF1qXToY_RX-k)

name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: Sign to stop politicians profiting from war. Instead we must invest taxpayer dollars into our communities’ needs.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

With U.S. weapons, the Israeli military has violated the temporary
ceasefire in Gaza, killing over 400 people—including over 170 children—the
first day they resumed intense bombing.^1 Additionally, the Trump
administration bombed Yemen, killing children and other civilians in one
of the most impoverished countries in the world.

Since October 2023, our government has sent over $18 billion to fund the
ethnic cleansing and extermination of Palestinians. Each year, most of my
colleagues in Congress also vote to pass yet another record-breaking
military budget. Even though the Pentagon has failed to pass an audit for
7 years in a row, last year the Pentagon budget was $895 billion, nearly
$1 trillion taxpayer dollars. And now, congressional Republicans are
attempting to add another $150 billion to the Pentagon budget and $175
billion to the Department of Homeland Security to help carry out Donald
Trump’s cruel and illegal mass deportations.

Republicans are trying to cut hundreds of billions of dollars from
essential programs that millions of Americans rely on, including Medicaid
and food stamps... while adding hundreds of billions of our taxpayer dollars
to the military budget. This is impossible to justify when our neighbors
are struggling to put food on the table, fighting to keep a roof over
their heads, and rationing their medication.

Why do we always have money for war, but not enough to feed the poor, as
Tupac Shakur wrote decades ago? Part of the problem is the deep ties
between lawmakers and the weapons industry. Half of the annual military
budget lines the pockets of military contractors that profit off of mass
death. Now, many of these contracting corporations have proposed taking
over mass detentions and deportations, as well.^2

Weapons corporations like Raytheon, Boeing, and Lockheed Martin spend
millions to re-elect Congresspeople who serve on committees that determine
military funding. Additionally, many members of Congress and their spouses
invest directly in weapons contractor stocks, so when they vote to send
more bombs or send our loved ones to war, they profit personally. Across
political party lines, too many of my fellow Congresspeople are
incentivized to push for military aggression rather than diplomacy. To
stop this, I introduced the Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140688?t=1002&akid=36534%2E1203867%2EBeKqDy ]Please add your name to support my newly introduced bill, the Stop
Politicians Profiting from War Act. It’s time to ban members of Congress
from owning stock in weapons corporations, and push our government to
invest in our communities, not corporate profits.

ADD YOUR NAME

As of last year, more than 50 members of Congress owned stock in military
contractors.^3 It’s shameful that my colleagues continue to funnel
billions of U.S. tax dollars to get rich from military contractor profits
while voting to pass more funding to bomb people. This is corruption and
cruelty; our elected officials should not be able to profit off of death.

If passed, the Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act will prohibit
members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from
having any financial interests in corporations that do business with the
U.S. Department of Defense—including banning members from trading defense
stocks.

The Executive Director of Win Without War said: “Representative Tlaib’s
bill is a vital step to breaking this cycle of war profiteering. If our
leaders truly serve the public, they must put people over profits—not cash
in on the wars they help wage.”

Most Secretaries of Defense come directly from the weapons industry, which
has spent over $260 million on lobbying and $56 million in direct campaign
donations between 2022 and 2024. The organization Corporate Accountability
explains: “The [weapons] industry employed 858 lobbyists in 2022—more than
one for every member of Congress.”^4

Unfortunately, the weapons industry exerts incredible influence not just
in our political system, but also in our education system. Many U.S.
universities have boards of trustees that include military corporations’
executives, who have been pressuring schools to crack down on campus
speech and suppress anti-war student efforts while the Trump
administration is simultaneously deporting student protesters without
cause or due process.

We can’t let our institutions prioritize the profits of military
corporations over people’s needs. I’ve instead pushed for giving direct
cash assistance to people and ending childhood poverty in the United
States. State Senator Nina Turner and I wrote: “In a country that wastes
trillions of dollars on war while continuing to defund our social safety
net, we know that poverty is a policy choice.”

Instead of spending more on war than any other country in the world, we
need to fund universal healthcare, housing for all, clean drinking water,
school meals, childcare, and more.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140688?t=1003&akid=36534%2E1203867%2EBeKqDy ]Please sign on to support the Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act,
a necessary step in the push to ensure our government divests from war and
death and instead invests in life—at home and abroad.

Thank you for continuing to demand better from our government. I will
continue to fight like hell to rein in military spending and corporate
greed, invest in working families, and work toward a future that values
diplomacy and peace over the military-industrial complex. Together, we
will take steps toward the long-overdue dismantling of our country’s
military-industrial complex, so that we can finally put a stop to forever
wars and reinvest our tax dollars into providing our communities with the
resources they need and deserve.

In solidarity,

Rep. Rashida Tlaib
Michigan’s 12th Congressional District

unilateral resumption of mass attacks, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140690?t=1005&akid=36534%2E1203867%2EBeKqDy ]Ceasefire shatters as Israel

2. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140691?t=1006&akid=36534%2E1203867%2EBeKqDy ]Trump allies circulate mass deportation plan calling for ‘processing
camps’ and a private citizen ‘army’

4. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140693?t=1008&akid=36534%2E1203867%2EBeKqDy ]Corporate accountability and the military industrial complex

name: 1 WEEK LEFT [DOTL]
subject: Our last chance to DISMANTLE the MAGA trifecta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
You’re 1 of 25 Dems in your area that we’re waiting on!

|

body:
The telephone town hall garnered over 17,000 concerned constituents.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104559566/535747949/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDgwZWZkYi02YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mcGOiiqm_aW_3ZWHrJyfMwxXnge6UHhOvndqpYVxXg=&emci=0cc70f57-9709-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a480efdb-6c0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Last week, I held a telephone town hall with Representative and Assistant Leader Joe Neguse from Colorado.** Thank you to all of you who took the time to attend, call, write, and rally outside my office amid the chaos of the Trump Administration. **I hear your concern and frustration, and I am fighting back.** [**Take a stand against Trump and his unconstitutional executive actions and donate just $9 before the first end-of-quarter deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104559567/535747950/1596212816?refcode=2025-03-26-telephone&recurring=&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a480efdb-6c0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDgwZWZkYi02YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mcGOiiqm_aW_3ZWHrJyfMwxXnge6UHhOvndqpYVxXg=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104559568/535747952/1596212816?refcode=2025-03-26-telephone&recurring=&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a480efdb-6c0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDgwZWZkYi02YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mcGOiiqm_aW_3ZWHrJyfMwxXnge6UHhOvndqpYVxXg=) **The question of the day was "What are Democrats doing to stop Trump and Musk?"** The telephone town hall garnered **over 17,000 attendees** who wanted to know the answer to this question and voice their concerns. Rather than list everything, I want you to know that Representatives Jamie Raskin, Gerry Connolly, Rosa DeLauro, and Joe Neguse are leading the effort to consolidate the House response to the egregious Trump and Musk actions. **Just one example already is the fact that we are supporting over 140 lawsuits against the administration, and in cases where there has been a decision, judges have decided against the Administration.** **In my role as the lead Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I am also taking steps to stand up against the actions of the Trump Administration.** I am demanding answers from the administration on how the DOGE terminations of critical federal aviation administration safety will jeopardize aviation safety. We are amplifying the voices of our own community that the Trump Administration is hurting, including Lummi Nation Chair Tony Hillaire, who testified last week to my committee. **He testified that extreme cuts to the Environmental Protection Agency will force a choice between higher rates to pay for clean water or to pollute the waters of the Salish Sea.** A healthy environment is vital to Washingtonians' way of life and the regional economy, but Trump's indiscriminate budget cuts are putting our beautiful environment at risk. [**I will continue to amplify the values of Northwest Washington and protect our friends, neighbors, and community. clean_body: The telephone town hall garnered over 17,000 concerned constituents. | | | | Last week, I held a telephone town hall with Representative and Assistant Leader Joe Neguse from Colorado. Thank you to all of you who took the time to attend, call, write, and rally outside my office amid the chaos of the Trump Administration. I hear your concern and frustration, and I am fighting back. = = The question of the day was "What are Democrats doing to stop Trump and Musk?" The telephone town hall garnered over 17,000 attendees who wanted to know the answer to this question and voice their concerns. Rather than list everything, I want you to know that Representatives Jamie Raskin, Gerry Connolly, Rosa DeLauro, and Joe Neguse are leading the effort to consolidate the House response to the egregious Trump and Musk actions. Just one example already is the fact that we are supporting over 140 lawsuits against the administration, and in cases where there has been a decision, judges have decided against the Administration. In my role as the lead Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I am also taking steps to stand up against the actions of the Trump Administration. I am demanding answers from the administration on how the DOGE terminations of critical federal aviation administration safety will jeopardize aviation safety. We are amplifying the voices of our own community that the Trump Administration is hurting, including Lummi Nation Chair Tony Hillaire, who testified last week to my committee. He testified that extreme cuts to the Environmental Protection Agency will force a choice between higher rates to pay for clean water or to pollute the waters of the Salish Sea. A healthy environment is vital to Washingtonians' way of life and the regional economy, but Trump's indiscriminate budget cuts are putting our beautiful environment at risk. = = After the town hall last week, I joined Joe Teehan from My Bellingham Now to amplify our action to stop Trump and Musk. Communicating Democratic actions and taking action are key. Please help me by informing other Democrats and continuing to share your stories. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . | FIRST: Progressive Judge Susan Crawford launched her campaign to secure a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat in the first major election since November. THEN: MAGA billionaire Elon Musk poured $10 MILLION into the Wisconsin Supreme Court race to smear Susan Crawford’s record! NOW: We CAN’T let right-wing extremists win this seat. Right now, we have a chance to uplift judge Susan Crawford – a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. It’s up to us to fight back against right-wing spending. Peter, the future of reproductive rights, public education, voting rights, and our fundamental freedoms is on the line in this race. We can’t stand on the sidelines – it’s time for action. [Can you rush $5 or more before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to uplift Democrats like Judge Susan Crawford and defeat MAGA extremism?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99bb6c3f-06e8-4fbf-bfff-37173c051769/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e70d9ac-59e4-4f47-a2a7-574dd2cff054/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: OMG!!!! Dems can FLIP two Senate seats?!?!!?!!!?!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

body:
Joe Rogan is no fan of COURIER.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104560231/535749888/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3N2RkZDItNmQwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UodAFA660Nxz6zJyGf1bwRbwFV9OhBmdhGP9TpwBHcQ=&emci=c977ddd2-6d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cd77ddd2-6d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
Joe Rogan is no fan of COURIER. Last year, he attacked our podcast because we were one of the first to call him out for peddling right-wing misinformation:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104560232/535749889/-1581427288?refcode=20250326_Rogan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3N2RkZDItNmQwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UodAFA660Nxz6zJyGf1bwRbwFV9OhBmdhGP9TpwBHcQ=)
Now he’s having a meltdown because a new Media Matters analysis named him the **#1 most influential right-wing media figure online.**
[**We’ll tell you what Rogan said in a moment. But if you understand how important it is to build a progressive media strong enough to take on Rogan and the right online, please give $25 or more today to support COURIER.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104560233/535749890/2081197767?refcode=20250326_Rogan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3N2RkZDItNmQwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UodAFA660Nxz6zJyGf1bwRbwFV9OhBmdhGP9TpwBHcQ=)
**In a three-hour conversation, Rogan and Musk:**
* Attacked government-funded NGOs as a “gigantic scam”
* Claimed “DOGE” is exposing so much corruption it could get Musk “killed”
* Laughed about banning AP reporters for refusing to call it the “Gulf of America”
* Claimed only Fox News is telling the truth

**At one point, Rogan called mainstream outlets like the Associated Press “propaganda campaigns” that “distributed absolute lies.”**
Rogan insists he’s still “left-wing” because he supports a social safety net and publicly funded health care. What he doesn’t mention is that the Trump administration is dismantling the Social Security Administration—and Republicans are pushing nearly $1 trillion in Medicaid cuts to help pay for Trump’s tax breaks for the wealthy.
**Peter, Rogan’s podcast is the most downloaded in America, with tens of millions listening. And now he’s mad again—because someone finally said the quiet part out loud.**
Rogan can complain all he wants. But we’ll keep doing what we do best: **exposing his disinformation machine and correcting the record so voters know the truth.**[**If you’re with us, chip in $25 now to support COURIER’s work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104560235/535749891/2081197767?refcode=20250326_Rogan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3N2RkZDItNmQwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UodAFA660Nxz6zJyGf1bwRbwFV9OhBmdhGP9TpwBHcQ=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104560238/535749893/-1581427288?refcode=20250326_Rogan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3N2RkZDItNmQwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UodAFA660Nxz6zJyGf1bwRbwFV9OhBmdhGP9TpwBHcQ=)**
Thank you for standing with us,
— The COURIER Team

name: Team AOC
subject: Can we send you a sticker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Donate any amount and we’ll mail you our newest, union-made sticker.
#
Alexandria just wrapped up the “Fight the Oligarchy” tour with Bernie because we're not witnessing the _start_ of an oligarchy — we are fully here.
In three days, over 86,000 people joined them because all over this country, in both Democratic and Republican districts, **people are ready to fight back and defend our democracy.**
Something special is happening.
[ So today, contribute any amount and we’ll mail you our newest, union-made sticker as a thank you for standing with our movement.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202503-sticker.h-xj6U&refcode=em20250326-8444-P_FND_RES_MER&t=1&akid=8444%2E2526796%2ExFEL5U)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202503-sticker.h-xj6U&refcode=em20250326-8444-P_FND_RES_MER&t=2&akid=8444%2E2526796%2ExFEL5U)

Alexandria doesn’t curry favor with billionaires. Your contribution means that Alexandria works for no one except the grassroots folks that support her.
[ Chip in any amount today to power our movement for social, economic, environmental, and racial justice — and against the oligarchs — and to get our newest, union-made sticker.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202503-sticker.h-xj6U&refcode=em20250326-8444-P_FND_RES_MER&t=5&akid=8444%2E2526796%2ExFEL5U)
We’re so grateful for all your support this far. Thank you for standing with us.
More soon,
Team AOC

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Time to eliminate wokeism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
It is up to us to ensure our military and service academies are training the warfighters of tomorrow, not pushing a DEI-woke agenda.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=680f65be8a5c4bd2879c959d900e23e6&_e=Saan1smj9OlC3KRByJGcAUfidRz2Q51Aef7DlPizazeIVoKJ0K_YnUk4tN3Vc8JzQM0b4zymxrZtVp2ef0KlpJh8AH-7wpiMHk0_TePria6byCvRFGD4WbABCTSWANuQdxYL1_n4tyK726S7mLhQnLI6WMx_FAXUxGAKCzpnV-AOb03lzVoR5DuSFh3Y9mAOpsN3kuEk550TqmxcEcGZwfWT1H8dw2Sa1d9HQgPbS8akVAdj_e4uM9sqPtj_0ElXzD0F9ndGGXqS-3zD1cLwYENZlXMl1Mm_iHWhcjoqCRJDZRk97e3aZAiADI00E7kPhaJcXN2hIEy6KtbtGg8syg%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

To build the most lethal fighting force on the planet, we need to ensure our service members are set up for success.

_**For far too long, DEI wokeism has ruled our military and our service academies.**_

Our service academies must return their focus to academics, war fighting, and leadership skills.

I plan to get to the bottom of how the Democrats' woke agenda infiltrated our military. This week, I will question our service academy leaders, but first, I wanted to get your input.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=680f65be8a5c4bd2879c959d900e23e6&_e=Saan1smj9OlC3KRByJGcAUfidRz2Q51Aef7DlPizazeIVoKJ0K_YnUk4tN3Vc8JzQM0b4zymxrZtVp2ef0KlpJh8AH-7wpiMHk0_TePria6byCvRFGD4WbABCTSWANuQdxYL1_n4tyK726S7mLhQnLI6WMx_FAXUxGAKCzpnV-AOb03lzVoR5DuSFh3Y9mAOlvGUAuvKE5kQYDezXJ0rgqu1bt8G9ecMKp9CI6DfAdDI0Xw8fsxDGqMxoTzrDaVda9dHQDIHl8hB34fyKNKqqN6crwdlXfh8hCPgPOpa5KeWD-RncQKOS1rszUTu7s184_Y8WqaTKZcKczgxUqEbPA%3D%3D)

Peter,
Monte Rio Redwoods Expansion is 1,517 acres of beautiful redwood forests and rolling fields. To safeguard this land would be a worthy endeavor in and of itself—but its significance to the greater landscape is even more incredible than that.
[**With your help, Save the Redwoods League has the chance to create a thriving, connected wildlife corridor that will span more than 34 square miles.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104560628/535750627/2018652235?contactdata=lr00zUXpIiMDrwF53J/MC/aAD6cCa58yOVHCt5ddNqSGPs+9Sjug5nCUufhb+jnQi1QLol4u3lfN7qAybDVj2uuLGujvvQ4t83f+j8gSeY/Q/3gI5oT0de/hWIzTimS5l5vcY1i03zNEpLutXVMtnQrHfq/TMVGhFlvk287+2/s=&ms=MonteRio7_Link1&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MmU3Mzg5LTZlMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TDigZ-arlVmoCJXtb019evewztzB-UYNolg3ASdEt5s=&emci=b0283ff5-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=c52e7389-6e0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)

[**Triple your gift: 3X match for Monte Rio Redwoods!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104560630/535750629/2018652235?contactdata=lr00zUXpIiMDrwF53J/MC/aAD6cCa58yOVHCt5ddNqSGPs+9Sjug5nCUufhb+jnQi1QLol4u3lfN7qAybDVj2uuLGujvvQ4t83f+j8gSeY/Q/3gI5oT0de/hWIzTimS5l5vcY1i03zNEpLutXVMtnQrHfq/TMVGhFlvk287+2/s=&ms=MonteRio7_Link2&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MmU3Mzg5LTZlMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TDigZ-arlVmoCJXtb019evewztzB-UYNolg3ASdEt5s=&emci=b0283ff5-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=c52e7389-6e0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
What are wildlife corridors? Simply put, they are strips of public land that keep the habitats, breeding grounds, and food sources of native wildlife connected. Having resources close at hand—and not fragmented by human development or intrusion—helps flora and fauna thrive.
**That’s the key word: connected. A connected landscape is a resilient landscape.** [**With Monte Rio Redwoods, we have the chance to fill in a key gap in Sonoma County.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104560631/535750630/2018652235?contactdata=lr00zUXpIiMDrwF53J/MC/aAD6cCa58yOVHCt5ddNqSGPs+9Sjug5nCUufhb+jnQi1QLol4u3lfN7qAybDVj2uuLGujvvQ4t83f+j8gSeY/Q/3gI5oT0de/hWIzTimS5l5vcY1i03zNEpLutXVMtnQrHfq/TMVGhFlvk287+2/s=&ms=MonteRio7_Link3&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MmU3Mzg5LTZlMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TDigZ-arlVmoCJXtb019evewztzB-UYNolg3ASdEt5s=&emci=b0283ff5-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=c52e7389-6e0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104560632/535750631/2018652235?contactdata=lr00zUXpIiMDrwF53J/MC/aAD6cCa58yOVHCt5ddNqSGPs+9Sjug5nCUufhb+jnQi1QLol4u3lfN7qAybDVj2uuLGujvvQ4t83f+j8gSeY/Q/3gI5oT0de/hWIzTimS5l5vcY1i03zNEpLutXVMtnQrHfq/TMVGhFlvk287+2/s=&ms=MonteRio7_Image2&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MmU3Mzg5LTZlMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TDigZ-arlVmoCJXtb019evewztzB-UYNolg3ASdEt5s=&emci=b0283ff5-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=c52e7389-6e0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
Monte Rio Redwoods is home to a colorful cast of creatures, from the Sonoma tree vole to the northern spotted owl to the California giant salamander. Linking this property with other conserved lands will secure and stabilize breeding habitats for these and other threatened local wildlife that can only be found here in California.
This property is also home to the headwaters of three streams that feed into the Russian River, providing fresh cool waters that are vital breeding grounds for coho salmon and steelhead trout.
**These waters also depend on healthy forests and stable streambanks— _everything is connected_.**
[**Build a thriving wildlife corridor » 3X Match!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104560633/535750632/2018652235?contactdata=lr00zUXpIiMDrwF53J/MC/aAD6cCa58yOVHCt5ddNqSGPs+9Sjug5nCUufhb+jnQi1QLol4u3lfN7qAybDVj2uuLGujvvQ4t83f+j8gSeY/Q/3gI5oT0de/hWIzTimS5l5vcY1i03zNEpLutXVMtnQrHfq/TMVGhFlvk287+2/s=&ms=MonteRio7_Link4&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MmU3Mzg5LTZlMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TDigZ-arlVmoCJXtb019evewztzB-UYNolg3ASdEt5s=&emci=b0283ff5-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=c52e7389-6e0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
Public lands are life-sustaining for all wild creatures—including humans! These forests provide clean air, wildfire and climate resilience, and increased opportunity for outdoor recreation.
In an era of habitat fragmentation and human intrusion into wild lands, Monte Rio Redwoods represents our chance to connect and conserve a massive wildlife corridor—and a resilient future for the flora and fauna that make this region so special.
**Help the League purchase and conserve this land for the benefit of ALL,_forever_.** [**Give to our Monte Rio Redwoods campaign and your gift will be triple-matched!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104560634/535750633/2018652235?contactdata=lr00zUXpIiMDrwF53J/MC/aAD6cCa58yOVHCt5ddNqSGPs+9Sjug5nCUufhb+jnQi1QLol4u3lfN7qAybDVj2uuLGujvvQ4t83f+j8gSeY/Q/3gI5oT0de/hWIzTimS5l5vcY1i03zNEpLutXVMtnQrHfq/TMVGhFlvk287+2/s=&ms=MonteRio7_Link5&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MmU3Mzg5LTZlMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TDigZ-arlVmoCJXtb019evewztzB-UYNolg3ASdEt5s=&emci=b0283ff5-6cf8-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=c52e7389-6e0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
Thank you for your commitment to safeguarding California’s unique and beautiful environment.
Sincerely,

clean_body: for a life-sustaining wildlife corridor. Peter, Monte Rio Redwoods Expansion is 1,517 acres of beautiful redwood forests and rolling fields. To safeguard this land would be a worthy endeavor in and of itself—but its significance to the greater landscape is even more incredible than that. Photo by Alan Justice What are wildlife corridors? Simply put, they are strips of public land that keep the habitats, breeding grounds, and food sources of native wildlife connected. Having resources close at hand—and not fragmented by human development or intrusion—helps flora and fauna thrive. That’s the key word: connected. A connected landscape is a resilient landscape. Monte Rio Redwoods is home to a colorful cast of creatures, from the Sonoma tree vole to the northern spotted owl to the California giant salamander. Linking this property with other conserved lands will secure and stabilize breeding habitats for these and other threatened local wildlife that can only be found here in California. This property is also home to the headwaters of three streams that feed into the Russian River, providing fresh cool waters that are vital breeding grounds for coho salmon and steelhead trout. These waters also depend on healthy forests and stable streambanks— everything is connected. Public lands are life-sustaining for all wild creatures—including humans! These forests provide clean air, wildfire and climate resilience, and increased opportunity for outdoor recreation. In an era of habitat fragmentation and human intrusion into wild lands, Monte Rio Redwoods represents our chance to connect and conserve a massive wildlife corridor—and a resilient future for the flora and fauna that make this region so special. Help the League purchase and conserve this land for the benefit of ALL,forever. Thank you for your commitment to safeguarding California’s unique and beautiful environment. Sincerely, Save The Redwoods League P.S. This is such an exciting opportunity, but we must act now to secure Monte Rio Redwoods. Help us create a huge and thriving wildlife corridor right here in our backyard! Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States | | | | ---|---|---|--- |

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: The Founders understood this completely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Million Voices
body:

---
Peter,
A debate is raging right now about how to rein in lawless judges.
We're in good company, as aside from "no taxation without representation," reforming the judiciary was among the American colonists' principal complaints about the British Empire prior to the Revolution.
This must be solved, or we will soon find ourselves living under judicial tyranny.
_**But what if I told you that right now, you could personally help to safeguard against this in a real and tangible way?**_
On April 1, voters in Wisconsin will decide the balance of their Supreme Court. In this critical race, one candidate believes in taxpayer benefits for illegal aliens, unrestricted abortion-on-demand, cashless bail, and of all things, is against Voter ID in elections.
The outcome of this race could mean the end of Wisconsin as a swing-state for years to come, and it could severely impact not only our presidential elections, but overall representation in Congress and election integrity.
**As you read this, Million Voices has already personally reached over 215,000 Wisconsin voters to arm them with information and help mobilize them to vote.**
**[Your tax-deductible donation, right now, will directly support this vital effort, and help to protect our courts from unconstitutional, left-wing activism. Will you help?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=eb7a05d85b6f4816932c481629103e17&_e=5Umm2gJvuCsbo8u1f8E3l--1cxZQIpVwLXt_VFzB_j-H4X0Ll31CedjVGuBeIDWpmtfQ-AzUp3d6QP-NvQiYzWtJr0ZQnA4mqvAhrXQbJAwmNitx9LlzltSmnXNC7UUJthGDuZrczUdV2T01_zF-dVLuJdIzmEi-VU5FfMC_WNOxMqOUav4MOpk6NSSnrAFf7fKlpXJLK61rZRrpkrnPNkOF811tWv3SL2q2xnuV1qbeSPkI_KbcJdgka8UpTqINpTGDCjV5emZEbZIl8Lun4w%3D%3D)**

**George Soros has been pouring money into this race, and it's not because he has any great affinity for or connection to Wisconsin. **
What he does know is that tearing down the America envisioned by our Founders requires stacking our courts with judges who will put far-Left politics over the Constitution.
**If we are going to rein in lawless judges, people like you and I must engage in these fights, even when they're in places we may not call home.**
Our Founders knew full-well the threats of judicial tyranny. They endured it themselves. We must now carry that torch forward and stop it wherever we see it.
**[So please, before we run out of time, please support Million Voices' efforts on the ground in Wisconsin. The election is April 1, and early voting has already begun.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=eb7a05d85b6f4816932c481629103e17&_e=5Umm2gJvuCsbo8u1f8E3l--1cxZQIpVwLXt_VFzB_j-H4X0Ll31CedjVGuBeIDWpmtfQ-AzUp3d6QP-NvQiYzWtJr0ZQnA4mqvAhrXQbJAxpZD9z9lEiQAnJKcRKBDzr56WeQAm8ph9SF1ohV28IBBIn9NwdgrNpurNysqodHjpPH-yHSut_znpHsyqll1fiY2_--SCgSGyyZ4v2GzLdblPKD5E99cbIblm6koyaf1yPo7WyXxRGU4sOfmjLVN56BzlZmlLgWgep1ETNM9AqVg%3D%3D)**

Your friend,Newt
