name: Royce White
subject: ICYMI: I’m sharing this news with you FIRST, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I'm getting a head start NOW
|
---
Peter,

I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it.

**I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again to take down the Radical Left! [**Can you chip in to give me the head start I need?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe9ad444c87843deba0358670b6a4228&_e=5zZVErfLQn2MVm3b99pbt4Pv31Yiv4tyVX7_gujmqImHvAEQD3tesWsttw6yeghIQrZtJflEvcxfJeHHGG1aRnCEeWm_m6mCEAgPKq6Ez6558HXLYxhEBOiPoQBFqbRStH8Q0CrHhwkXvEAVuVEA4CiZTh6JB_P90p35wzkNRwI-VAQC0SHlphyq1ucZTm3feVwHb5h8NjzB1EeWg9TPFNcK0otpfNd1E_btAe6HMQKRM_UjnuL307e-fM842xJJnQ4vYW2IH55Sxl_0Jx-tXgIRGer9t0qT27smpfIjPIzQKUvDBrnt51noMdwNIglXVugJirzO9rRCmp1JC3MxSg%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe9ad444c87843deba0358670b6a4228&_e=5zZVErfLQn2MVm3b99pbt4Pv31Yiv4tyVX7_gujmqImHvAEQD3tesWsttw6yeghIQrZtJflEvcxfJeHHGG1aRnCEeWm_m6mCEAgPKq6Ez6558HXLYxhEBOiPoQBFqbRStH8Q0CrHhwkXvEAVuVEA4CiZTh6JB_P90p35wzkNRwI-VAQC0SHlphyq1ucZTm3fIqU4PNcp7TJM9qXQeBoFZqxzsnM_nQfYPrYJ3ZG-uf8sUbEBLLj-g89b_Yg9ZzJRacLq6Co0DqUXRnvclbGnnrtLCpaN4dafc7JNReDUmUrK_ylS8PQWWqcIZ5e_Sj96BKEfr3-_o9ursFVpxD85cw%3D%3D)
Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout.

_They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles._

For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters.

**This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat the crooked Left and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans.**

__The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose.

__[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe9ad444c87843deba0358670b6a4228&_e=5zZVErfLQn2MVm3b99pbt4Pv31Yiv4tyVX7_gujmqImHvAEQD3tesWsttw6yeghIQrZtJflEvcxfJeHHGG1aRnCEeWm_m6mCEAgPKq6Ez6558HXLYxhEBOiPoQBFqbRStH8Q0CrHhwkXvEAVuVEA4CiZTh6JB_P90p35wzkNRwI-VAQC0SHlphyq1ucZTm3fuPbT9ia2DsJ_TpOrJ0VWjDvh88YvVGxmXNiQoe1jefAMGtd_RVdeTSaPm8GBUKV6LP553Lj_6ejnGV8xAyhMAxZXfEoOT_q1m0ENDio_Z9BDPTZPImlex0F54N5PEsvQAKfwoT9TMVO2_20_-EbZEw%3D%3D)_
But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all._

**In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP!**

[**THIS IS WHY I NEED TO START NOW! I 'M RELYING ON YOU TO CHIP IN AND GIVE ME THE HEAD START THAT I NEED TO WIN!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe9ad444c87843deba0358670b6a4228&_e=5zZVErfLQn2MVm3b99pbt4Pv31Yiv4tyVX7_gujmqImHvAEQD3tesWsttw6yeghIQrZtJflEvcxfJeHHGG1aRnCEeWm_m6mCEAgPKq6Ez6558HXLYxhEBOiPoQBFqbRStH8Q0CrHhwkXvEAVuVEA4CiZTh6JB_P90p35wzkNRwI-VAQC0SHlphyq1ucZTm3fqf5-0UYrGzUaJqJ5l3Ia0805VQHGAenDgV4rW3p66hV5_Huo_unlocXVVh9cZQZ9hwTA68fuqlwU2GyEPkr1TtHkO1JRXhslLRIRZpvvPbDluWt8RtQcmq0k5DkRKjo_RrATQk77iXDqnAu7q3b9xA%3D%3D)

I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to win.

[**Peter, I 'm humbly asking you to donate just $10 before midnight to defeat a Radical Leftist who's been anti-Trump since the beginning.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe9ad444c87843deba0358670b6a4228&_e=5zZVErfLQn2MVm3b99pbt4Pv31Yiv4tyVX7_gujmqImHvAEQD3tesWsttw6yeghIQrZtJflEvcxfJeHHGG1aRnCEeWm_m6mCEAgPKq6Ez6558HXLYxhEBOiPoQBFqbRStH8Q0CrHhwkXvEAVuVEA4CiZTh6JB_P90p35wzkNRwI-VAQC0SHlphyq1ucZTm3fSq35Cvu3Y6bJsbU182IkjlSjSk5C8ppGFOL3uEvq7DJ7TRpvbiUvh8CqDcz6djV6_tO5aLUAmVw0F-VCHjgCiZsB8tA2edhmX_IfWEkyI9oWMmkKdnzVlBiKBorLsUQAdFvPUw_c3Kw1Ez5-SOS2fQ%3D%3D)

Here's to our Head Start,
Royce White for Senate

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe9ad444c87843deba0358670b6a4228&_e=5zZVErfLQn2MVm3b99pbt4Pv31Yiv4tyVX7_gujmqImHvAEQD3tesWsttw6yeghIQrZtJflEvcxfJeHHGG1aRnCEeWm_m6mCEAgPKq6Ez6558HXLYxhEBOiPoQBFqbRStH8Q0CrHhwkXvEAVuVEA4CiZTh6JB_P90p35wzkNRwI-VAQC0SHlphyq1ucZTm3fNnpFEjJnRE2BoOdqZlyvqhUEZoXhohOLm_JFcUj2y6MrQ_nZN3lSPXeoH_ts7gZ3jUkyLtRuz1nMj_vDVhx41gfgCjLlENhiQl5o_Q0Aja1Gppw4Kh8xPAHJLX32qFhWEHmZU9vasRm6MiZ1HuwXlw%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below?

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=fe9ad444c87843deba0358670b6a4228&_e=5zZVErfLQn2MVm3b99pbt4Pv31Yiv4tyVX7_gujmqImHvAEQD3tesWsttw6yeghIQrZtJflEvcxfJeHHGG1aRnCEeWm_m6mCEAgPKq6Ez6558HXLYxhEBOiPoQBFqbRStH8Q0CrHhwkXvEAVuVEA4CiZTh6JB_P90p35wzkNRwI-VAQC0SHlphyq1ucZTm3fIPMXrdzIsW7i5OXgQsyGtEHDkhHpcaUaZaV9cMUpflLVwyvPIKUNi81fiTTpWXmfJw_OZUrJ0U18TZtbU9WFKHl4TiJB0pgBlN2gUPT61Owzs01ZXV972fWwz43vx4cDI_fSnbbtWhr7psHEScBhMQ%3D%3D)

P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

body:
| | | Peter, When your agenda is so out of touch with normal that it loses Gavin Newsom, you've lost...
__
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/hpEgPkNQlor6E4tozpAyAJW0PFqvrq5_MgcmKqecLQyfahLjfDNC9_-NsTidyvFFzuELVeLb4F8GDcrdDCxcYa-C1S3GjjqMJt4Vnhr7ET7BWk-UHR8JLvJhJ7HxfBRZc4uRSnK0LQyPmoSWUfnyo5Y2jaGIfc91e4laFJHwcxFb6hZOnjwDop_m_x8_8qafpU5j9bH1zNaXa2-Xdg6jK__aGGkqkaNj7ySjXQ74IsvUm9LwAOMpAC8m575d1-PKVIDUO6D0vmUuIsOOkm--vl3no0ZdTvr-uiscrrRZKxMx29t61KbGgpYGhSf57pG7t96rAiqeYO5sRfgquSI9aQhXcOa1x191MYbI3zGUxzX7k8bnwo3yTJsXAa6QMZo6gvatze8Z2CIfWFoRfupfP0UndglngVDIOCg/vdJuKS6cZyZXk2MDoh9YkpK0ntyesJB7/7)

_**[They 're getting crushed because we fought back -- together.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/R3qUzkZveMo5mo6w5OCvsxt0Io8QBqEpE2opinDjbFDWAOO0mW_SEs87hpf2L3ndEo6I9cS9DD3Hsi7cUmIqjvCHwePQjpWFCboAHGqQvgZFTTHYpUigkAkIPms3KGOL7AUdfLwRKirJsQxFCBYG8xfKTGcJo6idehKAgmQN52zHagX-duzP-IjwUP9TOZ_lIptpQhl8AY8gzgstcqbx2BTB1sTyhqH1yj-zhQzZYGYq8xGWeap39qSuiBKzBUNI1qbRS4TVh7Vl8JiPuVsDUUwz8TW1LrZnixewaypgQEwb3Ro2wbNedth0PFzvgdOxScTMT-rBgR-7VnUTKsVe6IO8PbTKEonISEXAv9A9P6GJ7M_ZHZuCM_0QyIzfhk-OlNv9fiAIiynO4Pu5zFbEgIjpTazEQc0_rYI/_oFDuRI8DsO9beDbamRnsYZbsbuvBpWK/7)**_ We challenged the Biden Administration's radical rewrite of Title IX in the court of law and forced them to withdraw completely. clean_body: | | | Peter, When your agenda is so out of touch with normal that it loses Gavin Newsom, you've lost... And why do you think he's changing his tune? He admits as much in the same podcast: " We're getting crushed on it. Crushed. Crushed." We challenged the Biden Administration's radical rewrite of Title IX in the court of law and forced them to withdraw completely. I'm proud to have stood up for female athletes and common sense! Remember that every single Virginia Democrat voted against keeping men out of women 's sports -- all of them. Thank you, Attorney General Jason Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | . |

To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Vivek
subject: Let this be the one email you read today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I’ve never held public office. I didn’t spend years shaking hands in back rooms to climb the political ladder.

I’ve never held public office. I didn’t spend years shaking hands in back rooms to climb the political ladder.
I've never held public office. I didn't spend years shaking hands in back rooms to climb the political ladder.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._ANwDKCdBYOT9M5KyGA)
---
Peter,

I'm not a career politician. I've never held public office. I didn't climb the political ladder by kissing rings or cutting backroom deals.

I built businesses. I challenged broken narratives. I told the truth when it wasn't convenient, especially to the media.

Now I'm running for Governor of my home state - not to join the broken system, but to fundamentally change it.

But here's a hard truth: **[I need your help. We're just days away from my first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and still short of our critical 10,500 Donor Goal.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-kjhmHwoxALZMR9Nw "I need your help. We’re just days away from my first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and still short of our critical 10,500 Donor Goal.")**

That number matters - not because I care what the political class thinks, but because our movement depends on proving what they don't believe: That Americans are ready to stop managing our decline... and start leading again.

_If_ you believe in zero-income tax, zero-nonsense government...

_If_ you're tired of the managerial class running your life from D.C. and Columbus...

_If_ you want someone actually willing to cut bureaucracy, restore merit, and empower the people...

name: Emily Randall
subject: Emily's Notes: Town hall blitz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562001/535754285/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! Here’s what I’ve been up to: **• Town hall blitz** — I’ve hosted town halls in Tacoma, Bremerton, Port Angeles, and Aberdeen (whew!), and I’ve been blown away by the turnout. The crowd was so large for our Bremerton event that we decided to hold two town halls back-to-back AND we made _**[national news.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562003/535754287/-1349767276?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442)**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562005/535754290/1152876291?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) Between our five town halls, I’ve had the opportunity to see more than 3,000 constituents in person! Thank you to my wonderful team and venue staff for making all this possible. (And look out for events in Mason and Jefferson Counties soon! Be sure you’re signed up for the official newsletter at randall.house.gov to be the first to hear when and where.) Meanwhile, my Republican colleagues are under strict orders from D.C. leadership NOT to hold public town halls — which is why Democrats have launched [_**People’s Town Halls**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562006/535754292/-1117648323?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) in Republican districts across the country. If they won’t show up and listen to the people, we will. • **I voted NO —** I joined all but one of my House Democratic colleagues in _**[voting NO on the continuing resolution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562007/535754320/-1568722932?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442)**_ that opens the door to steep Medicaid cuts and even MORE unchecked power for Trump and Elon Musk. We hoped that Senate Democrats would stand firm against this measure — and Washington’s Senators Patty Murray and Maria Cantwell did! But ten Senate Democrats joined Republicans to advance this disastrous budget. [_**I posted a video on Instagram about that decision and what comes next.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562008/535754348/-729750097?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) I’m proud to fight for regular working people with some of the boldest and bravest voices in Congress, like Jasmine Crockett and Chair Greg Casar. **• A time for Pride **— Finally, I’m excited to serve as the [_**grand marshal of the Seattle Pride Parade!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562011/535754351/-803653937?v=Ufu9qpN3uOg&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) This means a lot to me, particularly this year. I work in the same building as politicians who are not only stoking fear against the LGBTQ+ community but making Congress a [_**hostile work environment**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562012/535754352/1743821670?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.26_MarchNewsletter_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzczMjk5Yy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nhuWrdNhNhrvRH5DDQPdfXcCLmInAXlaomI4K0rewwU=&emci=bb82dea4-2e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f773299c-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) for queer people. We must show support for queer kids and their families in every way we can — whether that’s speaking on the House floor or expressing joy and unabashed pride in our streets. Now, this is the part where I ask for a donation. Over the course of meeting thousands of my constituents at town halls, one clear message was that we need to be more aggressive in confronting the unprecedented corruption and destruction of the Trump-Musk administration. There are ways we can work inside Congress to push back — but there are even more things we can do OUTSIDE Congress. Here’s what I’ve been up to: • Town hall blitz — I’ve hosted town halls in Tacoma, Bremerton, Port Angeles, and Aberdeen (whew!), and I’ve been blown away by the turnout. The crowd was so large for our Bremerton event that we decided to hold two town halls back-to-back AND we made Between our five town halls, I’ve had the opportunity to see more than 3,000 constituents in person! Thank you to my wonderful team and venue staff for making all this possible. (And look out for events in Mason and Jefferson Counties soon! Be sure you’re signed up for the official newsletter at randall.house.gov to be the first to hear when and where.) Meanwhile, my Republican colleagues are under strict orders from D.C. leadership NOT to hold public town halls — which is why Democrats have launched in Republican districts across the country. If they won’t show up and listen to the people, we will. • I voted NO — I joined all but one of my House Democratic colleagues in that opens the door to steep Medicaid cuts and even MORE unchecked power for Trump and Elon Musk. subject: They know what they’re doing is wrong

body:
Being a Member of Congress means being accountable to your boss: The American people.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562225/535754880/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM3OWZlMy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CkT4GKJV2Cc3czTDuWT_iFxvlowbGZNBmBaMK8vOmpQ=) Earlier this month, House Republican Leadership sent out a memo to its members. The message? **Skip your town halls and ignore your voters.** That’s just wrong. It’s not at all what public service is about. At a moment when costs are rising and your Social Security benefits are being threatened by shady corporate interests, National Republicans should have the guts to defend their votes to the American people.**Instead, they’re playing hide and seek with their constituents.** Listen, I’ve never shied away from listening to the voters of Kansas. That’s why I just held a virtual town hall last week, where I spelled out what’s at stake for Kansas families and detailed exactly what I’m doing to make sure everyone’s voices are heard in Washington. On the other hand, these extreme politicians are refusing to hold town halls because they know what they’re doing is wrong. They know that selling out our country to Elon Musk, stripping away affordable health care for millions, taking away access to Social Security benefits, and giving a giant tax break to billionaires isn’t what their constituents want. So they’re pretending like they don’t even exist. Listen, Kansans are rightfully angry. I’ve heard from so many folks who feel like their government hasn’t worked for them for a long, long time. And yes, I’ve had tough conversations with Democrats and Republicans about the road ahead. **Because being a Member of Congress means being accountable to your boss: The American people.** [_**While National Republicans refuse to listen to Kansas families, I’m working day and night to make sure our district’s voices are heard loud and clear — but I can’t keep up this work alone. So please, chip in today to help me and my team continue to speak out and fight back against the GOP’s reckless agenda.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562227/535754882/-945380516?refcode=email_032625_Town-hall&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM3OWZlMy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CkT4GKJV2Cc3czTDuWT_iFxvlowbGZNBmBaMK8vOmpQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104562228/535754885/-945380516?refcode=email_032625_Town-hall&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDM3OWZlMy03MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CkT4GKJV2Cc3czTDuWT_iFxvlowbGZNBmBaMK8vOmpQ=)

clean_body: Being a Member of Congress means being accountable to your boss: The American people. = Earlier this month, House Republican Leadership sent out a memo to its members. The message? Skip your town halls and ignore your voters. That’s just wrong. It’s not at all what public service is about. At a moment when costs are rising and your Social Security benefits are being threatened by shady corporate interests, National Republicans should have the guts to defend their votes to the American people.Instead, they’re playing hide and seek with their constituents. Listen, I’ve never shied away from listening to the voters of Kansas. That’s why I just held a virtual town hall last week, where I spelled out what’s at stake for Kansas families and detailed exactly what I’m doing to make sure everyone’s voices are heard in Washington. On the other hand, these extreme politicians are refusing to hold town halls because they know what they’re doing is wrong. They know that selling out our country to Elon Musk, stripping away affordable health care for millions, taking away access to Social Security benefits, and giving a giant tax break to billionaires isn’t what their constituents want. So they’re pretending like they don’t even exist. Listen, Kansans are rightfully angry. I’ve heard from so many folks who feel like their government hasn’t worked for them for a long, long time. And yes, I’ve had tough conversations with Democrats and Republicans about the road ahead. Because being a Member of Congress means being accountable to your boss: The American people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, -Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Breaking
subject: Steve Bannon warns of total maga COLLAPSE in FL-06 Special
body:
On his War Room show, Trump strategist Steve Bannon, took some time to provide his candid take on the Special Election in Florida’s 6th Congressional District.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KyNZTXd3OOGLQCHhzmwtSvXpSetIObiuZhkj6ALge5k7VIv3VbT6YA4RPozRAiVKjTkJdDaQEVbO8ODgmABHH3nW6a4R06FnbYvhqW8juAXzLc1lWahh5ZrLBDCUkOh1UwjAuhc2vmsmJOVWYAhsY8c_tmbNG3cVsOGjM-kJMQ7qKDA-ea_O12EZU3vmlXTwmWI-9V0xLBFznD2ajQ1JPFKDHr6r3awD&c=KELZXgcDVHpSm1Ia7IRuxIt25i18mPyUwWuaxikWAxe32iUPWZ7Vaw==&ch=XbExzgv3URum-ng2uCv_DGMSYRQ6ILbmh_PZZwsvMM35FKwlvLOfNA==)
---
Team,
On his War Room show, Trump strategist Steve Bannon provided his candid take on the Special Election in Florida's 6th Congressional District:
"Don't forget Florida's 6th. Trump won that district by 30 points in November. We have a candidate that I don't think is winning. That's an issue."
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KyNZTXd3OOGLQCHhzmwtSvXpSetIObiuZhkj6ALge5k7VIv3VbT6YA4RPozRAiVKqGcL-Qf3rCgAALnggzCL9XjWUTM4wyDJOxroNFH68gfYAn0yPcDVteS1fw9iX0VK0937UnieOmxyeSui4Y8jW6qouXk51dFyfn7sZW_E0YEucE9Aeyu1F7fNvzidg-3pVtcVI5Q8Th51v_oP-6NrhFULwVxfU35x&c=KELZXgcDVHpSm1Ia7IRuxIt25i18mPyUwWuaxikWAxe32iUPWZ7Vaw==&ch=XbExzgv3URum-ng2uCv_DGMSYRQ6ILbmh_PZZwsvMM35FKwlvLOfNA==)
---
| | | | Steve Bannon on his most recent episode of War Room.
The cat's out of the bag. Our MAGA opponent's campaign is collapsing before our very eyes, and even Steve Bannon is ringing the alarm bells.
It is a perfect storm. We can win here and MAGA is panicked.
As soon as word of our breakout hit mainstream media late last week, MAGA dumped $3,000,000 into buying TV ads and we expect them to dump in even more as the race continues.
The lights are blinking red in MAGA world. They cannot afford to lose this seat - expect them to throw everything they have at us.
[We have six days - can you help us brace for impact and maintain our lightning breakthrough by rushing a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KyNZTXd3OOGLQCHhzmwtSvXpSetIObiuZhkj6ALge5k7VIv3VbT6YA4RPozRAiVKhJ9a8FK2VS4QqgaT-Vwzqc9GzGhQyCgpRvNntmhK3N_SDR9xYmOzrH5q9MG8S8IFw7AuBfh5O5p1JevwqDWapKCanN86oc_ZtLurSIK8OcwSCiRGpB2ACK0PIMtHxCWcy4oUoKiKtpaeN7mabM8HoHs9UU40-GSIdJ_K-Yd0WM4=&c=KELZXgcDVHpSm1Ia7IRuxIt25i18mPyUwWuaxikWAxe32iUPWZ7Vaw==&ch=XbExzgv3URum-ng2uCv_DGMSYRQ6ILbmh_PZZwsvMM35FKwlvLOfNA==)

As soon as word of our breakout hit mainstream media late last week, MAGA dumped $3,000,000 into buying TV ads and we expect them to dump in even more as the race continues. The lights are blinking red in MAGA world. Friend – President Donald J. Trump just announced his “**Complete and Total Endorsement** ” of my campaign for Congress!
He’s calling on patriots like you to join this fight - **and I’m counting on your support to make this victory a reality.**
**Election Day is April 1st which means it’s crunch time.**
But here’s the stark truth: we’re facing an uphill battle...
**_My Democrat opponent is sitting on a war chest of nearly $1.2 MILLION cash on hand, while our campaign has less than $100,000._**
That’s more than a 10:1 disparity - a gap so wide it’s keeping folks up at night, worried about losing this critical seat.

[IT ALL COMES DOWN TO THIS](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e4451216/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9yYW5keS1maW5lLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9yZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZmwtc3BlbGVjdF9yc18yMDI1MDMyNQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTAzMjY/LbmNsQjc2dXFaSw/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPWZ0ZDEmbW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmX25saWQ9Y0h5dXltdFd5QiZfbmhpZHM9bmM1cW11MTd2Q1dCa21scw/gZ-RN2A/s4s440c02ba)

Every dollar you give today will help us get our message out, mobilize voters, and counter the flood of liberal cash pouring in. With President Trump in our corner, we’ve got the momentum but we need the resources to match it.

name: Hillary Schneller
subject: History repeating in Hawai‘i
body:
Defending care | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104563350/535758414/2141984067?sourceid=1150556&utm_campaign=25emcmu-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hawaii&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg1M2QyZS03NDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3QUk1xxTq2D2gelpWw2bL1T_6ZWpb0D2SqNO_cRIM0=&emci=b7d9c6dc-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d5853d2e-740a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104563353/535758416/2141984067?sourceid=1150556&utm_campaign=25emcmu-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hawaii&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg1M2QyZS03NDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3QUk1xxTq2D2gelpWw2bL1T_6ZWpb0D2SqNO_cRIM0=&emci=b7d9c6dc-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d5853d2e-740a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

It's been one year since the Center for Reproductive Rights, together with the Native Hawaiian Legal Corporation and Perkins Coie, filed a lawsuit to combat restrictions on Native Hawaiian midwifery and [**defend the reproductive autonomy of all pregnant people in Hawai'i.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104563354/535758420/1522809640?sourceid=1150556&utm_campaign=25emcmu-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hawaii&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg1M2QyZS03NDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3QUk1xxTq2D2gelpWw2bL1T_6ZWpb0D2SqNO_cRIM0=&emci=b7d9c6dc-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d5853d2e-740a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

A 2019 law, intended to address some of Hawai'i’s maternal health challenges, imposed restrictive licensure requirements on midwives. But when the exemption allowing midwives to continue practicing as they had for decades expired in 2023, the true impact became clear:
* **Legal confusion** —vague definitions of midwifery created uncertainty for family members and birth workers like doulas and lactation counselors.
* **A worsening provider shortage** —cutting off access to care in rural and remote communities.
* **Barriers to traditional care** —threatening the network of apprenticeship-trained midwives.
* **Continuing a legacy of colonial suppression** —undermining Native Hawaiian traditional practices.

For **Ki'i Kaho'ohanohano** , the lead plaintiff in our case and a dedicated midwife for over 20 years, the impact was devastating. Since the exemption expired, she had been **forced to turn away families seeking her care _every single week._**

[**_“With this new law, history is repeating itself._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104563355/535758421/1522809640?sourceid=1150556&utm_campaign=25emcmu-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hawaii&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg1M2QyZS03NDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3QUk1xxTq2D2gelpWw2bL1T_6ZWpb0D2SqNO_cRIM0=&emci=b7d9c6dc-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d5853d2e-740a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) _We are again on the brink of losing our people’s knowledge of sacred birthing traditions.”_
— Ki'i Kaho'ohanohano

Thanks to a court order we secured this summer, Ki‘i was able to resume her practice and support her community. But the order is only temporary and limited. **We’re fighting in court and the legislature to make these protections permanent—and expand them—to restore pregnant peoples’ access to skilled midwives who both protect their health and meet their cultural needs.**

Cutting off communities from trusted care providers and diminishing the value of Native Hawaiian midwifery is not the way to address Hawai‘i's maternal health challenges. The solution to maternal health inequities is MORE choice and MORE reproductive autonomy—not less.

[**Read more about this important case and what comes next HERE.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104563356/535758422/1522809640?sourceid=1150556&utm_campaign=25emcmu-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hawaii&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg1M2QyZS03NDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3QUk1xxTq2D2gelpWw2bL1T_6ZWpb0D2SqNO_cRIM0=&emci=b7d9c6dc-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d5853d2e-740a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

Onward,

Hillary Schneller
Senior Staff Attorney

P.S. The Center fights on behalf of Ki'i and 8 other brave plaintiffs in this case because of the support of reproductive rights advocates like you. [**Make a gift today to fuel our fight defending reproductive rights around the world.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104563357/535758423/2141984067?sourceid=1150556&utm_campaign=25emcmu-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hawaii&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg1M2QyZS03NDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3QUk1xxTq2D2gelpWw2bL1T_6ZWpb0D2SqNO_cRIM0=&emci=b7d9c6dc-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d5853d2e-740a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104563358/535758424/-1253463851?sourceid=1150556&utm_campaign=25emcmu-0302aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hawaii&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg1M2QyZS03NDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3QUk1xxTq2D2gelpWw2bL1T_6ZWpb0D2SqNO_cRIM0=&emci=b7d9c6dc-710a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d5853d2e-740a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: MAGA’s National Security Disaster
body:
This is so Egregious, Even Republicans Are Sounding the Alarm.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wx7bs-vwe8eh-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **MAGA’s National Security Disaster**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wx7bs-vwe8ei-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, The Trump administration just made a mistake so reckless, even Republican senators are demanding answers. At this point, the story has spread across the globe: a senior White House official **accidentally added a journalist** to a **secret Signal chat** where Trump’s top advisers, including **Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio,** were discussing military strikes in Yemen. The journalist saw everything. The plans. The launch times. Even the weather conditions for the attack. Republican Senator Lisa Murkowski put it bluntly: **"This is what happens when you don’t really have your act together."** The fallout has been immediate. The Senate Intelligence Committee is investigating. The Defense Department’s inspector general is getting involved. Even top Republicans fear this scandal will become a “significant political problem.” Trump’s team is scrambling. National Security Adviser Mike Waltz, the official behind the leak, first claimed full responsibility. Then he backtracked. Now, Trump himself is contradicting him, throwing out conspiracy theories on live TV. The truth is, this was more than blatant incompetence,**it was illegal.** A watchdog group is now suing the Trump administration for violating federal records laws by using Signal for government business. [**_This is the reality of MAGA in power. Hypocrisy. Chaos. Incompetence. National security disasters. And yet, Republicans are still trying to avoid accountability. Help us stop them. Chip in now to defeat MAGA and restore real leadership._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wx7bs-vwe8ej-kyd76rh3/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: A Few Moments of Hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
Despite the barrage of attacks on our federal workforce from the Trump Administration, I wanted to share a few moments of hope:
Just last week, a federal judge ruled that the Administration must reinstate federal employees in numerous departments and agencies who were fired simply for their probationary status. That news came just after I introduced my first bill that would ensure that probationary workers who have been fired wouldn’t have to restart the clock on their probationary period if and when they are reinstated. Important to note: this is the first bipartisan bill introduced in Congress that will provide protections for civil servants.
In further good legal news, the Supreme Court recently ruled that USAID is required to pay out $2 billion in existing contracts. This decision is a promising sign of a court system working as intended—that the checks and balances in our government are working as our framers intended.
I know the fight ahead will not be easy, but there will be moments of hope along the way. Will you join us in the fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-03-26]

clean_body: [] Despite the barrage of attacks on our federal workforce from the Trump Administration, I wanted to share a few moments of hope: Just last week, a federal judge ruled that the Administration must reinstate federal employees in numerous departments and agencies who were fired simply for their probationary status. That news came just after I introduced my first bill that would ensure that probationary workers who have been fired wouldn’t have to restart the clock on their probationary period if and when they are reinstated. Important to note: this is the first bipartisan bill introduced in Congress that will provide protections for civil servants. In further good legal news, the Supreme Court recently ruled that USAID is required to pay out $2 billion in existing contracts. This decision is a promising sign of a court system working as intended—that the checks and balances in our government are working as our framers intended. I know the fight ahead will not be easy, but there will be moments of hope along the way. Will you join us in the fight? [] CONTRIBUTE $5 [] CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Sarah Elfreth [] Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Photos from Baumtoberfest and End of Quarter Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
A big “THANK YOU” to the 300 attendees at Baumtoberfest last week

| | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,A big “THANK YOU” to the 300 attendees at Baumtoberfest last week, who not only supported our campaign, but had to cross a crowded line of angry, shouting protesters to enter our doors. No one should have to endure being called a Nazi: it is wrong and unacceptable. The far-left used their tactics of hate, fear and anger to try to intimidate and discourage all those who support the work I’m doing in Congress to secure our border, fight for lower taxes and keep our country safe. But we’re just getting started and I won’t let them stop us. I was so pleased to have my new colleague, Chief Deputy Whip, Rep. Guy Reschenthaler, in Spokane to share some behind-the-scenes stories with our guests about the budget process, his vote whipping operation and optimism for the future. We’re getting our country back on track!Please enjoy the photos below! Thank you so much to those who supported our event! The end of our fundraising quarter is quickly approaching on March 31st. It’s the first deadline before our campaign books are made public. [If you can, would you consider making a donation to show the protestors, the pundits in DC, and the mainstream media that we have strong support?](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=d984f6a730&e=5a45b9550e)I’m on track to hit my original goal of raising $100,000 by the end of the month. [Can you help us blow it out of the water, and raise $150,000?](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=ffe3ea259c&e=5a45b9550e)I know we can do it with your help! [Please contribute any amount you can afford, up to the maximum of $3,500 per person.](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=fa97992d91&e=5a45b9550e)Thank you so much!!

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Standing Strong Against Attacks
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ4rgCGIy40Aggyco6vOqbvDZp7chVy2mtqwMHxpZ7ywWKvLz98QlXijJ0Xh4)
---
,

Recently, the Democrat Party has launched a series of attacks against me, attempting to undermine the progress we've made over the past 3 months.
These tactics are designed to distract and deter us from the critical work at hand.
Let me be clear: I am fully committed to representing the interests of Minnesota's 1st Congressional District. I am committed to working with President Trump and his administration to get his America First policies passed.
But these attacks are not just against me, they are against all of us who stand for these principles. Now, more than ever, I need your support to counter these unfounded assaults and continue our work. **[Please make a contribution so we can rise above these challenges and continue to work towards a brighter future for Minnesota.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ4rgCGIy40Aggyco6vOqbvDZp7chVy2mtqwMHxpZ7ywWKvLz98QlXijJ0Xh4)**

clean_body: Something big happened last night in Pennsylvania. | | Friends, Something big happened last night in Pennsylvania. A Democrat just flipped a deep-red district – one that Trump won by double digits. The GOP is panicking , and for good reason. Here’s the deal: Nassau County is purple. Trump barely squeaked by here in 2024. Seth Koslow is running for Nassau County Executive and he can win this race – but only if we have the resources to take on Bruce Blakeman, a MAGA extremist who cares more about headlines and his wealthy donors than about us. Blakeman has spent his time cozying up to right-wing special interests, ignoring real issues like affordability, infrastructure, and public safety. Meanwhile, Nassau families are being left behind. Last night proved that no district is too red to turn blue. Now, it’s our turn to make history. We need to raise $10,000 in the next 24 hours to build the momentum we need to oust Blakeman and flip Nassau. Let’s win this thing. name: Able Dems
subject: Add to our pile of hand-signed letters to SAVE Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | We're collecting letters from Able Dems supporters like you to save Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare. Dozens of hand-written and signed letters have already arrived, and we're hoping to put at least 200 letters together to _hand-deliver_ to your members of Congress in Washington, DC in April.
Help us add a _BIG, highly visible pile of letters_ from constituents to the torrent of phone calls and emails that Congressional offices are receiving. _Send them a message they can't ignore!_ We will scan and post some letters on social media, without your addresses or other sensitive information. **Here’s how to participate:** **STEP ONE: Write a letter like the following** \- it’s very important to include your name and address to establish that you are a constituent. Handwritten letters are the best, we'll also take printed letters with your signature.
Your First and Last Name Your Home Address Your City, State, Zip
Representative Robert P. Bresnahan, Jr. United States House of Representatives Washington, DC
Dear Rep. ,
[Your message against Donald Trump and Elon Musks’s cuts to Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid. You can choose to share how it affects you and your family. Please remember that the contents of your letter may be made public by our team or by the receiving office.]
**STEP TWO: Put the letter in an envelope and mail it to our team at:

** **** Able Dems Letters 5812 Queens Blvd Ste 2 Box 1144 Queens, NY 11377
_Invite some friends to write a letter with you - to save postage, you can send multiple letters to us in the same envelope!_
After this, we will take your letters in a batch to the US Capitol in April. **
** **DEADLINE EXTENDED** \- to ensure we receive them in time for our first delivery, please put your letters in the mail by Monday, March 31. **

clean_body: | | | We're collecting letters from Able Dems supporters like you to save Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare. Dozens of hand-written and signed letters have already arrived, and we're hoping to put at least 200 letters together to hand-deliver to your members of Congress in Washington, DC in April. Help us add a BIG, highly visible pile of letters from constituents to the torrent of phone calls and emails that Congressional offices are receiving. Send them a message they can't ignore! We will scan and post some letters on social media, without your addresses or other sensitive information. Here’s how to participate: STEP ONE: Write a letter like the following \- it’s very important to include your name and address to establish that you are a constituent. Handwritten letters are the best, we'll also take printed letters with your signature. Your First and Last Name Your Home Address Your City, State, Zip Representative Robert P. Bresnahan, Jr. United States House of Representatives Washington, DC Dear Rep. , [Your message against Donald Trump and Elon Musks’s cuts to Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid. You can choose to share how it affects you and your family. Please remember that the contents of your letter may be made public by our team or by the receiving office.] STEP TWO: Put the letter in an envelope and mail it to our team at: ** Able Dems Letters 5812 Queens Blvd Ste 2 Box 1144 Queens, NY 11377 Invite some friends to write a letter with you - to save postage, you can send multiple letters to us in the same envelope! After this, we will take your letters in a batch to the US Capitol in April. DEADLINE EXTENDED \- to ensure we receive them in time for our first delivery, please put your letters in the mail by Monday, March 31. Don’t want to write a letter?** Thanks for your time! Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . Hi Peter, I’m Loretta – George’s wife, mother of our two children, author, leadership trainer, public speaker, and science communicator.

**[I’m reaching out because we’re just days away from George’s first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline as Congressman for California’s 27th District. Will you chip in $3 now, then let me explain why this is such an important benchmark?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104565239/535764561/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE0YWIwZS03NzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwM4uhqQz_wfq4gtKr794QdeD6NMFqcgptAQ_S7EuXQ=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104565240/535764562/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE0YWIwZS03NzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwM4uhqQz_wfq4gtKr794QdeD6NMFqcgptAQ_S7EuXQ=)****
---

I was proud of George’s win back in November. He was one of just a handful of Democrats who flipped Republican-held seats in a tough election year.

He did it as a true advocate for our community – as someone who served as NASA Chief of Staff under Obama where he received its highest award for distinguished service. As someone who created hundreds of jobs in the Antelope Valley, founded an organization focused on wildfire research, and did it all as a devoted husband and father.

I’m even more proud of the swift action he’s taken in his first months in the House. Days after he was sworn in, Southern California faced the worst wildfires in its history – and George was immediately back in our area advocating for aid.

Looking forward, this seat is one of the few that can decide House control in next year’s midterm elections – and with it, Democrats are much more likely to win the majority and provide real oversight to this administration.

It’s why George is already on the receiving end of Republican attacks, and why national Democrats have named CA-27 to their Frontline program to help protect the most vulnerable incumbents.

And it’s why Monday’s FEC quarterly deadline is key. George’s fundraising numbers will be public for everyone from our allies to our opponents to see.

**[I know George would be thrilled to see your name on this fundraising report. Will you chip in $3 or any amount you’re comfortable with today to keep him fighting for us in Congress and at home?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104565241/535764563/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE0YWIwZS03NzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwM4uhqQz_wfq4gtKr794QdeD6NMFqcgptAQ_S7EuXQ=)**

clean_body: | = = Hi Peter, I’m Loretta – George’s wife, mother of our two children, author, leadership trainer, public speaker, and science communicator. = | **= I was proud of George’s win back in November. He was one of just a handful of Democrats who flipped Republican-held seats in a tough election year. He did it as a true advocate for our community – as someone who served as NASA Chief of Staff under Obama where he received its highest award for distinguished service. As someone who created hundreds of jobs in the Antelope Valley, founded an organization focused on wildfire research, and did it all as a devoted husband and father. I’m even more proud of the swift action he’s taken in his first months in the House. Days after he was sworn in, Southern California faced the worst wildfires in its history – and George was immediately back in our area advocating for aid. Looking forward, this seat is one of the few that can decide House control in next year’s midterm elections – and with it, Democrats are much more likely to win the majority and provide real oversight to this administration. It’s why George is already on the receiving end of Republican attacks, and why national Democrats have named CA-27 to their Frontline program to help protect the most vulnerable incumbents. And it’s why Monday’s FEC quarterly deadline is key. George’s fundraising numbers will be public for everyone from our allies to our opponents to see. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Loretta | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

body:
These strategic victories show that our grassroots power is real.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104566158/535767052/1328794144?refcode=ea.62d9998d-790a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.62d9998d-790a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyZDk5OThkLTc5MGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kKxk36_kPVbKgSyC1jNQ7OKNFQRTyjassRAVWOVtppI=&emci=306eb71a-4f0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=62d9998d-790a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

Let’s talk about momentum. Not the kind billionaires buy with unlimited wealth. The kind that’s built when grassroots supporters step up, day after day, and refuse to back down. Thanks to your support, we are heading into our first end-of-quarter deadline since Donald Trump was elected with that exact kind of momentum. **In Virginia,** we helped elect Kannan Srinivasan, keeping the state Senate in Democratic hands. **In Minnesota,** we helped elect Doron Clark and David Gottfried, blocking Republicans from controlling the Minnesota House and defending the Senate majority from Trump-backed extremists. **In Portland,** our climate champions on the city council, Mitch Green, Angelita Morillo, Tiffany Koyama Lane, and Candace Avalos led passage of a resolution to investigate Zenith Energy for its dangerous fossil fuel storage and transportation operations. This is what the resistance we need _right now_ looks like — building a firewall of state and local leaders who will fight hard for our communities. Make no mistake: Republicans are paying attention to these victories, and their attacks are only intensifying. As you read this, Elon Musk and his MAGA buddies are spending _millions_ to buy Wisconsin’s Supreme Court seat — seriously, a Musk-aligned group is offering $100 to Wisconsin voters who sign a petition against “activist judges.” **That’s why we set an ambitious goal to raise $70,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline on March 31st. Early voting is already underway in Wisconsin, and your $5 right now gives us the resources we need to deliver a massive blow to Musk in states like Wisconsin.** **[So let’s get out there and fight, team. Please use this link to chip in $5, or whatever makes sense for you, before our end-of-quarter deadline on Monday. clean_body: These strategic victories show that our grassroots power is real. | Let’s talk about momentum. Not the kind billionaires buy with unlimited wealth. The kind that’s built when grassroots supporters step up, day after day, and refuse to back down. Thanks to your support, we are heading into our first end-of-quarter deadline since Donald Trump was elected with that exact kind of momentum. In Virginia, we helped elect Kannan Srinivasan, keeping the state Senate in Democratic hands. In Minnesota, we helped elect Doron Clark and David Gottfried, blocking Republicans from controlling the Minnesota House and defending the Senate majority from Trump-backed extremists. In Portland, our climate champions on the city council, Mitch Green, Angelita Morillo, Tiffany Koyama Lane, and Candace Avalos led passage of a resolution to investigate Zenith Energy for its dangerous fossil fuel storage and transportation operations. This is what the resistance we need right now looks like — building a firewall of state and local leaders who will fight hard for our communities. Make no mistake: Republicans are paying attention to these victories, and their attacks are only intensifying. As you read this, Elon Musk and his MAGA buddies are spending millions to buy Wisconsin’s Supreme Court seat — seriously, a Musk-aligned group is offering $100 to Wisconsin voters who sign a petition against “activist judges.” That’s why we set an ambitious goal to raise $70,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline on March 31st. Early voting is already underway in Wisconsin, and your $5 right now gives us the resources we need to deliver a massive blow to Musk in states like Wisconsin. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, Team JanePAC P.S. We understand not everyone is in a position to donate to emails like this one. While we appreciate grassroots support from those who can, we never want anyone to feel pressured to contribute or guilty if they can’t. If now isn’t a good time, no worries. Stay tuned for ways you can help elect climate champions! | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

**Cycle after cycle, pundits have called IL-17 “the _only_ competitive House race in Illinois,” and Republicans have already released ads that singled out Eric as a top target.**
Last cycle, Republicans poured millions into IL-17 to defeat Eric, but he fended them off thanks to a strong base of local, grassroots support.
Even while being targeted by Republicans in Washington, and working to slow the far right’s worst impulses, he's proven that he’s still that hometown meteorologist who keeps the focus on his neighbors every single day.
_That_ is what won over the people of Northwest and Central Illinois, and it’s what makes him who we need in the district going forward.
_We are facing Eric’s FIRST FEC deadline of the year,_ and YOUR support—right now—is critical to his team’s strategy of keeping the GOP at bay and IL-17 blue.
[**Will you please make a donation today? Every dollar given will go toward re-electing Eric and helping Democrats win back the House in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104566257/535767336/1514584251?refcode=em-3.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzZmZGVkMy03OTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPxGV-I17Ip8kARHaoKE6mFtt0qEjW-3OiEOL_TljUw=)
Thank you so much for your support, Peter.
Tammy Duckworth

clean_body: | = = Hi Peter, it’s Senator Tammy Duckworth. I'm asking you to join me in supporting Eric Sorensen's campaign to keep Illinois's 17th Congressional District blue. = | = Cycle after cycle, pundits have called IL-17 “the only competitive House race in Illinois,” and Republicans have already released ads that singled out Eric as a top target. Last cycle, Republicans poured millions into IL-17 to defeat Eric, but he fended them off thanks to a strong base of local, grassroots support. Even while being targeted by Republicans in Washington, and working to slow the far right’s worst impulses, he's proven that he’s still that hometown meteorologist who keeps the focus on his neighbors every single day. That is what won over the people of Northwest and Central Illinois, and it’s what makes him who we need in the district going forward. We are facing Eric’s FIRST FEC deadline of the year, and YOUR support—right now—is critical to his team’s strategy of keeping the GOP at bay and IL-17 blue. = Thank you so much for your support, Peter. Tammy Duckworth = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Americans are rejecting this dangerously incompetent administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter-
Pete Hegseth's reckless handling of classified military information is a clear example of what we all already knew to be true- the entire Trump administration is staffed by people who are completely incompetent and entirely unqualified for their positions.
Hegseth and others on the Signal chat should be investigated to determine whether they committed serious crimes. But their carelessness certainly endangered the lives of members of our military.
He must resign or be fired, today.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/hegseth_texts.jpg]
Classified information that Pete Hegseth recklessly sent into a non secure groupchat with a phone number Hegseth did not recognize. Credit: Jeffrey Goldberg/The Atlantic.
Read the full article from The Atlantic here [https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2025/03/signal-group-chat-attack-plans-hegseth-goldberg/682176/] .
Voters know that the Trump administration is inept and totally incapable of delivering for the American people, and they're making their displeasure clear by electing Democrats in local elections across the country.
* Yesterday, Democrat James Malone won a special election for a State Senate seat in a Pennsylvania district that Trump carried by 15 points in November.
* Also yesterday in Pennsylvania, Dan Goughnour won a State House race that delivered PA House Democrats the majority in their chamber.
* In January, Iowa Democrat Mike Zimmer won his race for the IA State Senate in a district that Trump carried by 21 points.
* Also in January, Minnesota Democrat Doron Clark's victory in his special election flipped the MN Senate into Democratic control.
The message voters are sending the Trump administration is clear: they will not support his harmful policies meant to enrich his billionaire buddies at the expense of everyone else.
Join us today in acting against this reckless, unqualified administration:
* Phone bank from home for Democrats running in special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21 [https://www.mobilize.us/massdems/event/751236/]
* Phone bank with our friends at Wisconsin Democrats to help Judge Susan Crawford win her race for WI Supreme Court- Elon Musk is spending millions trying to defeat her [https://www.mobilize.us/wisdems/event/749814/]
Together, we will deliver a mandate for Democrats across the country and show Donald Trump and Elon Musk that the American people deserve responsible and competent government and are organized and ready for a return to fight against their harmful policies.
Onward,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

**Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost.** We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. _**But now, it seems like you've moved on.**_

name: John Goodman
subject: Stand With Me! 🇺🇲
body:
A Critical Fight for America

| | | | | [](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=1692a6c197&e=94c8429215)
---
| | | | | **Hey Patriot!**

Twenty-seven years ago, I enlisted in the U.S. Air Force because I believed in serving something greater than myself. I fought to protect our freedoms, our families, and the future of this great nation. But today, I see those very values **under attack**.When I get to Washington I will fight for **Veterans**. VA Hospitals are hard to get appointments at, and are often far away for vets to travel to. We need better health care and housing options for our vets. We need to do better by those who have served our country, and I plan to do that. I will fight for better [**Education**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=a1f44823f1&e=94c8429215). [Schools should be places of learning, not enviroments where young girls are forced to change in front of biological males who identify as girls. Why are we teaching 4th graders books that gender confusion?](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=2c74a7979b&e=94c8429215) Students need to learn how to read, write, do math, study science and history. Let’s recognize and reward teachers who actively work to improve individual test scores. Schools that demonstrate overall improvement across all subjects should also be rewarded, especially as many schools nationwide continue to decline. [**I will fight for real education to be taught in schools again.**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=b5e9bd2905&e=94c8429215)******Crime** has been out of control in recent years and we need to fight back. I will introduce a bill for better funding for police agencies, and efficient training practices for all police officers. I will work with Tom Holman to deport all illegal immigrants, starting with those who have criminal backgrounds and/or ties to criminal activity. Illinois deserves **strong, principled leadership** —someone who isn’t afraid to stand up for what’s right. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate. **I’m here to win, but, I need serious support from people who care about this country as much as I do.**
This race isn’t just about Illinois; it’s about the future of America. The radical left has deep pockets, and they will stop at nothing to keep Illinois under their control. **We need to fight back—and that starts with building the war chest we need to win.**
I’m asking you to join me as a [**founding donor**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=0f23a0817f&e=94c8429215) of this campaign. Your leadership and investment today will ensure we have the resources to take on the political machine and bring real change to Illinois.
**I need to raise another**[**$42,687**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=fa80dff7e2&e=94c8429215)**to meet the first fundraising goal set for me. Can I count on you to step up with**[**$25**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=ecac7f2639&e=94c8429215)**,**[**$50**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=000c958f1d&e=94c8429215)**, or**[**$100 DONATION**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=ca7345086f&e=94c8429215)**?** ⬇️
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Click Here to Show Your Support For John Goodman!](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=faf7fa316f&e=94c8429215)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | With your help, we will build a movement strong enough to **restore safety to our communities, defend our freedoms, and secure a brighter future for the next generation.**
Illinois can lead the way in taking our country back. But it starts with you. **Make a statement today with a maximum or high-impact donation, and let’s win this together.**_We the People deserve better.

_ With your support, we can win this race—for our children, for Illinois, and for America.God Bless,John GoodmanRepublican Candidate for US Senate serving Illinois
P.S. - I ask that you share my emails with all your friends, and follow my socials. Every Precinct Committeeman, Volunteer and Voter is a vital part of my campaign. This campaign is not just about me, it’s about each of you and how we can fix Illinois. Please consider [Volunteering](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=f5b1b5709d&e=94c8429215) for my campaign today, as well.
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=a01695e449&e=94c8429215)
---
[](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=93911ff928&e=94c8429215)
---
[](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=734c3e612f&e=94c8429215)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=dbb9d4fdef&e=94c8429215)
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=ec6c6e5768&e=94c8429215&c=84ad0f7deb) or [unsubscribe](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=ec6c6e5768&t=b&e=94c8429215&c=84ad0f7deb)

name: the EMILYs List Digital team
subject: We're putting YOU first, Peter
body:
Wanted to make sure you saw this |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104567743/535771808/-1491281772?refcode=WUENE360_20250326_FOTLTeaserKicker_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055874&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTljNDllYS03YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGYBQCJJ6XbBZIaaWjMZiY-e9qwuRB5ZLwDZ-KKg-ho=) Peter, we have big news coming, and we wanted to make sure you saw this.

We're committed to putting YOU first, and that starts with making your online experience with EMILYs List better.

So, we've reviewed your feedback, and we have big changes coming tomorrow.

Stay tuned!

\- the EMILYs List Digital team

_—Original Message—
Sent: Tues., March 25, 2025
From: the EMILYs List Digital team_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104567746/535771817/-1491281772?refcode=WUENE360_20250326_FOTLTeaserKicker_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055874&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTljNDllYS03YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGYBQCJJ6XbBZIaaWjMZiY-e9qwuRB5ZLwDZ-KKg-ho=) Hi Peter,

In January, we sent you a survey asking what kind of content you want to see from EMILYs List and how you want to hear from us.

Your insights matter a lot to us, and we're committed to making your online experience with EMILYs List even better.

We heard you loud and clear. Here are some key takeaways from supporters like you:

📣 "Send fewer fundraising requests by email, text, or mail."
📣 "Provide more political context and less solicitation."
📣 "I want straightforward updates about how my donation is being put to use."
📣 "As the only Democrat in my small town, I’d like to connect with others who support EMILYs List."
📣 "My inbox is full. I am burned out."

We get it. And that's why we're making changes.

So keep an eye 👀 on your inbox over the next few days for something new — we think you're going to love it.

More soon,

clean_body: Wanted to make sure you saw this | = Peter, we have big news coming, and we wanted to make sure you saw this. We're committed to putting YOU first, and that starts with making your online experience with EMILYs List better. So, we've reviewed your feedback, and we have big changes coming tomorrow. Stay tuned! \- the EMILYs List Digital team —Original Message— Sent: Tues., March 25, 2025 From: the EMILYs List Digital team = Hi Peter, In January, we sent you a survey asking what kind of content you want to see from EMILYs List and how you want to hear from us. Your insights matter a lot to us, and we're committed to making your online experience with EMILYs List even better. We heard you loud and clear. Here are some key takeaways from supporters like you: 📣 "Send fewer fundraising requests by email, text, or mail." 📣 "Provide more political context and less solicitation." 📣 "I want straightforward updates about how my donation is being put to use." 📣 "As the only Democrat in my small town, I’d like to connect with others who support EMILYs List." 📣 "My inbox is full. I am burned out." We get it. And that's why we're making changes. So keep an eye 👀 on your inbox over the next few days for something new — we think you're going to love it. More soon, the EMILYs List Digital team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Stop Congress’ Attack Critical Clean Vehicle Standards!
body:
Congress may illegally use the Congressional Review Act to revoke states’ right to protect residents from tailpipe pollution if we don’t act now!| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104568123/535772710/-456362501?contactdata=2LA/hDoRJNxRoqqYRDe8ffA0WSoD3xup4lj6oNldk50P47cOFAksY3oXE2AfB4ByaCOJ+f6MMknHtn9oYkBWx0nKVUthPffJ95GVEdGL8B8r6wLS7Ez6wNgghwz1zvLF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjI3Y2VmLTdkMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HCfjmJnKto1eCYKxF0QluV9Pvzb7GazArxkE804IkY4=&emci=eff2a758-7a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=47227cef-7d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Hi Peter, In the past few years we’ve seen a rise in natural disasters due to climate change and high levels of toxic air pollution. We all have a right to clean air and a healthy climate, for our health and safety. Despite this, we are right now seeing an unprecedented and reckless attack on the Clean Air Act, which would jeopardize our right to clean air, as some members of Congress seek to overturn clean vehicle standards that cut toxic vehicle emissions. [**Do you have a second to send your Congressperson a message and stand up for our right to clean air?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104568124/535772711/-456362501?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjI3Y2VmLTdkMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HCfjmJnKto1eCYKxF0QluV9Pvzb7GazArxkE804IkY4=&emci=eff2a758-7a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=47227cef-7d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
[Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104568125/535772712/-456362501?contactdata=2LA/hDoRJNxRoqqYRDe8ffA0WSoD3xup4lj6oNldk50P47cOFAksY3oXE2AfB4ByaCOJ+f6MMknHtn9oYkBWx0nKVUthPffJ95GVEdGL8B8r6wLS7Ez6wNgghwz1zvLF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjI3Y2VmLTdkMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HCfjmJnKto1eCYKxF0QluV9Pvzb7GazArxkE804IkY4=&emci=eff2a758-7a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=47227cef-7d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Specifically, some members of Congress are trying to repeal the Clean Vehicle Waivers and rollback state-level vehicle emission standards through the [Congressional Review Act](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104568126/535772713/1328072463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjI3Y2VmLTdkMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HCfjmJnKto1eCYKxF0QluV9Pvzb7GazArxkE804IkY4=&emci=eff2a758-7a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=47227cef-7d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) (CRA). However, Congress does not have the authority to overturn Clean Vehicle Waivers, as they are “orders” and not “rules,” and therefore not subject to the CRA. Repealing these waivers is a direct attack on state rights to protect their residents from health-harming tailpipe pollution and could prevent the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) from approving new waivers for any future similar actions. It is also an attack on America’s more than half-century-old bedrock environmental law, as it seeks to damage state rights afforded by the Clean Air Act - that have been repeatedly affirmed and strengthened by deliberate Congressional action over several decades. The Clean Air Act is more important than ever right now.
This comes down to yet another attack on our science based environmental policies and on state rights. Now is not the time to take a step backwards and delay or prohibit a clean transportation future. What we allow to happen now sets a dangerous precedent for administrative actions moving forward. [**Let your member of Congress know this is something that we won’t stand for. Clean air and a healthy climate is our right!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104568127/535772714/-456362501?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjI3Y2VmLTdkMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HCfjmJnKto1eCYKxF0QluV9Pvzb7GazArxkE804IkY4=&emci=eff2a758-7a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=47227cef-7d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
[Send the message now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104568128/535772715/-456362501?contactdata=2LA/hDoRJNxRoqqYRDe8ffA0WSoD3xup4lj6oNldk50P47cOFAksY3oXE2AfB4ByaCOJ+f6MMknHtn9oYkBWx0nKVUthPffJ95GVEdGL8B8r6wLS7Ez6wNgghwz1zvLF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjI3Y2VmLTdkMGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HCfjmJnKto1eCYKxF0QluV9Pvzb7GazArxkE804IkY4=&emci=eff2a758-7a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=47227cef-7d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
| | Let’s win this fight,
---
---
Eliza Walton _(she/they)_ OLCV Coalition Director
