Despite this, we are right now seeing an unprecedented and reckless attack on the Clean Air Act, which would jeopardize our right to clean air, as some members of Congress seek to overturn clean vehicle standards that cut toxic vehicle emissions. Specifically, some members of Congress are trying to repeal the Clean Vehicle Waivers and rollback state-level vehicle emission standards through the (CRA). However, Congress does not have the authority to overturn Clean Vehicle Waivers, as they are “orders” and not “rules,” and therefore not subject to the CRA. Repealing these waivers is a direct attack on state rights to protect their residents from health-harming tailpipe pollution and could prevent the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) from approving new waivers for any future similar actions. It is also an attack on America’s more than half-century-old bedrock environmental law, as it seeks to damage state rights afforded by the Clean Air Act - that have been repeatedly affirmed and strengthened by deliberate Congressional action over several decades. The Clean Air Act is more important than ever right now. This comes down to yet another attack on our science based environmental policies and on state rights. Now is not the time to take a step backwards and delay or prohibit a clean transportation future. What we allow to happen now sets a dangerous precedent for administrative actions moving forward. | | Let’s win this fight, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

We are now witnessing the radical Left's THIRD coup attempt against President Donald J. Trump. ▶︎ First, it was the **Russia Hoax** following his victory in 2016. ▶︎ Then, it was the **Scamdemic** before the 2020 election. ▶︎ And now the Left is using **Judicial Lawfare** to tank his agenda following a resounding victory in the 2024 election. Make no mistake. **This is a Judicial Coup.** _**And every American should recognize that all three coup attempts against President Trump were conducted by UNELECTED agents.**_ First, it was Deep State intelligence officers. _None were elected._ Then, it was the public health establishment. _None were elected._ And now it's Democrat-appointed judges. _Not one was ever elected._ **The U.S. Senate is the key to stopping this judicial tyranny.** ▶︎ Confirming good judges requires _51 Senate votes_. ▶︎ Restricting national injunctions requires _60 Senate votes_.

▶︎ Impeaching bad judges requires _67 Senate votes_. Thankfully, we have 53 Republicans in the Senate now, so confirming good judges is our immediate weapon in this fight. **But 60 votes is within reach if we focus our political efforts in the next few years. name: Mark Warner
subject: Pete Hegseth should resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, it’s Mark Warner, and I won’t beat around the bush:
When the stakes are this high, incompetence is not an option. Pete Hegseth should resign. Mike Waltz should resign.
I will continue to fight the Trump administration’s systemic degradation of our intelligence community at every turn, but I need your help.
My work makes me a top target for Elon Musk and Donald Trump’s Republicans in next year’s election. And with my first end-of-quarter deadline just days away, I need your help to make sure we protect this seat and elect more Democrats.
So, in this critical moment for this country, I am asking you to stand up and push back with Tim Kaine and me. Split a donation between my campaign and Tim's Common Ground PAC >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Training progressive candidates to fight fascism and serve their communities
body:
Wrapping up our Campaign School and gearing up for the Youth Engagement Fellowship: | | |
---
Friend, When I was first elected to Congress in 2018, I came in as part of a historic wave of women of color with various faith and economic backgrounds that have been under-represented in our government for too long. Since then, billionaires have grown their influence over our government. Many government officials are millionaires or billionaires and don’t understand the needs of the communities they’re supposed to serve. Too many are delaying much-needed changes like universal healthcare and a universal basic income, while cutting funding for essential programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and SNAP nutrition benefits. They’re also taking away the constitutional rights of vulnerable communities. **One way to fight back against growing fascism is by urgently building the bench of progressive candidates** —especially candidates with the lived experiences needed to represent and protect their marginalized and lower-income constituents. This Women’s History Month,**we wrapped up our**** _free_****2025 Campaign School with our biggest cohort yet** : 19 people, two-thirds of whom were women. More than half of the participants in this year’s Campaign School were Black, and more than a quarter of the participants were Asian, Latinx, or Arab. **Already, two women who participated have filed to run for local office** , and others are helping with local campaigns. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1FhnwhFXAIhderapx4t-PHYQW4044gj6cAe_qe0BCW8V64XHAYhdXiDZyEjJWnZqmodXef1eeMaD8KdrLfJMdpiITaFN6e2Nx5pyRaJ50vwpgqQIlrTn2D6csQBdWmknTOsPeCeuupyHEcXL7tCy01AEgy6Y7eXxRKz9rcPd0F0Ft9k-GM0OIOBQjBoAIclLoA0QjTwD835wX-j51cGsfwCV_fIEFel_IIbuoQvEw7qJkuO7XbIXy3i-s7gAH9lHiZgRwo8ddBpN9DZrBW30EUIVCMUCPA8MrFm80kgzq8vwWR41khzK-SrBbpjBBbDSuiWQkcdiWzkNRC_mvk8KxhdYOXhCgworNyqMVROq8gX9JrPuV43vg7NMzhP0FVOX3yAnvzgOrZt_9ck1RryEr3Jr7lhR1vpbIqidwhfYJY37FQSC_bZegGPsA8ZATIQeHoh/4f4/sQDR0xhIQ2Kzl9-GhWQpcw/h0/h001.AHZFqIsB_DvEQac3SRlq8XddcSiEBgP1eSabTubjtvE) [**If you can, please chip in today to power our training programs and build progressive power, including by equipping everyday people with the tools they need to stand up to rising authoritarianism and build the world that we deserve.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1FhnwhFXAIhderapx4t-PHYQW4044gj6cAe_qe0BCW8V67RVbvG4JsAzc95-RF8HFrPI-bER1SuZjjHgiqAaSEymZocjVFpggz9cLV599yp0wWwVTLRy3mSUDwWc2PItvuWjh8Kvl5uQFiS6iwrx43bqAMMUTxy4cL4Oc7mZEYAkfZ_hGrqK4ot39Y352Y8HSAOa3svvg3GxwaLsGDal-GkvNMtmhOj2vjT_W3gnDZ7fuvPfgyllWrY3AnIcuKmx-sNzZjSClnFyKVrDKhNANfNchumUX2evSVJBI1tjd1ziPV0E2Ki3jvQ0RnXC7QXG775WXG9YZk2Hv6J7zcvQlgTyiWOFJ3wtljnQKcz6EAN0oTWafVpcA7pSoZgr6YQ-tS8ToLwO88QvjiG8y7boUgfdScGr3DUeAr_i6qMQSUiCRdKx0ihvCIO36JlKtJQ0kKh/4f4/sQDR0xhIQ2Kzl9-GhWQpcw/h1/h001.RZ19T5azHIuQq3ayDGlx1smBoQbPje6R1JGPZOYVuUk) Over five weekly sessions, we covered fundamentals for running a grassroots campaign, including filing for office, fundraising for electoral campaigns, running field operations to connect with voters, recruiting volunteers, and getting endorsements. We brought in current and former elected officials who are rooted in their communities and standing up for human rights. **This year, we received a record number of applicants. Thanks to your support, our Campaign School was completely free to attend for each participant.** Now we’re gearing up for our 2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship to train young—primarily BIPOC*—activists and leaders in community organizing, including stipends for participants. [**Will you donate today to power our ongoing Rooted in Community Campaign School and Youth Engagement Fellowship to train future candidates and leaders? clean_body: Wrapping up our Campaign School and gearing up for the Youth Engagement Fellowship: | | | Friend, When I was first elected to Congress in 2018, I came in as part of a historic wave of women of color with various faith and economic backgrounds that have been under-represented in our government for too long. Since then, billionaires have grown their influence over our government. Many government officials are millionaires or billionaires and don’t understand the needs of the communities they’re supposed to serve. Too many are delaying much-needed changes like universal healthcare and a universal basic income, while cutting funding for essential programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and SNAP nutrition benefits. They’re also taking away the constitutional rights of vulnerable communities. One way to fight back against growing fascism is by urgently building the bench of progressive candidates —especially candidates with the lived experiences needed to represent and protect their marginalized and lower-income constituents. This Women’s History Month,we wrapped up our free2025 Campaign School with our biggest cohort yet : 19 people, two-thirds of whom were women. More than half of the participants in this year’s Campaign School were Black, and more than a quarter of the participants were Asian, Latinx, or Arab. Already, two women who participated have filed to run for local office , and others are helping with local campaigns. Over five weekly sessions, we covered fundamentals for running a grassroots campaign, including filing for office, fundraising for electoral campaigns, running field operations to connect with voters, recruiting volunteers, and getting endorsements. We brought in current and former elected officials who are rooted in their communities and standing up for human rights. This year, we received a record number of applicants. Thanks to your support, our Campaign School was completely free to attend for each participant. Now we’re gearing up for our 2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship to train young—primarily BIPOC—activists and leaders in community organizing, including stipends for participants. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | In a time of rising authoritarianism, I am energized and encouraged to see a powerful group of working-class candidates ready to run for office and transform our government into one that’s truly of, by, and for the people—not billionaires. \- Rashida Tlaib BIPOC means Black, Indigenous, and people of color | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Republicans keep hiding from Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This month, the head of the House Republicans’ national campaign organization told GOP members not to hold town hall meetings in their districts, and to effectively hide from voters. In Indiana, almost all of the GOP members have taken that cowardly advice. Almost all are refusing to hold any town halls, and Rep. Erin Houchin has even canceled her staff office hours. **The contrast couldn’t be more clear. Both of Indiana’s Democratic U.S. Reps have held virtual town hall meetings, and are listening to their constituents. ** **[In just a couple weeks we will be starting our People’s Town Hall series across every district in our state. When they don’t show up, we will. Stand up today for Hoosiers and help fund our campaign for a better, fairer Indiana with a donation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104568705/535774243/1764064610?refcode=250326hide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWNkZDMzMC04MDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fym506t77IhI7rK67Z5vjlljWOogiLvFE14Sk89wBmQ=)** The next election is closer than you think, and that’s why we’re using this year to build for a successful 2026. **[We must have the resources to reach Hoosiers as we enter the critical 2026 election cycle. Your donation of any size helps us reach every corner of our state to hold Republicans accountable and elect new leadership for our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104568706/535774244/1764064610?refcode=250326hide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWNkZDMzMC04MDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fym506t77IhI7rK67Z5vjlljWOogiLvFE14Sk89wBmQ=)** Thanks,
Indiana Democrats P.S. The only Republican in Indiana holding town halls is Victoria Spartz in Indiana’s 5th District.
On March 28, there will be a town hall at the **IMMI Conference Center, 18880 N. East St, Westfield, IN 46074 from 6-8 PM ET.** On March 29, her office is holding a town hall at the **Muncie City Hall on 300 N. High St, Muncie, IN from 11 AM - 1 PM ET. We urge you to attend and make your frustrations heard about what’s going on in Washington D.C.**

clean_body: We can’t let unelected billionaires like Elon Musk and corporate special interests set fire to the American dream. | Joe Kerr is a Democrat, second-generation firefighter, and labor leader running for Congress in CA-40, one of the country's most competitive districts. You are receiving this email because of your support of Democrats in California and across the country. We need your help to flip this seat and take back the House, but if you'd like to unsubscribe,. = | Peter, Working families need a real fighter in Washington right now. Joe is stepping up to >> ▶️ Protect good union jobs ▶️ Lower costs so that families can afford to live with dignity ▶️ Defend the right to a living wage But Trump and his administration have a different plan. Their Project 2025 agenda is crystal clear: allow states to outlaw labor unions, roll back labor protections, and ignore the national minimum wage. And from what we’ve already seen, Trump is ready to follow through. We can’t let unelected billionaires like Elon Musk and corporate special interests set fire to the American dream. name: COS Team
subject: What progressives fear MORE than Trump
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuefznIteknop5I6ITm8qmankm&s=AELKGLFAMKMLNFJG)
---
| | | Fellow American,

There's one thing that progressives fear more than Donald Trump in the White House: Convention of States calling an Article V convention to drain the swamp... _permanently!_

Already, 250 Soros-funded organizations have announced a coalition in opposition to our efforts. That's bigger than any Leftist coalition in support of Joe Biden or Kamala Harris... _and yet they are unified against COSA!_

**We always knew that when we got to where we are today, with 19 states on board to call the Convention, we would get massive pushback from the radical left.**

It makes sense.

They KNOW that when we call an Article V convention, __We the People__ will be able to circumvent the behind-closed-door deals and power struggles that progressives have been using to push their agenda through the Swamp.

They KNOW that liberty-loving Americans are more accurately represented in the states outside of the beltway.

They KNOW that when an Article V convention is called, We the People will be able to discuss amendments that drain power from the Swamp and return it to the sovereign American people.

_**And they 're terrified.**_

**Fellow American, we 've discovered that Common Cause is buying ads on Google, disguising themselves to look like Convention of States, so that when people click on their links, they lead to misinformation about Article V.**

Thankfully, the _truth_ , the _Founding Fathers_ , and _the American people_ are on our side.

But Common Cause is still dangerous. They've successfully planted enough misinformation in the past to subvert votes. We cannot let them win this information war.

**We 're going on the offensive, but we need your help.** Right now, we're launching a digital ad campaign to reach every liberty-loving American and engage him or her as a petition signer in favor of calling an Article V convention.

Then we're **personally calling each and every petition signer** and encouraging him or her to get involved in the fight as a volunteer. These aren't just robo-calls. __These are calls from real COS volunteers who are connecting with people, discussing their interests and talents, and getting them plugged into the fight.__

We are cultivating a MOVEMENT with everyone from block walkers and phone bankers to people who are writing letters to the editor, meeting with legislators, and playing an active role in leading the COS passage efforts in their states.

Our growing grassroots movement is getting __engaged in the fight__ , preparing to __take on the opposition__ , and __honing their skills__ with frequent calls-to-action that push their states closer and closer to victory.

But as we're a non-profit, a strategic operation of this scale is only possible because of support from generous patriots like you. Right now, we need to raise $100,000 before midnight on February 28th, and we're falling behind on reaching our goal.

[**Will you chip in whatever you can today to help us combat the opposition and go on the offensive? Give today and every dollar will be DOUBLED!**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuefznIteknop5I7ITm8qmankm&s=AELKGLFAMKMLNFJG)
---
| [MATCH MY GIFT](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuefznIteknop5I8ITm8qmankm&s=AELKGLFAMKMLNFJG "MATCH MY GIFT")
---
| Fellow American, in a matter of days, dozens of states will kick off their legislative season and begin discussing and VOTING on the Convention of States Resolution. It only takes 34 states to call an Article V convention, and we're already over halfway to the finish line.

There's no better time to make a tangible impact in the fight!

Thank you for standing with us,

The COS Team
---
|
---
| | | |
---
---
| | |
---

5850 San Felipe Street Suite 580A, Houston, TX 77057**

name: Team Scholten
subject: Hillary’s announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Yesterday, Hillary announced her decision to not run for Senate and stay to defend Michigan’s 3rd District.

| Yesterday, Hillary announced her decision to not run for Senate and stay to defend Michigan’s 3rd District.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569098/535775685/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-03-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM1MWI1NC04MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tIri8yv1WkFFHH2BeLeZ0ymbTP1uzBzoRr113iekAkc=)
In case you missed it, check out Hillary’s message below >>
* * *

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569099/535775686/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-03-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM1MWI1NC04MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tIri8yv1WkFFHH2BeLeZ0ymbTP1uzBzoRr113iekAkc=)
---
| I have important news to share with you. Despite the speculation, I will not be running for Senate here in Michigan in 2026. I’m so proud of what we’re building here in West Michigan. This was a tough decision because I know what we’re building is not just what our community needs but what America needs–thoughtful, principled leadership that puts theatrics and partisanship aside and gets stuff done. But this is the right choice, and here’s why. I hope you’ll read through to the end.

Over the past few weeks, we’ve all experienced truly unprecedented attacks on our democratic institutions, critical social infrastructure, and one constitutional crisis after another. Many of you have expressed your concerns to your elected representatives and pushed those of us in these positions to step up. I couldn’t be more inspired by the thousands of you who are holding your representatives to account. **We need leaders who have been put in a position to lead,_to lead_. And that’s what I’m doing every day**–helping constituents resolve crises with a federal agency, introducing critical legislation to hold the administration accountable, and strategizing with my colleagues to continue to stand up for our country.

Far too often, politics can become about always looking for the next best thing in your career. But for me, it’s about looking for the next best thing for our community and our country. Service is at the heart of why I do this work, and it’s what’s driving this decision, too.

The state of Michigan is also experiencing a turning point. Trump won this swing state by a mere 80,000 votes, and we held last year’s Senate seat by only 18,000 votes. Now, in 2026, with FOUR open statewide seats, Michigan will once again be a critical and highly contested battleground.

**I choose to join Democrats in that battle by staying to defend this district. West Michigan was once a Republican stronghold, but we beat over 50 years of precedent to hold this seat and send a pro-choice woman back to Congress.**

My work here is not over. Together, we’ve fought to protect reproductive access, defend Social Security and Medicare, protect our Great Lakes, and fight for an economy we can all thrive in. Michigan’s 3rd District has been and will continue to be key in that progress. We can’t take it for granted.

**The next few years will require leaders in Congress who refuse to bow down to the Trump administration’s reckless agenda and be bought out by billionaires.[_With House Republicans holding a narrow majority in Congress, we have to hold steady, defend this seat, and fight for a majority that will stand up for all of us. I’m staying here, and I hope you’ll stand with me:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569100/535775687/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-03-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM1MWI1NC04MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tIri8yv1WkFFHH2BeLeZ0ymbTP1uzBzoRr113iekAkc=)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My Dad’s words of wisdom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I'm not fighting for a campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of Ohio.

I'm not fighting for a campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of Ohio.
I'm not fighting for a campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of Ohio.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-Q)
---
_**"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." **_
* * *
---
My father instilled those words of wisdom in me, and I've lived by them ever since.
Peter, I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'm not just talking about my own success. I'm talking about the future of our great state of Ohio. Born and raised in Cincinnati, I've spent my life building businesses, creating jobs, and fighting against the woke agenda.

The radical Left and their media allies have taken notice, dubbing me _"The C.E.O. of Anti-Woke."_

**But I'm not done yet. I'm just getting started.**

As Governor, I'll bring the same bold leadership I showed as a CEO to the statehouse. I'll fight for a state where merit matters, free speech reigns, and We the People are in charge. No more mediocrity. No more victimhood. No more excuses.

But I need your help to make it happen. I'm not some cookie-cutter politician who only cares about climbing the political ladder. I'm also not beholden to special interests, mega-donors, or the Establishment.

Because of that, my campaign is fueled by everyday folks like you doing what they can to help. Sometimes that means kicking in a few bucks. Sometimes more. Regardless of the amount, I would be deeply honored if you'd be willing to pitch in and help my campaign keep running through the finish line.

Your support - no matter what the amount - would be a huge help.

**[So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews. "So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.")**

I'm not fighting for some cheap campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of our state, and our country along with it. I'm also fighting for the state where my wife, Apoorva, and I are raising our two boys.

**I don 't want to just make Ohio stand out a little more - I want it to be OUTSTANDING! [So I'll ask you again: are you with me?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-9rEkIgRJ93eXnsO7w_ymA "So I'll ask you again: are you with me?")**
---

| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---

God Bless you and God Bless America,

Vivek Ramaswamy
Candidate for Governor of Ohio

---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._UXtzFeSAh6h2Oa3A)
---
**It 's Vivek Ramaswamy - I wrote you a personal message now that I OFFICIALLY launched my campaign:**

I am running to be a key partner to President Trump in my home state of Ohio. But I really need your help to win. That's why I am humbly asking you to join my inner circle and become a Founding Donor to my campaign today.

_It would be an honor to have you aboard._
---
| | [**JOIN MY INNER CIRCLE!**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._MBexG02DiA)
---
To victory,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: A test of our grassroots strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I want to send a message to Trump that I have a strong grassroots team standing with me that’s fighting to push back against his assault on everyday Americans. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569217/535776111/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250326_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2MjJmNC04MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeL-hDVbwQiu_9xlfxgVlZ66LUJHZBt7l-1iWyzzO8A=&emci=2b7622f4-810a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3a7622f4-810a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)
---
Folks — in a moment, **[I’m going to ask for your support ahead of our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2025.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569218/535776112/-255781199?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250326_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2MjJmNC04MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeL-hDVbwQiu_9xlfxgVlZ66LUJHZBt7l-1iWyzzO8A=)** Before I do, I want to explain why your contribution today is so important. Monday’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is the first one we’ve faced since Donald Trump returned to office — making this the biggest test yet of our grassroots team’s ability to stand up to Trump and his allies in Congress who want to slash spending for Social Security, Medicaid, and SNAP. After Monday, we’re required to file a fundraising report with the FEC that details how much money we’ve raised and how many grassroots donors have contributed to our movement. Those reports are public, meaning that Trump and his allies will be able to pour over our report and look for any signs of weakness that show we may not be up for the job. I’m fighting hard in Congress to lower costs, protect our public lands, and defend working families from the GOP’s reckless agenda — but I want to show Donald Trump that I’m not the only one working to hold his administration accountable. **I want to send him a message that proves I have a strong grassroots team standing with me that’s fighting to push back against his assault on everyday Americans.** **[Monday’s deadline marks our best chance yet to prove to Trump and his allies that we have what it takes to fight back. body:
Derek has proven he’s the exact type of leader we need in Congress right now, but in a district as competitive as CA-45, extreme Republicans and their billionaire buddies are already pushing hard to defeat him. And when deep-pocketed Republicans (including the world’s richest billionaire) are against you, it takes a big team to push back.

| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569237/535776218/1435289434?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.26_b1_as_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVjYjk4MTUtODIwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Evp5gpHSm_NO9UaW3hxBuIHlyax0dK5Rf_FuC4TJjc=)**
Hi there — it’s Senator Adam Schiff, here.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to support Derek Tran by [**making a $3 donation to his re-election campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569238/535776219/1943818218?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.26_b1_as_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVjYjk4MTUtODIwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Evp5gpHSm_NO9UaW3hxBuIHlyax0dK5Rf_FuC4TJjc=) today. But, first, here’s why I’m asking:

Derek made history last November by flipping California’s 45th District from red-to-blue in what ended up being one of the most competitive races in the country.

He won by only 653 votes.

Derek had to overcome millions (upon millions, upon millions) of dollars in outside spending — including millions from none other than Elon Musk — to come out on top.

So it came as no surprise when Derek took that same level of grit, determination, and fighting spirit to Congress.

He’s been leading the charge in the House to block Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s attempts to seize power and protect the Americans harmed by DOGE — especially our nation’s veterans. As a fellow Californian, I know he’s made me proud.

So look, Derek has proven he’s the exact type of leader we need in Congress right now, but in a district as competitive as CA-45, extreme Republicans and their billionaire buddies are already pushing hard to defeat him.

**And when deep-pocketed Republicans (including the world’s richest billionaire) are against you, it takes a big team to push back.**

[**That’s why I’m reaching out. I’m proud to support Derek’s campaign for re-election, and I’m asking you to join me. We need to ensure Derek has the resources he needs to keep CA-45 blue and keep leading the charge against the Trump Administration. Every dollar will make a difference, so thank you in advance.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569239/535776220/1943818218?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.26_b1_as_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVjYjk4MTUtODIwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Evp5gpHSm_NO9UaW3hxBuIHlyax0dK5Rf_FuC4TJjc=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Derek Tran will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104569240/535776221/1943818218?amount=3&amounts=1,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.26_b1_as_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVjYjk4MTUtODIwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Evp5gpHSm_NO9UaW3hxBuIHlyax0dK5Rf_FuC4TJjc=)

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to support Derek Tran by = today. But, first, here’s why I’m asking: Derek made history last November by flipping California’s 45th District from red-to-blue in what ended up being one of the most competitive races in the country. He won by only 653 votes. Derek had to overcome millions (upon millions, upon millions) of dollars in outside spending — including millions from none other than Elon Musk — to come out on top. So it came as no surprise when Derek took that same level of grit, determination, and fighting spirit to Congress. He’s been leading the charge in the House to block Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s attempts to seize power and protect the Americans harmed by DOGE — especially our nation’s veterans. As a fellow Californian, I know he’s made me proud. So look, Derek has proven he’s the exact type of leader we need in Congress right now, but in a district as competitive as CA-45, extreme Republicans and their billionaire buddies are already pushing hard to defeat him. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Hegseth has to resign.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The Signal incident is what happens when you have the most unqualified Secretary of Defense we've ever seen.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark. Take a look at this picture:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/hegseth_em_signup_march25_AB/?source=em250326-1-f&akid=6019%2E6688874%2Ek4xtP0)
That’s me, about 30 years ago. I flew 39 missions in Desert Storm. In one of them, I was nearly shot down by two different surface-to-air missiles. I don’t even want to consider what might’ve happened if the Iraqis had two hours notice before I took off from the USS Midway that day.
I’m telling you this because the Atlantic published the rest of the group chat. And those messages confirmed Hegseth did — without any doubt — send timetables and mission details that would be highly classified. He sent them two hours in advance. If the details of that chat were published or if an adversary had access to them, it would have put pilots at risk.
The Signal incident is what happens when you have the most unqualified Secretary of Defense we've ever seen.
We're lucky it didn't cost any servicemembers their lives, but for the safety of our military and our country, Secretary Hegseth needs to resign.
[**I need you with me on this. Sign on now and join me in demanding that Secretary Hegseth tender his resignation before he puts the lives of our troops at risk again.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/hegseth_em_signup_march25_AB/?source=em250326-1-f&akid=6019%2E6688874%2Ek4xtP0)
**[TELL HEGSETH TO RESIGN](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/hegseth_em_signup_march25_AB/?source=em250326-1-f&akid=6019%2E6688874%2Ek4xtP0)**
Thanks for your support on this.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6019%2E6688874%2Ek4xtP0).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

I’m telling you this because the Atlantic published the rest of the group chat. And those messages confirmed Hegseth did — without any doubt — send timetables and mission details that would be highly classified. He sent them two hours in advance. If the details of that chat were published or if an adversary had access to them, it would have put pilots at risk. The Signal incident is what happens when you have the most unqualified Secretary of Defense we've ever seen. We're lucky it didn't cost any servicemembers their lives, but for the safety of our military and our country, Secretary Hegseth needs to resign. Thanks for your support on this. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Post-Surgery Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I want to thank everyone that has reached out to offer their prayers and support in the weeks since my surgery. I’m pleased to report that my recovery is going exceedingly well.

I returned home from the hospital last weekend and am in the process of catching up on the many well wishes as well as a mountain of work and campaign texts and emails – patience please. At my post-surgical appointment this afternoon, the doctors confirmed that my recovery is proceeding as expected and reiterated their projection that I will be able to resume campaign travel and events in April.

I look forward to being back on the road shortly and continuing our campaign for common sense conservative solutions for the residents of the Commonwealth.

I also want to thank my campaign team and our incredible volunteers for your dedication, hard work, and unwavering support during this period. Your time, passion, and commitment have made all the difference—leading us to secure the first spot on the ballot and to being the only Republican candidate thus far to qualify for the Lieutenant Governor ballot. This success is yours, and I couldn’t have done it without you.

Thank you!
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

name: Senator Mark Huizenga
subject: District Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Huizenga - 3841 Butterworth Street SW, Walker, MI 49534[View email in browser](https://mailchi
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| Dear friends,
Serving as your State Senator is a privilege, and my commitment goes beyond representations of our community. My goal is to keep you well-informed and engaged in the latest developments in Lansing and our district. Stay tuned for updates, as transparency is of utmost importance to me. With each passing day is another opportunity to work towards bringing back a Republican Senate majority. I appreciate your ongoing support, and I am grateful for the opportunity to keep working hard for our community.
---
|
---
| **Let’s Deliver Real Results Without Raising Taxes**
After watching the governor’s State of the State last month, I’m more convinced than ever that we need real, bipartisan solutions — not more taxes. West Michigan families are already stretched thin, and raising fees on trash pickup, hunting and fishing licenses, and even miles driven is the wrong approach. Since taking office, the governor has added nearly 4,000 state employees, yet we’re still not seeing more efficient government.
I do support more funding for our schools — but that must come with accountability. Michigan ranks 44th in fourth grade reading. Our kids, teachers, and parents deserve better. I’ll keep fighting for road funding that doesn’t involve higher taxes — just smarter spending. If families can tighten their budgets, so can government.
---
|
---
| **Protecting Tips and Passed Real Sick Leave Reform**
I came to Lansing to solve real problems — and that’s exactly what we did. We listened to servers, bartenders, and small business owners across Michigan and delivered a bipartisan fix to save the tipped wage and protect tens of thousands of good-paying jobs.
This was a policy that was initiated by an out-of-state organization. Restaurant workers — especially those who would be directly impacted — did not ask for this change, nor did they support it. In the end, it came down to last-minute negotiations, and although I voted yes, it was only because the alternative proposal would have been so much worse.
At the same time, we passed a responsible paid sick leave plan that works for both workers and employers. Families get the support they need, and small businesses get the flexibility they rely on. This is what commonsense, bipartisan leadership looks like.
---
|
---
| **Thank You!**
Your efforts are truly impactful. By contributing, you’re helping us advocate for the changes and reforms our community needs. Every donation, no matter the size, fuels our mission and ensures a brighter future for all. Join us in shaping a better tomorrow; donate today!
---
| [Donate Here!](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=9a9d96e275&e=9ec31248a9)

|

Peter, here’s the deal:

The first fiscal quarter of 2025 is coming to a close, and we're coming up on our first major FEC fundraising deadline since Republicans took full control of our government— _and we need to show them we’re not backing down._

**Since their trifecta of power started, we’ve seen chaos like never before in each branch of our government: A president trying to defy the Constitution and the courts, a Republican-controlled Congress that refuses to stand up to him, and an agenda that puts Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and other wealthy special interests over working families.**

I’m doing my part to fight for Washington families by standing up for reproductive rights, defending public education, fighting for an economy that puts the people first, and working to put power back in the hands of Americans—but I can't do it alone.

clean_body: If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | | | | ---|--- | 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading. State Democrats are facing competitive special elections over the next few months. We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda. If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪 But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC. Together, we can power state Democrats to victory in elections that are typically underfunded and overlooked. 🗳️ | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | We hope you can step up today. 🙂 Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Wisconsin Supreme Court Call-a-Thon!

Jodi S.
from Indiana is this week's
$200 Cash Drawing Winner!

***
It Could be You Next Week!
There's still time to make a difference!

Join our Wisconsin Supreme Court Call-a-Thon from today until March 30th and help protect our values. The more calls you make, the
better your chances to win cash prizes!

How It Works:

📞 Every 100 calls = 1 entry into our weekly cash prize drawings (held on the 3/29).

📞 More calls = more chances to win! Example: 200 calls = 2 entries, 300 calls = 3 entries, etc.

📞 Minimum of 100 calls per week required to be entered into the week’s drawing.

clean_body: We have a winner for this week's $200 Cash Prize, but there's still a few days left to have a chance to win $1,000! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] WE HAVE A WINNER! [] Moms for America Action Announces this week's winner for the Wisconsin Supreme Court Call-a-Thon! Jodi S. from Indiana is this week's $200 Cash Drawing Winner! It Could be You Next Week! There's still time to make a difference! Join our Wisconsin Supreme Court Call-a-Thon from today until March 30th and help protect our values. body:
The Senate is back in session after a short recess, and Republicans are wasting no time.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104570779/535781669/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2JkZDgxMS04NzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RcXcs7X969BWAlWXcfxi8FIQaP_vdaKsvg4IpmRkkA=&emci=620ae709-870a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8cbdd811-870a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215)

| | The Senate is back in session after a short recess, and Republicans are wasting no time plowing ahead with their plan to slash critical programs that help ordinary Americans thrive to funnel huge tax cuts for the wealthy. Republicans are picking up where they left off — planning to sabotage Social Security and also use the reconciliation process to siphon off billions of dollars from vital lifelines, including cuts to Medicaid, housing, climate programs, and education. These are all-out attacks on working Americans to benefit the super-rich. **Make no mistake: families lose, billionaires win under the Republican MAGA plan.** I'm standing strong against everything Trump, Musk, and MAGA Republicans are trying to ram through. I will oppose the Republican cuts to life-saving programs with all I've got, and I'm asking you to join me in this fight. **When we fight back against Trump's agenda, we can win.** So, let's do this together. body:
| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5cece8436194524b15b234ac74acafe&_e=4RacwuwZXG2G51YzWLR4_rdmJtavVXO1qZcfZG0pA3Dzg6H9dRyrzkV8tKuwTQ5aSQtGhFckoYnMcQM0G7XPcaBSqAu4E0KFmmOurZg-g9zkJXUddi_ucnczYWcuaw45WeMKQ4C8ZrJbC6EnBggzbcsZyqzgrUHaRb_8ZOd0xtll1C9Kl1E6YHPNfG3ltSdCNj6gwxh25IsUKf7jILTu8pHz2_zV0Iy_NPhTg8z7EJzJAHwY8zKsfeyL6Kl7mj7I)

The path to real change in Washington goes through the U.S. Senate. President Trump's executive orders are only temporary and cannot be enshrined into law without Senate approval. And good judges who don't engage in lawfare cannot be seated without Senate confirmation. **Conservatives are making steady gains in the Senate, but the biggest obstacle is the Democrats' massive cash advantage.** In the past four election cycles, Democrat Senate candidates have massively out-raised their Republican opponents. The numbers are staggering. Just look at the chart below.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5cece8436194524b15b234ac74acafe&_e=4RacwuwZXG2G51YzWLR4_rdmJtavVXO1qZcfZG0pA3Dzg6H9dRyrzkV8tKuwTQ5aSQtGhFckoYnMcQM0G7XPcaBSqAu4E0KFmmOurZg-g9zQfXUkLXgBHKZtA2ds5TriCkooegquaNKzXCHwwC1gUaxiyuBfVM0tsy4jrHbr_ovWq2_EZ8k38QDu8OYVJZ1Y1Br9gWnI_nGO6dzPFYh1KJZ8jLdr4l3RGsNuAdUDdFS3FJheKvRL7Z55S6xvmtU6)
---
In 2018, Democrats beat Republicans by $220 million. In 2020, they bested our candidates by $376 million. In 2022, their advantage was $212 million, and in 2024 it was a whopping $402 million.[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5cece8436194524b15b234ac74acafe&_e=4RacwuwZXG2G51YzWLR4_rdmJtavVXO1qZcfZG0pA3Asqrn1mqrmyNz0t42KPpCOynM3jGDowMYFG4M9eGf_khlNJnC8FJWzfV1Hzwzg7TOuTiRJkrSBPM-eOnms4RBzCXBYmBYdkYPxYdcVtJQFBfR3GYcTj2P3syTY02dO_ESxFOdzChsg3r8irkdVJPYDUC-SuGkeHoZ7Q4QtY12WGLVL9msNzeRpZ83sO-R2PaSwWcLq7lPMT2DR2YDSM47i) **Freedom loving Americans must reverse this trend or we will never see the changes we need to create a lasting legacy of freedom.** With Democrats in disarray, we believe Senate conservatives can close the cash gap, but only if we start working now. **[**Please take action by contributing to our supported candidates.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5cece8436194524b15b234ac74acafe&_e=4RacwuwZXG2G51YzWLR4_rdmJtavVXO1qZcfZG0pA3Dzg6H9dRyrzkV8tKuwTQ5aSQtGhFckoYnMcQM0G7XPcaBSqAu4E0KFmmOurZg-g9xjzGPIw1EAet5nZA0vMpTVRcItGoLG10Fm4FXfFDrmWi7Wqzo6MBbrQT-TKNdQGHpWFYzeqKsWogkMSoGnFa88juaWYLEOT5tZVYGPuVuT-2pflyJOqISgojNKytiAL5TIT5QtepVf8GfwkEXuFSuq)** These candidates are proven conservatives that we can count on to fight for our principles and values. ▶︎ Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) ▶︎ Sen. Roger Marshall (R-KS) ▶︎ Sen. Bill Hagerty (R-TN) ▶︎ Sen. Cynthia Lummis (R-WY) ▶︎ Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) ▶︎ Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO) ▶︎ Sen. Ron Johnson (R-WI) ▶︎ Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) You can contribute directly to multiple campaigns with a single online contribution, and SCF will pay all processing fees so the candidates receive 100% of your contributions. **Also, one of our top supporters (_Mike Rydin from Houston_) will match your candidate contributions – dollar for dollar – if you donate before the April 1st FEC deadline.** **[**So, please help us wipe out the Democrats' cash advantage and double your impact by contributing today!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5cece8436194524b15b234ac74acafe&_e=4RacwuwZXG2G51YzWLR4_rdmJtavVXO1qZcfZG0pA3Dzg6H9dRyrzkV8tKuwTQ5aSQtGhFckoYnMcQM0G7XPcaBSqAu4E0KFmmOurZg-g9zyQeyEZ3seF6uDcAbvBrcUQgwTqswMSeltOQ8fjK78hazFf87ZbJjrhQh2MAFv1SKuljExCdYX7HNbg9CeW2WosOQYp75T6O38vD5jaWyfC7HKmdfWO07Z8nOCYa0ewNg4z_n7skPNo9bkIw8XZ5ck)** Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Freedom loving Americans must reverse this trend or we will never see the changes we need to create a lasting legacy of freedom. With Democrats in disarray, we believe Senate conservatives can close the cash gap, but only if we start working now. subject: URGENT: Worker leader Jeanette Vizguerra detained by ICE — take action
body:
This is urgent.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104570932/535782249/664783965?ms=032625_freeJeanette_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FmZGExNy04ODBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-2doAdUQlkFumPen6cZx0VgapACFK_CPZuaMVyXN2E=&emci=4866d3ec-750a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=acafda17-880a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)
Peter — **Jeanette Vizguerra, a longtime member of our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance (NDWA), and a worker leader and activist, was just taken by ICE without warning last week.**
Jeanette has called Colorado home for over two decades and now could be torn away from her children, grandchildren and the community.
**This is urgent. Jeanette is in detention right now and facing deportation.****[**_Add your name to stand with Jeanette and call for her immediate release._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104570933/535782250/-928112486?ms=032625_freeJeanette_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FmZGExNy04ODBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-2doAdUQlkFumPen6cZx0VgapACFK_CPZuaMVyXN2E=&emci=4866d3ec-750a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=acafda17-880a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)**
**_**********__[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104570934/535782251/-928112486?ms=032625_freeJeanette_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FmZGExNy04ODBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-2doAdUQlkFumPen6cZx0VgapACFK_CPZuaMVyXN2E=&emci=4866d3ec-750a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=acafda17-880a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Jeanette is a longtime community leader and member of NDWA and the American Friends Service Committee, as well as a former SEIU member and co-founder of the Metro Denver Sanctuary Coalition. She has always wanted what all mothers want — safety for her family, herself, and her community.
**Jeanette was targeted by immigration authorities in 2017 and spent three months living in sanctuary in a Denver church to avoid being deported and separated from her family.**
Since then, she's spent years supporting hundreds of other mothers and workers with their own fights to remain, even being recognized as one of **Time Magazine's 100 most influential people in the world for her work.**
Jeanette deserves to be home with her family. We will not allow our families and communities to be torn apart. Our commitment to our loved ones and neighbors, to each other, is greater than fear. Add your name to urgently call for Jeanette's immediate release.
****__****
**_**********__[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104570935/535782253/-928112486?ms=032625_freeJeanette_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FmZGExNy04ODBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-2doAdUQlkFumPen6cZx0VgapACFK_CPZuaMVyXN2E=&emci=4866d3ec-750a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=acafda17-880a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Let's be clear: The abduction and disappearing of people from our communities is an assault on our families, and our right to live safe, dignified lives.
We will not allow our communities to be torn apart, or our friends, neighbors and loved ones to be terrorized for speaking out. We will protect each other.
Thank you for standing with Jeanette,
Care in Action

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[exposed the woke CEO of PBS, Paula Kerger, for"lying under oath"](https://substack.com/redirect/a8feeba1-a7dd-48b7-a761-916f0a49612f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about showing drag queen programing to children.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a8feeba1-a7dd-48b7-a761-916f0a49612f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a8feeba1-a7dd-48b7-a761-916f0a49612f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The tense moment took place during a DOGE Committee hearing featuring the CEOs of publicly funded NPR and PBS as witnesses.
"PBS was the outlet that featured the child predator drag queen on the education show for kids ages 3-8 years old!" Greene said. "Ms. Kerger lied under oath and said that it wasn't featured on PBS. This show was aired on PBS on April 1, 2021,... lets go ahead and watch this video!"
Greene played the video for Kerger to watch in front of congress, "The hips go swish, swish, swish, the shoulders go shimmy, shimmy, that's repulsive!"
The irate congresswoman **[continued to call out the lack of any negative coverage of Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/a3d972eb-9672-413c-9667-6f006afeaafe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on the publicly funded network, which is supposed to be prohibited from harboring political bias.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5c5dba9f-81b2-42b8-a22f-1133b0972983?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"NPR and PBS have become radical left-wing echo chambers for a narrow audience of mostly wealthy, white urban liberals and progressives who generally look down on and judge rural America," Greene went off.
Watch MTG grill the heck out of the CEOs for wasting and abusing American tax dollars on ideologically-driven programming.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a3d972eb-9672-413c-9667-6f006afeaafe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The tense moment took place during a DOGE Committee hearing featuring the CEOs of publicly funded NPR and PBS as witnesses. "PBS was the outlet that featured the child predator drag queen on the education show for kids ages 3-8 years old!" Greene said. "Ms. Kerger lied under oath and said that it wasn't featured on PBS. This show was aired on PBS on April 1, 2021,... lets go ahead and watch this video!" Greene played the video for Kerger to watch in front of congress, "The hips go swish, swish, swish, the shoulders go shimmy, shimmy, that's repulsive!" The irate congresswoman on the publicly funded network, which is supposed to be prohibited from harboring political bias. "NPR and PBS have become radical left-wing echo chambers for a narrow audience of mostly wealthy, white urban liberals and progressives who generally look down on and judge rural America," Greene went off. body:
The Looney Left is 10 exits past crazy, and they're clinging to power like a dog with a bone.

| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/phnfxcsk_DcbvN7ao7V9CoPk_4btkEXcNkgfhr_lc4OdSxZNbq6MnNVcU15bnu1v-LimFcDekZ8wcO1f9AuKGTNJUhyBeqKoaVwbPbFRQdhOUhxT7B3OUwqEy8MSLbnFMcFnb1ATVo7wWWvEZbtcP5_20tjp6Wg6l7aSIz8l_DZebDhR8remrYawkfx5HhhJAzII_scvhFqebuNq5V3u0ZiO8IVq_GySrjW1XID89fVUfUTaWI19xHtI9nu6LCCt7GPYYjonDNhAwNevkleC3vSPsXf770ZDz_nHZ5DOp3DW4j25wv8S77brRFgm9xMsL6H1-JOaKA6U1Q2KIv9SK2yp7xuqTZTIY1SIvU4m_jkzBV6KPpgqp4N1LdqpSGE9Xf8O3O638L7E868QV2bovugtyu0_M0HGn9CQKta9bpTxBu2LSzZVeF7IsUJT2aVAu-cDkGo9Ig/a2PNdm9wKXVOUJu1CZdMopmdN6neAKDf/7)

Folks,

I'm gonna lay it out for you straight—the Looney Left is 10 exits past crazy, and they're clinging to power like a dog with a bone. But here's the truth: **Elon Musk is convinced we can reach 60 Republican Senators in the Senate, and I reckon I'm right there with him.**

Now, I don't know about you, but I'm tired of this wild ride. We've got the momentum, but we can't afford to sit on our hands. The Left's got their britches all in a knot, and if we don't act fast, they'll be running this country straight into the ground.

If we hit 60 Republican Senators, we'll finally have the power to shut down that reckless spending, stop the socialist agenda, and put the brakes on their madness. **[But we need you to pitch in—right here, right now — to make it happen.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/OoF40k218mtZY7NQD0eW-wxjH8y4i3sSBXgK6a5QBe_5VXFBraiv2dXUF1o8eaJy75mSgzdayyuqEyNdwWzZcmzB7Ag2Prz3YMEfTs0RTPQXkStSPUNvnWewunNcHtnduaal7B_F7cOA-plrDKMr72gtnFhO1g9155JDz9b9hl15jXOvIRnCmJbF8P0UOVLrqrPtAwKSH91-UxDj94WhgoGnGrLBclhxRejkafuJW3KeuTKSwvjja53zqRCmhi16bSOu_cCq5_gTQmRe6jhPWsMgDeN25wG0J-OVwXRG_4xBbkA1TsIhr956oa4VkslMHVZ8PEw6tM0GmHbdLCcAfbRtRW3Eiq5jfXGt-nycNZI2gg_GhYzlkFzCQue5Kf3J7VIuOf357B2jTjUyEa6rhblp8v2mB5plRzp-BMsEXMzOn79zf7SjpSxq6C7iwh1wK-gASV-5SA/V1Dw19WecIYt7fdfimWs69trH8VpW3eH/7)**

**[CLICK HERE TO HELP US REACH 60 SENATORS!](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/_8Fxf75pzI4LeV9E0oASuHcZTkqbzBqQU0kldCSGaQ1WOjunjZDHYrUJE6AHgf1HztmFlUAXVoISyO0LshenQS6gBcZ5siOfDNhwaUnQBIDOdE2cqtDqWgoijvm4ZJfJU1Zbp49w5k1Z2bnGuEyatU1itTHKryQf6P3UYARVP0c_wdAxcnFM_7CAyZqS-qAU6NU2FVxbJmvYCTOe6D0UMXl6nCc7JNJ5FhcMqqjKOslkjqn9hFsDfVyi1Rz3B80QfsMTrZGtU4hjl4FSNE2S553YSIRxmht_oG217Hofztzl0xIJVtItDBZpKLPo8z4C5t6b1ILluACk_DiWD8SnKqr30VJAdxoR8nD_OhYZdMltDn_Nq-blaGm7o-5kO6rxtYxw_ELbvPY9EnGj6bLKct6hg4ABSS7He81b3D4pvikO_an34NvI3O-dNac5W3TQpicVK4dF_w/zb45jejUQGCT3GchQ335ChcYpvTFYVWI/7)**
_We've got a fight ahead of us, and I'm not one to back down from a challenge. I've been taking on the Looney Liberal circus for years, and I don't plan on stopping now. name: WisDems
subject: Ever wonder why Elon Musk is trying to buy the WI Supreme Court race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We’ll break it down for you:
| Elon Musk is dropping MILLIONS of dollars into the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. And we know what you’re thinking:

_Why would a billionaire oligarch with near-total control over the President of the United States need to buy himself a Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin?_

So, before we ask you to [_**split a $25 donation between WisDems and Fight for Progress PAC**_](https://fight4progress.org/wisdems?t=k9rIf3WVhc4a&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-26_1&amount=25) to fight back against Musk’s hostile takeover of our state, we’ll tell you.

Elon Musk and Donald Trump want a MAGA Supreme Court to ensure that:

❌ Maps are **rigged to lock in power** for far-right legislators;
❌ They can **overturn elections** when they don’t like the results;
❌ They are able to **suppress voters** that don’t kiss their ring.

**And with the People v. Musk, we’re going to stop them.** [_**Will you split a $25 grassroots donation between WisDems and Fight for Progress PAC to help keep Elon Musk and Donald Trump from buying this race for their puppet, Brad Schimel?**_](https://fight4progress.org/wisdems?t=u90ICQmjEpxH&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-26_1&amount=25)

| | | [ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://fight4progress.org/wisdems?t=eUx1wmJL9Lo5&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-26_1&amount=25)

But we the people are ready to fight back, and if we all stand together, we will send Elon Musk and Brad Schimel packing. [_**Chip in $25 right now, split between WisDems and Fight for Progress PAC, to stand with WisDems in the People v. Thanks, Peter!

_WisDems_

name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, U.S. Army (Ret.)
subject: I am appalled at what Secretary Hegseth has done to the finest Military on earth.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Our very challenged Secretary of Defense has shown that he has no respect for the position he holds and does not stand up well when compared to previous defense secretaries like Hagel, Gates and Austin.
#
Peter, Paul Eaton here.
I’ll keep this brief.
Our very challenged Secretary of Defense has shown that he has no respect for the position he holds and does not stand up well when compared to previous defense secretaries like Hagel, Gates and Austin. Through the use of applications known to be vulnerable to hacking and the sharing of classified information, he recklessly endangered the lives of Americans in uniform. This is the clearest indication of recklessness and incompetence.
I am appalled at what he is doing to the finest Military on earth.
Pete Hegseth was woefully unqualified when he was sworn in, and he has no place continuing to serve as Secretary of Defense today. Join VoteVets in demanding that he resign, immediately.
[**Join me and VoteVets and call upon Pete Hegseth to spare our Troops further risk by resigning his office, immediately.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250326_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?source=em250326-1-90&akid=34287%2E3013755%2ERvB4YV)
| [HEGSETH: RESIGN](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250326_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?source=em250326-1-90&akid=34287%2E3013755%2ERvB4YV)
---
Gratefully,
Paul Eaton
Senior Advisor, VoteVets
Maj. Gen., U.S. Army, (ret.)

name: Mark Takano
subject: Chuck Schumer was wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Democrats should not have rolled over.
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/wlRSTIozoKYQ?t=9jbjDViv6AQF)
---
Peter — I'm a Democrat, and I'm saying that Chuck Schumer was wrong. He gave Trump what we wanted by voting in favor of the MAGA plan to avert a shutdown.

The Trump administration is ripping away _Medicaid and Social Security services_ , _abolishing critical government agencies_ , and _firing hundreds of thousands of federal workers._

But without question, the most anger I’ve heard from people in my district is not directed at Trump or Elon – it’s directed at Democrats. **I don’t blame them.****

People want to know that Democrats are fighting for them, that we’re just as scared of the Trump admin chaos as they are.** But more than that, Democrats need to offer a clear rebuttal and path forward, not just empty words that don’t meet the moment.

**So let me be clear, Peter – I am pissed off. I’m deeply worried for the future of our democracy. And I’m fighting with every fiber of my being to stand up to Trump’s authoritarianism.

But I have to level with you, Peter.** Democrats don’t control any branch of government. So our paths to stopping the Trump steamroller are extremely limited. So now more than ever, I’m relying on your grassroots strength.

I need you to raise your voice.
I need you to talk with your friends, family, coworkers.
I need you to get outside of your bubbles.

Volunteer, protest, and yes, chip in a few bucks at a time to help Democrats gain back power. I know you’re angry. I know most messages asking for money are quickly moved to the trash folder. **But our movement is clear-eyed and depends on your action in this moment.**

[**So I’m asking you directly: Can you chip in $7 today to help Democrats build a truly grassroots coalition of supporters with a clear-eyed vision to flip the House and end the Trump chaos? Please, Peter - any support you give will make a difference. Can I count on you to step up? »**](https://takano4ca.us/l/BCkZXwi7DdN8) | [CHIP IN $7 TO FLIP THE MAGA MAJORITY! »](https://takano4ca.us/l/D7yqRzghEQp8)
---
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/9IqdVSkmvR34)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/M2Nsqu5i5aDJ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/maIkc2oSYkjs)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/pIntDDMen77G)
[Or a custom donation »](https://takano4ca.us/l/ETygCJhkv23r)
I can’t thank you enough for all of your support.

Mark
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/rr4AFAAqpx9x?t=YVF90jpTT3s7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a[monthly contribution by clicking here](https://takano4ca.us/l/p1DEwJeJnbUp?t=hzaGzmPpUju9).**

subject: Our campaign was just featured in The Washington Post!
body:
|
#
I wanted to reach out personally to share that our campaign was featured in _The Washington Post_ today!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104571177/535783190/-1606559029?refcode=em-3.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTExYzM3Zi04OTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yb8VBQ39yda_oi-xj2C-J4RaHcRrWNedQn2vKeVmHs=) Everyone is looking for answers for how to respond to this administration, and in time, what we need to do to win back the House. **Here’s my take: we need to talk about real things, with a real agenda to improve people’s lives. We can’t just be against the things we don’t like.** We need a positive vision for how we will address the challenges working families face. We need to talk about Americans being able to work just one job and build a middle-class life, lowering the costs of child care and prescription drugs, protecting fundamental rights, and making sure everyone can access quality, affordable health care. We have the ideas – we need to run on them and then get them done. That’s what our campaign is about. That’s why we won a district that Donald Trump carried by two points. And I’m so heartened to see people taking notice. But our work is far from done. The spotlight on our coalition is a testament to the growing demand for a new way forward. A way that doesn’t rely on empty rhetoric but on bold policies that actually improve people’s lives. **[This campaign isn’t just about winning an election – it’s about building a future where working people have a real shot. But to do that, we need to keep up the fight, and we can’t do it without you. name: Social Security ALERT (via Team Gillibrand)
subject: be one of 25,000 signatures to protect Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight.
|
---
| | **🔴 Alert from The Hill: DOGE cuts could soon trigger Social Security system ‘collapse’**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are attempting to slash Social Security benefits to offer massive tax breaks to their billionaire buddies.

_We cannot allow them to get away with this._

[**_25,000 signatures needed by midnight: Sign on now to show the groundswell of support for protecting Social Security and standing against Trump and Musk’s attacks >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104571415/535783944/1780127252?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.03.26_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI0OWMwYS04YTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=77wEszN0JPf-h5oWThU0TEfEkh4gIFCzL0BDTefM3vc=&emci=e1c4e84c-460a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=31b49c0a-8a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) | | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104571417/535783946/1780127252?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.03.26_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI0OWMwYS04YTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=77wEszN0JPf-h5oWThU0TEfEkh4gIFCzL0BDTefM3vc=&emci=e1c4e84c-460a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=31b49c0a-8a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104571419/535783948/1780127252?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.03.26_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI0OWMwYS04YTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=77wEszN0JPf-h5oWThU0TEfEkh4gIFCzL0BDTefM3vc=&emci=e1c4e84c-460a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=31b49c0a-8a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029)

Social Security is a lifeline for over 70 million Americans — especially seniors.

On Day One of the Trump administration, Elon Musk made Social Security a #1 target for his massive budget cuts.

He ordered DOGE to access sensitive Social Security payment systems, set plans to cut 10% of the Social Security Administration’s workforce and initiated the closure of 47 field offices across the country.

**_He even called Social Security “the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time.”_**

This is nothing more than an attempt to offer gigantic tax breaks to billionaires — at the expense of hardworking Americans.

clean_body: This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight. | | | 🔴 Alert from The Hill: DOGE cuts could soon trigger Social Security system ‘collapse’ Donald Trump and Elon Musk are attempting to slash Social Security benefits to offer massive tax breaks to their billionaire buddies. We cannot allow them to get away with this. | | Social Security is a lifeline for over 70 million Americans — especially seniors. On Day One of the Trump administration, Elon Musk made Social Security a #1 target for his massive budget cuts. He ordered DOGE to access sensitive Social Security payment systems, set plans to cut 10% of the Social Security Administration’s workforce and initiated the closure of 47 field offices across the country. He even called Social Security “the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time.” This is nothing more than an attempt to offer gigantic tax breaks to billionaires — at the expense of hardworking Americans. That’s why Democrats are fighting to protect it: | Thank you, Team Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Ilhan
subject: Ilhan isn’t afraid (unlike the GOP)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
During our town hall meeting last week, we heard it straight from voters of all backgrounds
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1560%2E791427%2EBI8XAU)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250326-1-150&t=2&akid=1560%2E791427%2EBI8XAU)
Friend — Unlike her Republican colleagues in Congress, Ilhan isn’t afraid to meet directly with her community.
And during our town hall meeting last week, we heard it straight from voters of all backgrounds: **It’s time for Democrats to fight like hell against Trump’s agenda and for the working class of this country.**
We can’t be the party that lays down and lets Trump and Elon Musk go around the Constitution, acting like dictators.
We can’t be the party that lets billionaires and big corporations gut public services and enrich themselves at the expense of working families.
**We can’t be the party that does nothing and stands for nothing. We have to fight for our values.**
And that’s what Ilhan plans to do, and it’s what she’s done since she first came to Congress in 2019. We need bold, progressive leadership now more than ever.
**[If you agree that its time for Democrats to do EVERYTHING they can to fight back, please make a quick contribution to our campaign. We are working to build our capacity for grassroots action and to organize more voters with our message, but we need your support to get it done.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250326-1-150&t=3&akid=1560%2E791427%2EBI8XAU)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Trump is criminalizing free speech
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250326-1287-foote&t=1001&akid=1287%2E342411%2E7xolE- ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Mahmoud Khalil — a graduate student, a green card holder, and a passionate
activist for Palestinian rights — is now behind bars. His crime? Speaking
out. The Trump administration is targeting him for standing up for
justice. This is terrifying. If they can disappear a legal permanent
resident, married to a U.S. citizen, what’s stopping them from coming for
anyone who dares to dissent? We can’t afford to wait and find out.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/em20250326-em-solidarity-signon/?source=em20250326-1287&akid=1287%2E342411%2E7xolE- ]This abuse of power cannot become our new normal. Add your name to our
petition of solidarity demanding Mahmoud’s immediate release.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/em20250326-em-solidarity-signon/?source=em20250326-1287&akid=1287%2E342411%2E7xolE- ][IMG]

Mahmoud Khalil spoke out for justice – and now he’s being illegally
detained by the Trump administration. Trump himself has said, "this is the
first arrest of many to come." His administration is following the
authoritarian playbook step by step: silence them, imprison them, make
them disappear.

This moment is bigger than Mahmoud — this is about all of us. Trump is
escalating his war on free speech, criminalizing dissent, and attacking
our fundamental rights.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/em20250326-em-solidarity-signon/?source=em20250326-1287&akid=1287%2E342411%2E7xolE- ]Will you sign our petition to demand Mahmoud’s immediate release and
send a message that we won’t stand for this abuse of power?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/em20250326-em-solidarity-signon/?source=em20250326-1287&akid=1287%2E342411%2E7xolE- ]Add your name ››

Together,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1287%2E342411%2E7xolE-

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Washington D.C. is still abuzz with SignalGate, as Goldberg releases the full text thread, Gabbard, Ratcliffe and Patel testify on Capitol Hill. Many of the points that both Director of National Intelligence Gabbard and CIA Director Ratcliffe made over the past 2 days should have squashed the debacle, the liberal media is still trying to paint it as an atrocious security breach. On today's show I take you inside the communication channels of our government and what is deemed appropriate according the to Federal Records Act. President Trump signed an executive order to protect the integrity of our elections, including the need for a federally issued ID in order to vote. Senator Ron Johnson from Wisconsin joins me to discuss government spending. Senator Johnson is a successful businessman and has 2 op-eds in the Wall Street Journal that map out how the government can return to pre-pandemic spending and reduce the $7.3 trillion mess the Biden administration left. Johnson wants to remove automatic tax increases, get spending under control and start to focus on "one, big, beautiful bill."

Senator Ron Johnson
U.S. Senator | Wisconsin

Senator Johnson is a successful businessman and has 2 op-eds in the Wall Street Journal that map out how the government can return to pre-pandemic spending and reduce the $7.3 trillion mess the Biden administration left. Johnson wants to remove automatic tax increases, get spending under control and start to focus on "one, big, beautiful bill." Laura Gillen, I wanted to share why your support is so important right now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104572587/535787734/849351480?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-03-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTgwMTdlZC04ZDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LykiVrnD69XgrlPt2FMRuNtP6agx8H8CcSZHOydJZnQ=)

Her vision for the future—one filled with hope and empathy—is exactly what we need right now. We can’t afford to let our opponents define this race—especially this early in the campaign. Together, we can set the record straight and make sure Abigail wins in November, but we need the resources to do it.= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

body:
