name: Sarah McBride
subject: How your $5 can make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Sarah’s counting on grassroots supporters like you who pitch in $5 at a time.
#
Would you believe us if we told you that a $5 donation could make a big difference in Sarah’s fight for working families?
* What if we told you that your $5 could help us **spread our message to dozens of voters online** and hold Trump’s billionaire-led administration accountable for gutting the federal government?

* Or that $5 would help us lay the groundwork now to reelect Sarah and take back the House of Representatives in 2026?

* What if you knew that your $5 donation would be **combined with dozens or even hundreds of others** , helping us to reach our ambitious $110,000 goal for the first quarter of the year?

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Republicans want to cut $230 billion from this critical program.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104573338/535790194/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250326SNAP_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg4ZTRjOC04ZjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8n5FaAJ1LHdR4R1zW4inyBZPvjMWm7L_ocec6z58Xs=) Peter,

Last week, I participated in the SNAP Challenge – where I went to a local grocery store and attempted to do a week’s worth of shopping on just a $42 budget to illustrate how difficult it is for Northeast Ohio families who rely on nutrition assistance programs.

I did this because the proposed Republican budget that was in the House last month called for _$230 billion_ in funding cuts for SNAP, which would put over 42 million Americans at risk of food insecurity, including 180,000 in OH-11 alone who rely on SNAP. The Republican budget bill was disgusting and shameful – put forward so Mar-a-Lago elites could buy more yachts at the expense of the American people.

Here was the verdict: It was stressful shopping on the SNAP budget – which is something that thousands of my neighbors face every day. **Instead of focusing on needless tax cuts for the rich, Republicans should be focusing on strengthening SNAP.**

But here’s my vow: I’ll fight these cuts every step of the way. SNAP is a lifeline for folks who need a little extra help putting food on the table, and this small benefit should be preserved, especially at a time when Trump tariffs threaten to make life even less affordable.

[**Join me in fighting back against the MAGA agenda by pitching in $5 or whatever you can afford today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104573339/535790195/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250326SNAP_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg4ZTRjOC04ZjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8n5FaAJ1LHdR4R1zW4inyBZPvjMWm7L_ocec6z58Xs=)

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

That’s why Josh is in this race: to be the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor who solves problems and gets things done. – Team Gottheimer | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign , or to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

name: Attorney General Kris Mayes
subject: I want to hear from you about how things are going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kris Mayes for Arizona
body:
Please open and respond to help my campaign

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/P1KNjM3cW3VPzVF3u-wrvQ~~/AAUS1hA~/avWD4cBgbvj-BRdSoNIH3ghZ2caRL8cCc9Wna1odPLBxp4F_vFDlYl_QzWRH7br_d_WKtAZtf3wU7MYgor1FdGs13L-D1s09zt6JJcZKU5w~)
| | Peter,
It’s Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. I’m reaching out with a very special request – I want to know what you think.

Now you may be thinking – I don’t live in Arizona. But right now, our situation isn’t affecting just one state. We’re in very uncertain times.

The truth is, I’ve been fighting hard against Donald Trump and Elon Musk, beating back their unconstitutional measures at least six times so far as I write this. Who knows, by the time it reaches your inbox, I’ll probably have taken action again.

I believe this is so important, I invited Attorneys General from three other states to join my first town hall on this issue. I’m going to have more town halls, and if I need to, I’ll head to other states to listen.

Because these actions aren’t just affecting Arizonans, and I’m filing lawsuits to stop Musk and Trump, I feel like I need to hear from everyone. I want to hear how you’re feeling, and what steps you think we should take next.

I’ll make it simple. If you want to fill out this form, **[click right here and fill it out](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ze5RdUifLfTtBbAsbo399g~~/AAUS1hA~/4ZD8mpniiv-qnta6MgXuioY1Uhkiig4LrD-OwvkqyazsZdVZPKIn31Pwxi88ufAbvANdhVSslNJ-RvOu4drjYUDl6d6WN9Y_E7hLecpbu3mx0ZJNjxy4AL-NuL5ZqP5XN1R6voSOurgM1RuXOgX2-bdon5109q7qXNeR8lYH5E25XEeH41MdIHodf8CbB0LdiGbqrVB7fqzpL6IdcgR__92BgT4ItFAEGTYAdNfJ3MIaIaROdPR-_TB_wkPf5_WEbeVtwe4QfnVrmfe8CbZDOQ~~).** Or, if you want to just hit reply, our campaign will review your message that way.
| | [Give feedback](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/V5_ZbXpbCNxP8vc-tUVmkg~~/AAUS1hA~/77zq2KiGhEv8ChRwoj7joJb5LK9Dq_02zE7_VXAikpO0kdqSW6jjgkDHOMBHel39_9dN7aNm5tRjyAYFEIxDv-P0EaE_00uOXJLWICC0zjqiPqXVNjOJEM8vNoBuCoX-fFTz5pSTOg30Y0W5JrjqpJpsVH7fa_i9vxDyeYx2c-A_OV3crle1YqEGdujiwQqx6WWMcLMbS6OrhbgwlymSsQcPZMLBBgJsl0c4mAUPaSVDIAQWVpVjCmqiIU1VSBSxrXFtcGprUQLFhsfrRwAk_Q~~)
---
**It’s really important we hear from you one way or another**. First, I want to make sure I’m always working for the people. And second, it’s clear the tech industry is bending to achieve the current president’s favor, and we want to make sure people continue to receive our messages. Filling out the form or replying helps ensure that.

Thanks for your help,**
**
-Kris

| [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Ejp0gcmTedcbYjPVWHao-A~~/AAUS1hA~/iycV7E580doF2nZocZRADd9VeoybGm0XFq_NWVQAB77T9g12mY6hBqfrZZWpDN_2YGDSzGWkx8Xefqt1GkMGl1lFBOYKXO-gErUz1b9HZCY_2fqNDXo52voYrz35IoQX) | [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/cJLiFLyX0-hYfYinix8vBg~~/AAUS1hA~/67_kwvSHuRFPXD4dUYIbWZa-oFIjttMZ_7U2AjXJhne9-yGW2eJEta0Nn_FUDucMYJP_jReM8snu8HjJ2LeLCR-0AplNKxiN8Kje4qlfsXY~) | [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/mbIu0ZDMkuDIR5PbjU6Wpw~~/AAUS1hA~/hIxQoz_sxpd5839i8sNyqfGbLN0OatI81PL3T183WaGtnnHDmmsD_v4vU3RluufTZKZEsvrwIBXBtTds9-0uZBbpJ9On_vqTj6-LJ66x8vBXfHMIHFqZjz_KgbQrmkOu) | [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/l9Bz36o2MLiryN9aQMr1aA~~/AAUS1hA~/lsvjeEVC8ZXDndgX3h_hNYhMj0Uoq-U6QPKeqw-mncBNbPKOTfNzLg4UJlvNH_ZgjxmyAjPz3zv8dwiabfIK-ChXMg5muJi1cZEbYbD-_4-0mDkAktlU6hOjpqM-uKxQT4MysQHcSrfAiwCrbODOtQ~~) | [](krismayes.com)

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. NOOOO! [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60363?t=3&akid=22952%2E4449941%2EKUlEcE) Trump must be stopped NOW before it's too late.

This is setting us up for a CONSTITUTIONAL CRISIS.

**BUT here's the good news:** Chief Justice John Roberts of the Supreme Court just SLAMMED him for his comments: [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60363?t=4&akid=22952%2E4449941%2EKUlEcE) [**_So we’re collecting 25,000 signatures to show these CRITICAL federal judges that we support them and we stand with them in their fight against Trump! _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60363?t=5&akid=22952%2E4449941%2EKUlEcE) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60363?t=6&akid=22952%2E4449941%2EKUlEcE)

name: Chrissy
subject: Hegseth should resign – you and I can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104573826/535791783/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWYyZjRkZS05MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxUdgzF7CbFZTG0oRojYLCYhZLFhm3WD5ob88Z-on2I=&emci=f1e027cc-760a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0af2f4de-910a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)
Like many of you, I knew Pete Hegseth was unqualified to be our nation’s top military leader. I called for the Senate _not_ to confirm him as Defense Secretary and even asked you to sign a petition to show how much opposition there was to his nomination. We almost did it – Vice President Vance had to break the tie vote.
But even I was shocked by the news of a Signal group chat of our nation’s intelligence officials discussing classified plans for U.S. military action in Yemen. Since then, it’s been one lie after another from the Trump Administration.
I spoke with **[CNN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104573827/535791784/-803653937?v=oaw1OVou7w4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWYyZjRkZS05MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxUdgzF7CbFZTG0oRojYLCYhZLFhm3WD5ob88Z-on2I=&emci=f1e027cc-760a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0af2f4de-910a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)** this morning and will keep pushing on all the news shows that will have me. As an Air Force veteran and a member of the House Intelligence Committee, I understand – to my core – how reckless and dangerous this behavior is.
I’m fighting for an investigation, but we don’t need one to know that people should be fired. After committing a mistake like this, one that put the lives of the men and women carrying out the military strikes at risk, Secretary Hegseth should step down.
Will you help me keep pressure on the administration? Not let them hunker down until this news cycle blows over? Help me hold them accountable? You can use your voice online, in letters to the editor, in marches and rallies, by calling your U.S. Senators, and by calling the White House.
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104573828/535791785/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1112-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWYyZjRkZS05MTBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxUdgzF7CbFZTG0oRojYLCYhZLFhm3WD5ob88Z-on2I=)
---
There’s work to be done,
Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: BREAKING: Democrat Wins Pennsylvania Senate Special Election in An R+23 District
body:
---
**_BREAKING: In Major Upset, Democrat James Malone Wins Pennsylvania Senate Special Election in An R+23 District**_ Derek, Yesterday, Democrat James Malone won a shocking, historic special election victory in Pennsylvania’s Senate District 36 — _a district that went to Trump by 15 points in 2024 and has a 23-point Republican voter registration advantage._ Yesterday’s special election victory in Pennsylvania is further proof that voters are fed up with the Trump-Musk agenda — and they’re voting accordingly. **In 2025, Democrats continue to overperform in special elections as voters make their anger at Trump heard loud and clear.** Here at the DNC, we’re working hard to fight back. We’ve supported Pennsylvania Democrats in helping recruit volunteers who knocked on doors throughout the district and connected with voters in the lead-up to Election Day. With the race ultimately coming down to a few hundred votes, those conversations made all the difference. **The only way we’re going to elect more Democrats who will check Trump’s power in their cities, states, and districts is by competing everywhere. And that’s exactly what we’re doing.** Thank you for everything, and we’ll have more to share soon as we fight to win upcoming special elections in Wisconsin, Florida, and more. The Democrats **Grassroots donations fund our work to organize everywhere.** **And you might be surprised to hear this, but most of our donations come from emails just like this one.** [**We hope you’ll consider pitching in to help Democrats win more elections like these — next week, later this year, and beyond:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025/?amount=3&refcode=em_20250326_3067_fr&refcode2=3067_22930333_tiD9Ro&akid=3067%2E22930333%2EtiD9Ro) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250326_3067_fr&refcode2=3067_22930333_tiD9Ro&akid=3067%2E22930333%2EtiD9Ro)**

name: Team Crow
subject: Pete Hegseth must resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
**Team — Jason just called for Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to resign over his reckless handling of classified information that put American troops at risk.** **[We’ll explain more in a moment, but first, please rush in a donation of any amount to stand with Jason as fights to hold Donald Trump and his administration accountable>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104574060/535792802/-10065684?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20250326_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE5NWI1ZC05MzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEfBN4N12HCfWjGWfrwQlvmYm04yWIH2xjHN4nacrRs=)** The Trump administration, including Vice President Vance, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, and Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard all discussed top secret war plans over unsecured text chains — and _accidentally included a journalist in the chat._ Jason is working to hold them accountable. In today's House Intelligence Committee hearing, Jason asked top Trump intelligence officials the tough questions to get to the bottom of this dangerous security breach. But instead of taking accountability for their mistakes, they made **excuse after excuse** — with no regard for the brave men and women they send to fight for our country every day. The American people deserve better. Jason spent his life in service to this country. He served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan as an Army Ranger. His time in service taught him that responsibility and accountability is fundamental to leadership — and that starts at the top. But it’s clear that this administration is unwilling to own up to any of their mistakes. **That’s why Jason is calling on Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to resign.** **[MAGA Republicans and the donors who support them won’t take kindly to Jason holding them accountable. clean_body: | Team — Jason just called for Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to resign over his reckless handling of classified information that put American troops at risk. = The Trump administration, including Vice President Vance, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, and Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard all discussed top secret war plans over unsecured text chains — and accidentally included a journalist in the chat. Jason is working to hold them accountable. In today's House Intelligence Committee hearing, Jason asked top Trump intelligence officials the tough questions to get to the bottom of this dangerous security breach. But instead of taking accountability for their mistakes, they made excuse after excuse — with no regard for the brave men and women they send to fight for our country every day. The American people deserve better. Jason spent his life in service to this country. He served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan as an Army Ranger. His time in service taught him that responsibility and accountability is fundamental to leadership — and that starts at the top. But it’s clear that this administration is unwilling to own up to any of their mistakes. That’s why Jason is calling on Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to resign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for having Jason's back, Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Hegseth messed up, and then he lied about it. He needs to resign.
body:
Now, I might just be a former enlisted marine, but I know one of the core values of the Army is INTEGRITY. Doing what’s right, upholding moral principles, never deceiving others — especially the American people.
#

Peter, I need you to join me in calling on Secretary Hegseth to resign.
If that’s all you need, sign on here: [**<https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/resign-pete>** If you need a bit more, I’m happy to explain. When this Signal story went public, Hegseth played it down. He acted like it was no big deal. He told us they didn’t share plans of attack. He told us it wasn’t classified. At every stage he has been proven wrong. The Secretary of Defense has lied about this from the jump. Hegseth served in the U.S. Army. I respect that. Now, I might just be a former enlisted marine, but I know one of the core values of the Army is **INTEGRITY**. Doing what’s right, upholding moral principles, never deceiving others — especially the American people. Seems he forgot that one. Hegseth is a hypocrite. He is a liar. He messed up. He shared secret information, attack plans for a combat mission. He did it on a commercial app that his own Department of Defense warned was open to hacking by foreign actors. That’s irresponsible. This guy can’t lead the men and women of the U.S. military. **Secretary Hegseth, you should resign.** It’s really, really important that we rally around this, Peter. If we act as one we can continue to dial up the pressure. And that’s why I need you, right now. [**Please, add your name and call on Secretary Hegseth to resign.** [TELL HIM TO RESIGN](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250325/?source=em250326-1-160&akid=3778%2E734936%2EGqa04M) Semper Fi, Ruben

Hey Peter, We have to talk about Bernie Sanders & Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s Fighting Oligarchy tour. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104574173/535793292/207629307?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250326_fr_tour_team_oc_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzY2MTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOGE3YTVhLTk0MGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uFXVEY0SqxE0QzD4S9TW5T6qV0vygavCIoNUKrGMwJM=)
---
The Fighting Oligarchy tour is drawing huge crowds, Sanders’ team reporting turnout of nearly 87,000 last week across five events, including a significant number who have never attended a political event or protest before.
People are making it clear that they’re fired up about the pay-to-play nature of our current politics. This is how a movement begins with people banding together to rise up for what’s right.
_**Have you heard of the 3.5% rule?**_
Empirical research on civil disobedience from Harvard political scientists found that a small minority of 3.5% in active participation wins.
**3.5%**
We are living in a turning point of American history.
The crowd sizes at these rallies show that people are fired up and ready like never before to fight the oligarchy. Many are looking for their organizing home to join their friends, neighbors, and community in action.
One Pennsylvania is organizing across the Commonwealth and can be that organizing home! _**[We need your support of $3, $10, or anything you can spare. One PA can reach and welcome more Pennsylvanians into the fight than ever before. name: Katie Porter
subject: Can I explain why I’m running to lead California?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
But with an emboldened Trump in the White House and MAGA loyalists doing his bidding day in and day out, California—and our country—need a leader who is ready to go toe to toe with extremists.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39578%2E3422442%2EuDe1iM)
Derek, I didn’t make the decision to run to be California’s next governor lightly. But with an emboldened Trump in the White House and MAGA loyalists doing his bidding day in and day out, California—and our country—need a leader who is ready to go toe to toe with extremists.
I first ran for office in 2018. I was a single mom of three little kids, running in a district that Republicans had held for decades. **But I ran because I couldn’t sit on the sidelines as I watched Trump try and destroy our country.** As a consumer protection attorney, I wanted to use my experience to hold him and his administration accountable.
With the support of folks like you, I made it to Congress, where I was able to save patients thousands of dollars from drug companies who were ripping us off and passed laws cracking down on health care companies that wrongfully denied care.
**I feel the same call to serve today as I did during Trump’s first administration.**
California is experiencing real challenges. We must become resilient to natural disasters and tackle climate change. We must address the high cost of housing, health care, and groceries. And we must continue to protect our LGBTQ+ community members and safeguard abortion access.
**We don’t have to choose between defending our values and tackling our challenges.** We can work with businesses to create good paying jobs in California and hold corporations accountable. We can keep communities safe and uphold civil rights.
**I’m never one for BS or sugar coating, so I’ll be honest—this race won’t be a walk in the park!** There are already multiple candidates in the race to succeed Governor Newsom, who is term-limited, and the primary election is just over a year away.
**[I’m asking you to join our movement to stand up to Trump and his cronies. $10 goes a long way in our people-powered campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250326_2_ak?refcode=em20250326-39578&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39578_3422442_uDe1iM&akid=39578%2E3422442%2EuDe1iM)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250326_2_ak?refcode=em20250326-39578&refcode2=39578_3422442_uDe1iM&akid=39578%2E3422442%2EuDe1iM)
Thanks so much for considering,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250326-39578&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39578_3422442_uDe1iM&akid=39578%2E3422442%2EuDe1iM)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39578&t=4&akid=39578%2E3422442%2EuDe1iM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39578)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39578&t=5&akid=39578%2E3422442%2EuDe1iM)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Are you with me in this fight?
body:
Earlier this month I gave the official response to Trump's speech — here's what I said. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104574963/535796537/2053923391?refcode=WUEFH359_20250326_SlotkinRS_ALL&sourceid=1055881&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE4YzcxMi05NjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SNWsLNW_Tjo-w-42CAgpxgFIyykJLAsuuIGs79oEl8=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104574965/535796539/2053923391?refcode=WUEFH359_20250326_SlotkinRS_ALL&sourceid=1055881&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE4YzcxMi05NjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SNWsLNW_Tjo-w-42CAgpxgFIyykJLAsuuIGs79oEl8=) Hi everyone. Senator Elissa Slotkin here.

Earlier this month, I gave the official response to President Trump's Joint Address. I hope you had a chance to watch.

Since I'm a stranger to most people who don't follow politics, I introduced myself and just kept it straight with the people watching about the moment we are in right now.

We just went through another fraught election season. Americans made it clear that they want change. But there is a responsible way to make change, and a reckless way. And, we can make that change without forgetting who we are as a country, and as a democracy.

Because no matter where you live, most Americans share three core beliefs: That the middle class is the engine of our country. That strong national security protects us from harm. And that our democracy, no matter how messy, is unparalleled and worth fighting for.

We all know that our country is going through something right now. We're not sure what the next day is going to hold, let alone the next decade.

But this isn't the first time we've experienced this as a country. Every single time, we've gotten through those moments because of two things: Engaged citizens and principled leaders.

If you're with me in that fight, I have an ask of you:

[**Can you split a contribution between my campaign and EMILYs List to help us elect a new generation of leaders who put country first?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104574966/535796540/2053923391?refcode=WUEFH359_20250326_SlotkinRS_ALL&sourceid=1055881&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE4YzcxMi05NjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SNWsLNW_Tjo-w-42CAgpxgFIyykJLAsuuIGs79oEl8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104574967/535796541/2053923391?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFH359_20250326_SlotkinRS_ALL&sourceid=1055881&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE4YzcxMi05NjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SNWsLNW_Tjo-w-42CAgpxgFIyykJLAsuuIGs79oEl8=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104574968/535796544/2053923391?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFH359_20250326_SlotkinRS_ALL&sourceid=1055881&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE4YzcxMi05NjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SNWsLNW_Tjo-w-42CAgpxgFIyykJLAsuuIGs79oEl8=)

name: Team Bonta
subject: Rob defended CA’s high-capacity magazine ban and won!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The AG fought for over a year to keep this California law on the books and prevent senseless injuries and deaths in our communities.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250326&t=1&akid=1708%2E1088799%2E5Bz_MT)
Rob just scored a major victory in his fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
**In a 7-4 decision, the 9th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals ruled that California’s large-capacity magazine ban doesn’t violate the Second Amendment.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250326?refcode=em20250326-1708&refcode2=1708_1088799_5Bz_MT&akid=1708%2E1088799%2E5Bz_MT)
Let’s be clear: _this law saves lives._ Large-capacity magazines can hold more than 10 rounds of ammunition and are frequently used in mass shootings. By limiting how many rounds a gunman can fire before they must pause to reload, this commonsense restriction is a critical intervention to stop shootings from turning into mass casualty events.
**The AG has been fighting to keep this law on the books and prevent senseless injuries and deaths in our communities — and with this latest ruling, he delivered.**
But we know from experience that the gun industry, far-right politicians, and the NRA won’t give up easily either. We need to be as committed to the fight as they are, and then some. Addressing the gun violence epidemic is a collective responsibility, and Rob can’t do it without your help.
**[With our end-of-quarter deadline rapidly approaching next Monday, our campaign must meet our fundraising goal before time runs out. Every dollar counts, so will you rush a $5 donation to keep Rob in office fighting for commonsense gun violence prevention?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250326?refcode=em20250326-1708&amount=5&refcode2=1708_1088799_5Bz_MT&akid=1708%2E1088799%2E5Bz_MT)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250326?refcode=em20250326-1708&amount=5&refcode2=1708_1088799_5Bz_MT&akid=1708%2E1088799%2E5Bz_MT)**
Thanks for all you do to have Rob’s back,
Team Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250326&t=3&refcode2=1708_1088799_5Bz_MT&akid=1708%2E1088799%2E5Bz_MT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1708%2E1088799%2E5Bz_MT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1708%2E1088799%2E5Bz_MT)

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026

1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

Peter,

More great news from last night: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104575341/535797811/-1784870395?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250326_FR_HD35Victory_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGRiYzFlOC05NjBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvXc27j-ICiC_snofdYvFIqe9q3Pf_peDwsnV_rFqsk=) Together, we kept our State House **blue** , which puts us one step closer to raising the minimum wage, expanding job opportunities, strengthening schools, and standing up to Trump and Musk’s threats here in Pennsylvania.

body:
We’re falling short of our goal.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104575535/535798497/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNlMGE0NmUtOTgwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3a8WogdSup17ZfYjXMYoLMMPTDMENa7GNgQgkh5MkQ=) | Peter, I have an important update, and it’s not good news: **Right now we’re only 50% of the way to Josh’s end-of-quarter goal. If we don’t pick up the pace, there is NO WAY we’re going to reach 100% by our FEC deadline on Monday.** We know this is one of the most competitive seats in the country. Josh is standing up for us, now we need to stand with him. [_**Can you please rush in a donation to make sure we don’t fall short of this important goal and risk losing Josh’s voice in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104575536/535798498/2012213333?&refcode=E12732-20250326-BadNews-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNlMGE0NmUtOTgwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3a8WogdSup17ZfYjXMYoLMMPTDMENa7GNgQgkh5MkQ=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104575537/535798499/2012213333?&refcode=E12732-20250326-BadNews-Image-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNlMGE0NmUtOTgwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3a8WogdSup17ZfYjXMYoLMMPTDMENa7GNgQgkh5MkQ=)** Let me tell you why this deadline is so important for our campaign:
1. This is Josh’s very first end-of-quarter deadline of the cycle, and our fundraising numbers will be going public for the first time. We need to have a strong showing to prove we’ve got grassroots momentum!

2. It’s also the first reporting deadline since Trump returned to the White House, and it’s important to show that Democrats are fighting back.

3. Josh is the GOP’s #1 target in the next election, so we need to be ready to fight back against Super PACs who will be spending millions of dollars on attack ads in our district very soon.

4. We know to win in the Valley, we have to get organized early by hiring staff and getting our grassroots field program up and running. We also need to make investments in Latino organizing!

5. If we don’t hold this seat, we have no chance of flipping the House blue and taking the Speaker’s gavel away from Mike Johnson, Donald Trump, and Elon Musk.

[_**For all of these reasons, I’m asking you to send in a donation to reach our goal. We’re falling short right now, and we need to catch up before our deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104575538/535798500/2012213333?&refcode=E12732-20250326-BadNews-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNlMGE0NmUtOTgwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3a8WogdSup17ZfYjXMYoLMMPTDMENa7GNgQgkh5MkQ=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104575539/535798501/2012213333?express_lane=true&&refcode=E12732-20250326-BadNews-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNlMGE0NmUtOTgwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3a8WogdSup17ZfYjXMYoLMMPTDMENa7GNgQgkh5MkQ=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104575540/535798502/2012213333?express_lane=true&&refcode=E12732-20250326-BadNews-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNlMGE0NmUtOTgwYS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3a8WogdSup17ZfYjXMYoLMMPTDMENa7GNgQgkh5MkQ=)**

clean_body: We’re falling short of our goal. | = | Peter, I have an important update, and it’s not good news: Right now we’re only 50% of the way to Josh’s end-of-quarter goal. If we don’t pick up the pace, there is NO WAY we’re going to reach 100% by our FEC deadline on Monday. We know this is one of the most competitive seats in the country. Josh is standing up for us, now we need to stand with him. = = Let me tell you why this deadline is so important for our campaign: 1. This is Josh’s very first end-of-quarter deadline of the cycle, and our fundraising numbers will be going public for the first time. We need to have a strong showing to prove we’ve got grassroots momentum! 2. It’s also the first reporting deadline since Trump returned to the White House, and it’s important to show that Democrats are fighting back. 3. Josh is the GOP’s #1 target in the next election, so we need to be ready to fight back against Super PACs who will be spending millions of dollars on attack ads in our district very soon. 4. We know to win in the Valley, we have to get organized early by hiring staff and getting our grassroots field program up and running. We also need to make investments in Latino organizing! 5. If we don’t hold this seat, we have no chance of flipping the House blue and taking the Speaker’s gavel away from Mike Johnson, Donald Trump, and Elon Musk. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for being someone we can count on when it matters! \- Michael Hammer Finance Director, Harder for Congress *

name: Barack Obama
subject: At this critical moment for our country, I’m asking you to join me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Help fight for our democracy and continue to work to build a fairer, more just, and more equal America.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104575549/535798540/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMWEzMjI5LTk4MGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r4WBtXobZ4DTiBsWW6Ma98IcsVoY6xiwP3Mn7NjHVUY=&emci=b7ee916e-7a0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2f1a3229-980a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, the work of democracy has always been hard. It's always been contentious. For every two steps forward, it often feels like we take one step back. But the long story of America has been defined by a forward motion — a constant widening of our founding creed to embrace all and not just some. Peter, I know that these days — in times of great challenge and uncertainty — it’s easy to get discouraged or feel cynical about what’s possible. **It takes resolve and dedication to remember who we aspire to be. ** For nearly 250 years, our nation's call to citizenship has given work and purpose to each new generation. It's what led patriots to choose republic over tyranny, pioneers to trek west, enslaved folks to brave that makeshift railroad to freedom. It's what pushed women to fight for the right to vote at the ballot box. It's why GIs gave their lives at Omaha Beach and Iwo Jima — and why men and women from Selma to Stonewall were prepared to give theirs, as well. **Citizenship is calling each of us. It's our turn to rise to the moment, to stay true to our values, and to lock arms with those around us who are also intent on moving this country forward.** **I’m proud to support the NDRC to do this hard, but necessary work of advancing our democracy by fighting for fair representation across our country.** As the strategic hub for our work to end gerrymandering, they help make it possible for voters to pick their politicians instead of the other way around — and they count on grassroots support like yours to power this work. [**Will you join me in helping the NDRC fight for our democracy and continue the work of building a fairer, more just, and more equal America?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104575550/535798541/790884352?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaEOQ_email_20250326-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaEOQ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250326-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaEOQ_&utm_campaign=ObamaEOQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMWEzMjI5LTk4MGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r4WBtXobZ4DTiBsWW6Ma98IcsVoY6xiwP3Mn7NjHVUY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Let’s be clear: The threats to the backbone of our democracy are real — those who want to erase decades of progress and take America backward seem to be growing louder by the day. And while I believe in our ability to out-organize and out-hustle them, I know the work ahead won’t be easy. _**Few things worth fighting for ever are.**_
When my friend Eric Holder and I started the NDRC, it was to stand up to partisan and racial gerrymandering, and fight for a better, more representative democracy.
In the eight years since this team got off the ground, I’ve seen them develop and execute a comprehensive strategy to stop map manipulation. They’ve helped elect pro-democracy candidates to positions that play crucial roles in the redistricting process, and they’ve helped ensure some of the fairest electoral maps of our lifetimes. But there’s still a long way to go.
[**I’m asking you to place your trust, alongside mine, in the NDRC and to believe that, together, we can prevail for our democracy. If you can, make a grassroots investment in that future — donate $30 before Monday’s quarterly fundraising deadline and let’s rise to meet this moment.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104575557/535798548/790884352?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ObamaEOQ_email_20250326-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaEOQ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250326-NDRC-Tier1-ObamaEOQ_&utm_campaign=ObamaEOQ&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmMWEzMjI5LTk4MGEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r4WBtXobZ4DTiBsWW6Ma98IcsVoY6xiwP3Mn7NjHVUY=)
Thank you,
Barack Obama

clean_body: Help fight for our democracy and continue to work to build a fairer, more just, and more equal America. | Peter, the work of democracy has always been hard. It's always been contentious. For every two steps forward, it often feels like we take one step back. But the long story of America has been defined by a forward motion — a constant widening of our founding creed to embrace all and not just some. Peter, I know that these days — in times of great challenge and uncertainty — it’s easy to get discouraged or feel cynical about what’s possible. It takes resolve and dedication to remember who we aspire to be. For nearly 250 years, our nation's call to citizenship has given work and purpose to each new generation. It's what led patriots to choose republic over tyranny, pioneers to trek west, enslaved folks to brave that makeshift railroad to freedom. It's what pushed women to fight for the right to vote at the ballot box. It's why GIs gave their lives at Omaha Beach and Iwo Jima — and why men and women from Selma to Stonewall were prepared to give theirs, as well. Citizenship is calling each of us. It's our turn to rise to the moment, to stay true to our values, and to lock arms with those around us who are also intent on moving this country forward. I’m proud to support the NDRC to do this hard, but necessary work of advancing our democracy by fighting for fair representation across our country. As the strategic hub for our work to end gerrymandering, they help make it possible for voters to pick their politicians instead of the other way around — and they count on grassroots support like yours to power this work. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let’s be clear: The threats to the backbone of our democracy are real — those who want to erase decades of progress and take America backward seem to be growing louder by the day. And while I believe in our ability to out-organize and out-hustle them, I know the work ahead won’t be easy. Few things worth fighting for ever are. When my friend Eric Holder and I started the NDRC, it was to stand up to partisan and racial gerrymandering, and fight for a better, more representative democracy. In the eight years since this team got off the ground, I’ve seen them develop and execute a comprehensive strategy to stop map manipulation. They’ve helped elect pro-democracy candidates to positions that play crucial roles in the redistricting process, and they’ve helped ensure some of the fairest electoral maps of our lifetimes. But there’s still a long way to go. = Thank you, Barack Obama = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
If this encourages you at all...
#
Peter — is there anything we can say to encourage you to make your first donation to Heartland Patriots today?
What if we told you that we’re building a people-powered movement to combat the corrosive influence of corporate PACs and billionaire insiders on our government?
Or what if we shared more about the kinds of candidates we’re supporting — like Blake Gendebien in NY-21 and Rebecca Cooke in WI-03 — and their hard work to represent real working people in Congress?
Maybe it would help if we told you about our big end-of-quarter deadline coming up on Monday... and that we’re still pretty far from reaching that $15,000 goal we emailed you about earlier this week?

He’s pardoned violent criminals and allowed an unelected billionaire to take a chainsaw to the federal government. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: 🚨 The Trump admin is gutting education — we’re fighting back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
They want us just smart enough to work for them — but never smart enough to fight back.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250326-1&t=1&akid=1899%2E587540%2EVji5f4)
Peter,
The Trump administration has made its priorities clear:
**They don’t want an educated America. And they will make future generations dumber if we don’t stop them.**
Instead of supporting education for the people of this country, they’ve:
**❌** Issued an executive order eliminating the Department of Education
**❌** Gutted public schools while prioritizing private interests
❌ Turned student debt into a lifelong burden
❌ Slashed funding for programs that help working-class students succeed
Why? Because they have a distorted view of what students should know. They don’t want to teach the history of slavery, any topic that touches on racial injustice, climate change, books written by people from marginalized identities, any perspective that might give a negative framing of our country’s history.
It's pathetic and will make our country and kids worse off.
But we _are_ fighting back.
**Young people know that education is power.**
They know that neighborhood schools, trade programs, and universities aren’t just institutions — they’re pathways to a better life.
That’s why we need leaders who will protect and expand education, _not_ destroy it.
**[If you believe in opportunity for all, can you chip in $5 or more today to help us elect the next generation of progressive fighters?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250326-1?refcode=em20250326-1899&amount=5&refcode2=1899_587540_Vji5f4&akid=1899%2E587540%2EVji5f4)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250326-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250326-1899&refcode2=1899_587540_Vji5f4&akid=1899%2E587540%2EVji5f4)**
The right is banking on us staying quiet. Let’s prove them wrong.
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250326-1&t=2&refcode2=1899_587540_Vji5f4&akid=1899%2E587540%2EVji5f4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1899%2E587540%2EVji5f4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1899%2E587540%2EVji5f4)

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104575993/535800035/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFlNjIzZS05YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYGm18MIY5pHClkVze0OufYy03cYycl6url-RLBypUg=&emci=a4689e13-9b0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f2ae623e-9c0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)
---
| **CALLING ALL VOTING RIGHTS ADVOCATES 🗣️🗣️🗣️** NextGen is taking a stand against MAGA’s latest attempt to disenfranchise voters. Join us tomorrow, Friday, or Tuesday while we make calls patching voters through to their representatives so they vote NO on the SAVE Act!
---
[Sign Up Today →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104575994/535800036/648710732?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFlNjIzZS05YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYGm18MIY5pHClkVze0OufYy03cYycl6url-RLBypUg=&emci=a4689e13-9b0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f2ae623e-9c0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)
We know we’ve been talking about the SAVE Act a lot, team. **That’s because this legislation is the biggest threat to voting rights we’ve seen yet.**
The MAGA crowd is using the SAVE Act to pretend they care about election security. In reality, this bill would disenfranchise MILLIONS of eligible voters.
The SAVE Act would require us to provide either a passport or a birth certificate to register to vote or update our voter registration. The problem is, _millions of people don’t have access to those documents._ And if you’ve changed your name at any point, that new name won’t be on your birth certificate.
People of color, married women, low-income communities, and rural communities are all at risk of losing their right to vote.
**That’s why we’re taking action.**
Starting tomorrow, March 27th, 2025, we’ll be making calls and patching voters through to their representatives in Congress so they can tell them to vote NO on the SAVE Act.
[Sign up today to join us tomorrow, Friday, or Tuesday. We won’t rest until our right to vote is secure.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104575995/535800037/-1273603569?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFlNjIzZS05YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYGm18MIY5pHClkVze0OufYy03cYycl6url-RLBypUg=&emci=a4689e13-9b0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f2ae623e-9c0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | | CALLING ALL VOTING RIGHTS ADVOCATES 🗣️🗣️🗣️ NextGen is taking a stand against MAGA’s latest attempt to disenfranchise voters. Join us tomorrow, Friday, or Tuesday while we make calls patching voters through to their representatives so they vote NO on the SAVE Act! We know we’ve been talking about the SAVE Act a lot, team. That’s because this legislation is the biggest threat to voting rights we’ve seen yet. The MAGA crowd is using the SAVE Act to pretend they care about election security. In reality, this bill would disenfranchise MILLIONS of eligible voters. The SAVE Act would require us to provide either a passport or a birth certificate to register to vote or update our voter registration. The problem is, millions of people don’t have access to those documents. And if you’ve changed your name at any point, that new name won’t be on your birth certificate. People of color, married women, low-income communities, and rural communities are all at risk of losing their right to vote. That’s why we’re taking action. Starting tomorrow, March 27th, 2025, we’ll be making calls and patching voters through to their representatives in Congress so they can tell them to vote NO on the SAVE Act. | Let’s do this! NextGen America | | = |

name: Liz Cheney
subject: Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | Dear friend,

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution.

I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress.

Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines as we continue to protect and secure the future of our democracy.

We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. _We need good, smart, honest and honorable people in elected office._

[**_With your help we can make sure Zoe has the resources needed to stay in Congress and continue the important work of defending our Constitution. Please join me in supporting her and contributing $10 today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104576004/535800048/-1462835337?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-03-26_LIZ_ZOL_ES-20011_RS&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjczOTc1Yi05YzBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=37uULkKxb0xIC7DEZz_p1IUdyoEBydPZU5bkEVLp3yo=)

subject: A dangerous attempted power grab in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Can you pitch in any amount as we fight back against this anti-voter legislation? |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104576121/535800486/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250326_f_GeorgiaBillRR_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjI5ZmVjMy05ZDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX-e7PgMnCTHs86jRSXPDnmVzDraqQOrY5s7YvOoWlc=&emci=cc09e3bc-9d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=eb29fec3-9d0a-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | We have an urgent update for you on new voter suppression legislation in Georgia: **Georgia lawmakers are trying to ram through a bill that would give unelected officials — who are aligned with election deniers — more power to determine who stays on the voter rolls and how our elections are run. It would also codify several anti-voter practices that a judge called “illegal, unconstitutional, and void.”** [**We need immediate grassroots support from activists like you as we fight to stop this bill before the legislative session ends next Friday. Please make a donation right away.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104576122/535800487/-814815813?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250326_f_GeorgiaBillRR_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjI5ZmVjMy05ZDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX-e7PgMnCTHs86jRSXPDnmVzDraqQOrY5s7YvOoWlc=) This bill — HB 397 — is being considered in committee right now. If it passes through the General Assembly and gets signed into law, here’s the damage it would do to our elections:
* Enact a dangerous power grab by the State Election Board (SEB), an official elections body in Georgia with members that have close ties to Trump-connected election deniers.
* Give the SEB authority to decide appeals in voter purge cases — potentially siding with mass challengers over local election officials.
* Allow up to 90 days for the SEB to rule on an appeal after a county-level decision, leaving voters in limbo and the potential risk of missing elections.

It would also enshrine policies that bipartisan elections experts have called out as harmful:
* Mandated video surveillance of absentee ballot drop boxes.
* Expanded partisan poll watcher access to sensitive areas in elections offices.
* Ballot-counting procedures that create significant risk of human error and confusion.

Every Georgian deserves a fair opportunity to vote, but this bill creates new ways to block people from participating — even voters who may be wrongly challenged. And it fits into a broader pattern of Georgia lawmakers trying to cling to power by suppressing our votes. **At Fair Fight Action, we are mobilizing Georgians to call on their lawmakers to oppose this bill, we’re working alongside partners to lobby legislators, and we’re exposing all the ways this legislation would damage our democracy.** [**But we’re counting on donors like you to help ensure free and fair elections. As we race to stop this legislation, will you make a donation of any amount to power our work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104576123/535800488/-814815813?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250326_f_GeorgiaBillRR_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjI5ZmVjMy05ZDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX-e7PgMnCTHs86jRSXPDnmVzDraqQOrY5s7YvOoWlc=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104576124/535800489/-814815813?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250326_f_GeorgiaBillRR_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjI5ZmVjMy05ZDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX-e7PgMnCTHs86jRSXPDnmVzDraqQOrY5s7YvOoWlc=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104576125/535800490/-814815813?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250326_f_GeorgiaBillRR_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjI5ZmVjMy05ZDBhLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX-e7PgMnCTHs86jRSXPDnmVzDraqQOrY5s7YvOoWlc=)

clean_body: Can you pitch in any amount as we fight back against this anti-voter legislation? | | | We have an urgent update for you on new voter suppression legislation in Georgia: Georgia lawmakers are trying to ram through a bill that would give unelected officials — who are aligned with election deniers — more power to determine who stays on the voter rolls and how our elections are run. It would also codify several anti-voter practices that a judge called “illegal, unconstitutional, and void.” = This bill — HB 397 — is being considered in committee right now. If it passes through the General Assembly and gets signed into law, here’s the damage it would do to our elections: Enact a dangerous power grab by the State Election Board (SEB), an official elections body in Georgia with members that have close ties to Trump-connected election deniers. Give the SEB authority to decide appeals in voter purge cases — potentially siding with mass challengers over local election officials. Allow up to 90 days for the SEB to rule on an appeal after a county-level decision, leaving voters in limbo and the potential risk of missing elections. It would also enshrine policies that bipartisan elections experts have called out as harmful: Mandated video surveillance of absentee ballot drop boxes. Expanded partisan poll watcher access to sensitive areas in elections offices. Ballot-counting procedures that create significant risk of human error and confusion. Every Georgian deserves a fair opportunity to vote, but this bill creates new ways to block people from participating — even voters who may be wrongly challenged. And it fits into a broader pattern of Georgia lawmakers trying to cling to power by suppressing our votes. At Fair Fight Action, we are mobilizing Georgians to call on their lawmakers to oppose this bill, we’re working alongside partners to lobby legislators, and we’re exposing all the ways this legislation would damage our democracy. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for staying vigilant against these threats to our democracy.
